title: The Double Life of My Billionaire Husband
synopsis: It was supposed to be an emotionless contract marriage and nothing more. But Sebastian couldn't resist growing a soft spot for Natalie. With her family planning her downfall and her estranged husband cooking up a deadly plan, what should Natalie expect? The Double Life of My Billionaire Husband trailer has a lot to reveal.

title: My Sister Is the Warlord Queen
synopsis: In My Sister is The Warlord Queen movie, abandoned by their parents, the Blackwood sisters, Catherine and Grace, grew up with only each other to rely on. As adults, both built successful lives. But at Grace’s engagement party, Catherine shows up straight from an undercover mission, still dressed as a janitor, and becomes the target of ridicule from Grace's in-laws and former classmates. When her sister is betrayed and humiliated by her fiancé, Catherine reveals her true identity as the Warlord Queen, and makes everyone regret underestimating them.

title: Found A Homeless Billionaire Husband for Christmas
synopsis: Victoria was set to return to Texas with her fiancé Carl to plan their wedding, but she was horrifically humiliated and betrayed by him. To save face with her family, Victoria reluctantly agrees to marry Simon, a homeless man she had been helping. Little did she know, Simon is not just any homeless man—he's a handsome and charming billionaire, the CEO of the prestigious Savage Group, ranked number one in the country. Upon returning to Texas with Simon, Victoria unexpectedly crosses paths with her arrogant ex, Carl. This time, she’s determined to reclaim all the dignity she lost.

title: Ms. CEO's Baby Daddy Is the Merchant of Death
synopsis: In Ms. CEO's Baby Daddy Is the Merchant of Death movie, Connor Reed, the most powerful arms dealer in the world, saves a Charlotte Hayes and spends the night with her while he is undercover. Four years later, while still hiding, Charlotte shows up... with their child. Now Connor must keep both of them safe... without revealing his true identity.

title: How to Tame a Silver Fox
synopsis: In How to Tame a Silver Fox movie, Harper Reeves is just trying to finish up her senior year of Yale without being a completely friendless loser. However, when her party's suddenly crashed by her dad's best friend and mysterious business partner, Chris Collins, she realizes she'd much rather have been busted by the cops. Chris, always in over-protective mode, gets on Harper's nerves, until she realizes he needs to go. Together with her best friend Maria, she brainstorms Operation Seduction, planning to get Chris to fall in love with her so her dad will kick him out himself. But every time Chris saves Harper from trouble, she gets closer to realizing she may have feelings for him after all.

title: True Heiress vs. Fake Queen Bee
synopsis:
Hailey Kaplan, a wealthy teenager who decides to conceal her true identity when she transfers to Western High, a public school. Tired of being known only for her family's wealth, Hailey hopes to make genuine friends and experience a normal teenage life.
However, her plans are thrown into chaos when Candice Mathis, the daughter of the Kaplan family's maid, arrives at school posing as the Kaplan heiress. Candice quickly rises to the top of the social hierarchy, while Hailey finds herself at the bottom, subjected to bullying and ridicule.

title: Bound by Honor
synopsis: Trapped in an arranged marriage to the cold and dangerously seductive heir of the New York mafia, LUCA, 18yo sheltered mafia princess from Chicago, ARIA must decide if surrendering her body—and maybe her heart—to a man born of violence is her greatest betrayal or her only chance at survival.

title: American Sniper: The Last Round
synopsis: Carl Oliver, the legendary sharpshooter known as the King of Guns, broke the world record for longest confirmed kill then vanished from the public eye. He hid his identity, working as maintenance at a shooting range. He endures humiliation from the dismissive shooting club captain, Albert, unaware of his true identity. The shooting range is facing a hostile takeover. In order to protect Jane, the owner, and her daughter Rebecca, Carl steps up and shows his legendary shooting skills, drawing attention to his mysterious identity...

title: Fated to My Forbidden Alpha
synopsis: In Fated to My Forbidden Alpha movie, on her 18th birthday, Selene found out that her mate was her nemesis, Alpha Jackson. He plans on rejecting her. Selene never planned on accepting him as her mate. He didn't know she wasn't any wolf but a Luna, kidnapped and mistaken for a regular wolf. As Selene plans on escaping her pack, she meets Alexander, her fated mate.

title: Married at First Sight
synopsis: In Married at First Sight movie, Summer has been the ideal girlfriend for her ex-boyfriend, Vincent. From selling her blood to helping him finish medical school, Summer has been the best girlfriend. Yet, Vincent cheated on her. Frustrated by their actions, Summer enters into a contract marriage to save a billionaire she just met. She was shocked to find out about his identity.

title: Move Aside! I'm the Final Boss
synopsis: In Move Aside I'm the Final Boss Movie, Kingsley is the secret King of King's Corps and the richest man on Earth, but when he returns from the battlefield, his childhood sweetheart brutally dumps him, thinking he's a clown. How will the King of all men make her regret it?

title: Married The Mafioso I Saved
synopsis: Hannah gave up everything for her fiancé, only to be brutally betrayed and abandoned in the States. Desperate to stay, she flash-married Alex, the "street thug" she accidentally saved with a single kiss during his escape. Passion ignites as Alex shields her from her vengeful ex and every threat. As their new life unfolds, Hannah starts to realize Alex might be more than just a street stranger...

title: The Reckoning Takes Flight
synopsis: Eve takes a flight to Hawaii to attend her big brother's wedding, booking an extra-wide seat because of her broken leg in a cast. A nasty woman and her bratty son demand Eve switch seats with them. The kid trips because of turbulence, his mom demands the flight turn back and fights the pilots, forcing an emergency landing. The mom's sister, Clara, shows up to back her up. Clara accuses Eve of being her fiancée's mistress, not realizing that she's her fiancée's little sister. The wedding is canceled, and Clara is sent to jail.

title: Snatched a Billionaire to be My Husband
synopsis: What happens when you fall in love with your ex's uncle?!

title: Ex-Convict Nanny and Billionaire Single Dad
synopsis: Fresh out of prison, Grace landed a job as a nanny. Her boss, the ruthless billionaire Alex Hill, cares only about his precious daughter. Grace passed Alex's rigorous test and gradually won over his cold heart, but Grace holds a dark secret, one that could destroy everything good.

title: Miss You After Goodbye
synopsis: In Miss You After Goodbye movie, to repay a debt of kindness, Neil signs a secret contract with Keira's father stating that he will marry Keira for five years and help her recover from a painful breakup with her first love, Simon. During their contract marriage, Neil is attentive and caring towards Keira, but she never treats him as anything more than Simon's substitute. When the contract comes to an end, Neil discovers Keira's persisting infatuation with Simon and finally decides to divorce her. When Keira sees the divorce agreement and learns from her father of Neil's departure, she is overcome with regret and travels the world searching for Neil, ultimately realizing that the man she lost was truly in love with her. However, it's all too little too late, as Neil has already embarked on a new, promising path and left her behind for good.

title: Step Aside, I'm the King of Capital
synopsis: In Step Aside I'm the King of Capital movie, for six years abroad, Cassius builds the world’s top financial empire, the Enros Group, under the name “Mr. S,” even helping the current president rise to power. When he quietly returns home to propose to his girlfriend Isabella, she dumps him, chasing wealth and claiming only the mysterious Mr. S is good enough for her. Meanwhile, a small favor lands Cassius in a sudden marriage to Freya, the beautiful CEO of Mirror Media. At Isabella’s inauguration party, she tries to kick Cassius out again and again, never guessing who he really is—until Cassius finally decides to reclaim everything he once gave her.

title: I Had a Baby without You
synopsis: Five years ago, curvy waitress Scarlett saved Brandon's life and spent one unforgettable night of passion with him before vanishing. Now she's back, slimmed down and unrecognizable, and he's the reclusive CEO who unknowingly fathered her daughter.

title: In Love with a Single Farmer-Daddy
synopsis: Natalie's conniving grandmother and sister marry her off to a rural farmer, Rhett. He's a single father, looking after a mute daughter, Ellie. Natalie's presence isn't taken kindly, as she is shunned by Ellie and the woman next door. Over time, she learns the woman next door is actually abusing Ellie. She develops a bond with Ellie, which deepens when Ellie speaks up for the first time to save her. But as Natalie starts settling in, new troubles arise. Ellie is bullied at school, and Natalie gets tangled in conflicts involving both her old and new families. She vows to protect the hard-won love and family she's built.

title: Swallow Me Whole
synopsis:
Swallow Me Whole is based on the novel by Gemma James, published by Tapas Entertainment and Radish.

I need to know how to blow a guy. Ashton Levine is my best friend's brother and totally off-limits... until one reckless night under a bar table changed everything. The rules of him being my sex tutor are simple: No kissing. No screwing. No falling in love. But the more I use my body in the name of experimentation, the more I know being friends isn’t enough. Is it too much to want it all with him?

title: The Lost Quarterback Returns
synopsis: In The Lost Quarterback Returns movie, when Asher Bradshaw, the son of hall-of-famer NFL quarterback Trent Bradshaw and former beauty queen Krista, goes missing in a devastating fire, psychotic fan Donny Lewis takes it as an opportunity to swap Asher with his own son, Wyatt. Twelve years later, the two boys cross paths at football tryouts where Asher out performs Wyatt. The Bradshaw's not realizing Asher is their long-lost son, attack him relentlessly. They put him through physical and mental torture, egged on by their adoptive son. Until they uncover the shocking truth—Asher's the one they've been looking for. The Bradshaws then do everything in their power to beg for forgiveness while Wyatt and Donny plot revenge.

title: How to Break a DILF
synopsis: Uncle Jesse's smokin' hot tattoo and great technique on bed awakens Sophie Holland's fantasy in How To Break A DILF Trailer! She might be Jesse's best friend's daughter, and Jesse might have told her to date guys of her age. Still, something about Jesse lures Sophie. So, keep watching to know what lies behind their relationships!

title: Don't Miss Me When I'm Gone
synopsis: After losing my parents, I move in with my godmother, Aunt Sandra. I live under her roof with her two sons-the Miller brothers-surrounded by love and care. I think I’ll end up with one of them. But everything changes when the maid’s daughter, Lola, moves in. The Miller brother I love most breaks my heart into pieces. After I leave, they lose their minds trying to find me.

title: We Will Love Again
synopsis: Noah Preston returns as a billionaire after six years of being away, and his fiance breaking up with him because he was poor in We Will Love Again Movie. Noah didn't know that his fiance did not mean to break up, but his mother pressurized her into doing it. He sought revenge against her until he found out the truth.

title: My Stepbrother's Dirty Secret
synopsis: In My Stepbrother's Dirty Secret movie, Alice transfers to St. Mary's High School after her mom remarries a millionaire--only to butt heads with James, a hot classmate who turns out to be her new stepbrother! Will Alice and James learn to get along? Or will their irresistable chemistry turn into something else?

title: Breaking the Ice
synopsis: Caroline Mills and Easton Black are in a wave of love in Breaking The Ice Movie. After it was certain that Easton Black was going out on a scholarship to continue his hockey dream, his mother warned pregnant Caroline to get rid of Easton’s baby, causing problems for the couple. Love won in the end, and they got back together.

title: Carrying His Triplets, Becoming His Wifey
synopsis: In Carrying His Triplets, Becoming His Wifey movie, Daisy works in a warehouse to pay for her tuition, but her father steals her money. Financially desperate, gets another job at a strip club to make ends meet. There, she has a one-night stand with Marcus, a billionaire. Soon after, Daisy discovers that she is pregnant with triplets.

title: The Double Life of a Billionaire Heiress
synopsis: After three years of marriage, CEO Wes Sterling is convinced that his wife Kira is a cheating gold digger. Fed up with Wes's accusations and mistreatments, Kira finally divorces him and re-embraces her true identity: a billionaire heiress! What will Wes do when he realizes he has made the biggest mistake of his life? Will Kira make him pay..or fall for him all over again?

title: Tell Me Not to Love You
synopsis: Brie is the daughter of a servant who works for Teddy’s family. She grew up living in the household with her mother and developed mutual feelings for the young master, Teddy. Once they came of age, Teddy began pursuing Brie passionately, but Brie feels insecure because of her status as a servant’s daughter. Teddy struggles to convince her to be with him. Brie keeps trying to pull away, but through all their back-and-forth, she eventually admits how she truly feels.

title: Baby, Just Say Yes!
synopsis: In Baby, Just Say Yes movie, Victoria was betrayed when she found out about her fiancé's relationship with her stepsister. Still, she needed a husband to claim her inheritance. Who better to ask than her one-time saviour, Teddy? As Teddy and Victoria enter into a contract marriage, genuine feelings arise. Now they must choose to live by their agreement or forsake it.

title: Fated to the Alpha
synopsis: In Fated to the Alpha Movie, Katya was yet to get her wolf. She's a unique wolf known as the Luna healer. The only wolf capable of healing her bully, her pack’s Alpha’s daughter. To escape the threats that come with her title, Katya flees to the Black Creek pack. There, she met Alpha Ezra, her fated wolf and protector.

title: The Call Boy I Met in Paris
synopsis: Sophie met Justin seven years ago, but she doesn't remember who he is. As fate would have it, they reunite seven years later after a one night stand. She mistakens him for a callboy and asks him to fake marry her, but little does she know... he's a billionaire!

title: Taming My Bullies
synopsis: Emma Parker is a new transfer to Maple Elite Academy - and she's picked a fight with The Big Four, on her very first day! Four rich heirs who rule the academy, they've decided she's public enemy number one! But maybe there's more than meets the eye. Rowan Calloway acts like a tyrant, but is he really a ruthless bully? And August Langford keeps helping her out. Have they met before? Who's Emma going to choose - her worst enemy, or her childhood friend?

title: The Alpha King and His Virgin Bride
synopsis: In The Alpha King and His Virgin Bride movie, the Alpha King Killian Storm is cursed to not live past age thirty. Only finding his true fated mate can break the curse, but what happens when his fated mate is a human? Humans cannot mate with Alphas. If he mates with her, she dies, but if he doesn't... he dies.

title: Mommy Don't Cry, Daddy is Sorry
synopsis: In Mommy Don't Cry Daddy is Sorry Movie, when his wife Sienna dies in a mental hospital, Wayne is fooled by the cunning Alison into taking home the wrong daughter. Little does he know, his wife is still alive, reborn as her ruthless alter-ego Scarlett and determined to reveal Alison's trecherous schemes and enact vengeance in her daughter's name.

title: Doctor Boss Is My Baby Daddy
synopsis: In Doctor Boss Is My Baby Daddy movie: When med intern Molly has a one-night stand with a stranger, she thinks it’s a one-and-done kind of deal. But a month later, she discovers two shocking truths: she’s pregnant with his baby… and the stranger is her new boss, Dr. Graham Weston. As soon as Molly’s secret comes out, so do her rivals, including her jealous family and a figure from Graham's past, each determined to keep her and Graham apart. With pressure mounting from all sides, can they survive the chaos and find love in the process?

title: How to Dump a Hockey Star
synopsis: In How to Dump a Hockey Star movie: After leaving behind her life as a billionaire heiress, Renee dedicates herself to helping her husband recover from a vegetative state and pursue his NHL dreams. However, after suffering a devastating miscarriage, she is faced with a brutal truth: the man she sacrificed everything for might have chosen someone else.

title: Do Not Disturb: Lady Boss in Disguise!
synopsis: To become the heiress of her family hotel chain, Violet Trenton goes undercover as a cleaning lady and takes out the troublemakers one by one. Will she succeed and save the hotel? And is her sexy new COO Kasey Johnson just a powerful ally, or something more?

title: Never Divorce a Secret Billionaire Heiress
synopsis: In Never Divorce A Secret Billionaire Heiress movie, Joyce has been a walking blood bank for her sister, Selena. It was the price she had to pay for forcing Tristan into marrying her. Joyce realized herself when she lost her baby and got no support or care from her husband. Now, the heiress wants a divorce.

title: Undercover Prison King
synopsis: In Undercover Prison King movie, when ex-soldier Troy Poe inherits a corrupt private prison, he decides to go in undercover as an inmate to expose those responsible. But when the head guard, a man who he trusted, turns out to be the leader of the crime ring , Troy must find a way to convince the officials that he is not a prisoner, but in fact, the owner of the prison... or break out. All the while, he must protect those in danger, including a weak old prisoner whose sentence has been falsely extended, and a beautiful doctor who's caught in the crossfire. Will Troy find a way to escape? Or will he become just another casualty of his own prison?

title: The Luna's Second Choice
synopsis: Ten years ago, Elara was adopted by the Alpha of the Stormfang Pack and was destined to choose one of his five sons as her mate. However, the five brothers fall for a manipulative omega maid named Jenny, who schemes to humiliate and torment Elara. Heartbroken and exhausted, Elara publicly rejects her mate bond with the five brothers on her eighteenth birthday and announces her engagement to the mysterious and powerful Lycan Prince, Xavier Lockhart. As the brothers finally uncover Jenny's deception and desperately try to win Elara back, they realize it is too late. Elara finds her true mate in Xavier, breaking his deadly curse, and moves on to a new life, leaving her painful past behind.

title: Dear Husband, Delete My Number!
synopsis: Emma got into a car accident and when she tried to reach her husband, Elijah, he ignored her to be with his wanna-be girlfriend, Stella. She gave up on their marriage after finding out that Stella might be having Elijah's baby. She divorced him without taking a penny from him. This baffled Elijah because he thought she was a gold-digger.

title: In the Palm of His Hand
synopsis: In In the Palm of His Hand movie, College senior Shelby Yates accidentally saves the life of billionaire ex-mafia CEO Matteo Franconi. He immediately falls in love with her and pressures her to marry him. Is he as dangerous and cruel as he seems? Or is there a soul inside the man worthy of her love?

title: The Billionaire’s Baby Bargain
synopsis: In The Billionaire’s Baby Bargain movie, to save her dying sister, Abby, Amelia agrees to a contract marriage that will involve no sex, no love, and a baby by insemination. The arrangement was instigated by Nathan, a billionaire struggling to regain his position as CEO by fulfilling his father's wish. As they navigate their false marriage, unexpected feelings develop. This may complicate their business deal.

title: Falling for My Ex's Mafia Dad
synopsis: In Falling for My Ex's Mafia Dad movie, Fay Alden catches her boyfriend Daniel cheating and breaks up with him. But soon after, Fay meets Daniel's father Kent Lippert, the Mafia King. Kent not only reveals that Fay's real father is Mafia don Lorenzo Alden, but presents Fay with a proposition: marry his son to join the bloodlines, and he'll protect her family from a violent criminal. Fay agrees, and Daniel is all too happy to marry Fay to distract his dad and the mob world from the truth: he's gay. Fay struggles to fit in in the mob world, and can't deny her growing attraction to Daniel's father Kent. Soon, their relationship crosses into a passionate secret BDSM love affair. Don Alden is not who he seems, and is intent on using Fay as a bargaining chip to secure a better alliance with Russian syndicate leader, Ivan Kozlov. Fay and Ivan strike up an unlikely flirtation that erodes her fake engagement to Daniel. Fay's learns all too late that not only are her father and Ivan working together to destroy Kent, but Ivan is an undercover cop hellbent on taking Kent down and taking Fay for himself. Ivan and Don Alden's double cross lands Kent in jail, and after Fay discovers she's pregnant with Kent's baby, she decides she has to do whatever possible to free the father of her unborn child. With Daniel's help, she takes out Don Alden, and pressures Ivan into clearing Kent's name. Fay and Kent are reunited, marry, and live happily ever after.

title: If Loving You is a Sin, then I'll Go to Hell
synopsis:
In If Loving You is a Sin then I'll Go to Hell movie, Ellie Jones has been a good girl her whole life, that is until she loses her virginity to bad boy Asher King at her first high school party. The two fall for each other and she gets pregnant. However Ellie's father, the Pastor, and Asher's family, The Red Snakes Gang, wants to keep them apart and take away their baby. Now he has vowed to protect her, no matter the cost.
Episode List

title: Was the Heiress Switched at Birth?
synopsis: In Was the Heiress Switched at Birth movie, on the same day, two best friends give birth. But Edith, born into poverty, secretly swaps her baby with her CEO friend’s—hoping to give her daughter a life of luxury. What she doesn’t expect is that the CEO sees everything and quietly switches the babies back. Eighteen years later, just as Edith’s plan is about to succeed, she discovers the shocking truth: the daughter she’s mistreating all these years is her own.

title: Mic Drop Diva
synopsis: Ivy is a high-school sophomore with the voice of an angel. She's also a super wealthy heiress, but she hides her identity in the hopes of making real friends at school. After becoming besties with Vanessa, she thinks she's made the right choice. But, Vanessa actually treats Ivy like a total tool! Vanessa even guilt-trips Ivy into being her voice double. But, things start to fall apart after Ivy catches her boyfriend cheating on her with her bestie! Heartbroken and betrayed, Ivy seeks help from her childhood bestfriend and star quarterback, Blake. Will Ivy be able to reclaim her spotlight?

title: Fated to Find You
synopsis: At 16, Bailey's foster mother sold her eggs on the black market, leaving her infertile. Years later, working as a school janitor, she saves a little girl from a kidnapping and meets the child’s father, a secret billionaire caught in a brutal custody battle. As their unexpected flash marriage blossoms into real love, secrets, betrayals, and a vengeful ex-wife threaten to tear apart their fragile new family.

title: Big Bad Husband, Please Wake Up!
synopsis: Ciara is slated to get married to Adrian Lewis, who is in a coma in Big Bad Husband Please Wake Up Movie. Ciara is desperate to do so because she needs the money to save her sick family, and she is humiliated by her choice until Adrian wakes up to the surprise of everyone and falls in love with Ciara.

title: I Got Married Without You
synopsis: In I Got Married Without You Movie, Rosalyn was a contract call girl for Andrew. She did it because she loves him not for his money. She was diagnosed with a terminal heart condition that could be cured with a heart transplant. Rosalyn tries to tell Andrew about her condition but he is quick to shock her with the news of his marriage.

title: The Cursed Alpha's Mate
synopsis:
The Cursed Alpha's Mate is based on the novel by Cricket Colson, published by Tapas Entertainment and Radish.

In The Cursed Alpha's Mate movie: Shay Santos is finally ready to lose her virginity, but when she tries to surprise her boyfriend, she finds him cheating on her instead! Heartbroken, she goes out with her BFF and vows to sleep with the first guy who approaches her… Who happens to be powerful Alpha Mal Haywood. Their attraction is instant, animal, and for a human and a werewolf… Forbidden. But that’s not the only problem: Mal’s been cursed, and if doesn’t mark Shay as his mate and impregnate her with his pup, he’ll die!

title: My Secret Lover Is His Brother
synopsis: In My Secret Lover Is His Brother movie, to forgive Piper's family debt, she's promised to marry one of the Bellfort brothers. Will she choose the star lacrosse player Drew? Or the handsome loner Noah? How can she decide when she has a connection with both?

title: Kidnapped by the Devil
synopsis: In Kidnapped by the Devil movie, when a ruthless arms dealer kidnaps a bride after her fiancé fails his test of love in a deadly game of Russian roulette, she finds herself torn between her moral principles and her growing attraction to the dangerous man who will stop at nothing to make her his.

title: Secret Surrogate to the Mafia King
synopsis: In Secret Surrogate to the Mafia King movie, Vanessa Peters is in for a surprise when she goes to sell her eggs to pay off her boyfriend's debt...and ends up pregnant due to a clinical error. She decides to keep the child after finding out her boyfriend is cheating on her, but begins to fear her decision when she finds out that the father is no other than Marcello Lavigne, a ruthless, murderous Mafia King. After saving her life from thugs who try to attack her for having mafia money, Marcello moves Vanessa to his mansion against her will. As he continuously proves his commitment to keeping her safe from criminals, bullies, and his mafia family, Vanessa begins to develop feelings for him despite his player behavior and his murderous capacity. Will she accept Marcello as the father to her child, and accept his offer to become queen of the Mafia empire?

title: The Virgin and The Billionaire
synopsis: The Virgin And The Billionaire Movie is about how female lead Cindy found love under uncanny circumstances where she never thought it existed. Cindy, who was a child born through rape, was demoted to being a maid and a substitute bride in her father’s house until fortune smiled on her and billionaire Charles Kane fell in love with her.

title: True Luna
synopsis: In True Luna movie, Emma is a powerful wolf known as the true Luna. Her kind is rare. When she got her wolf, a warning came along with it. Emma will be in danger soon as the rogue king is after her. Her joy of getting a wolf and finding a mate is torn when her mate rejects her.

title: The CEO's Contract Wife
synopsis: Jasper Tate needed a wife urgently, while Chloe Adams needed money urgently in The CEO’s Contract Wife Movie. Seeking help from the same source leads the two needy people together, and they get married after Madam G recommended them to each other. What was supposed to be a contract agreement morphed into a full-blown love affair that they never expected.

title: Country Gal to CEO's Bride
synopsis: Emma, a self-made, country girl, has escaped a difficult life, and now works in the city. Life takes a turn for Emma, when she misidentifies handsome stranger William and is forced to marry him , unaware, that William is the CEO of Irving Corporation. Both William and Emma hope to get a divorce soon after, but sparks begin to fly when they move in together. To admit their love for each other and save Irving Corporation from falling into the wrong hands, Emma and William must tackle several obstacles and villains standing in the way of their blossoming romance.

title: The Boss Affair
synopsis: Lucy Harris and Luke Walker had an affair, but that was before she found out that he was her boss in The Boss’ Affair Movie. Lucy woke late for her first day at work and had to leave in a hurry. When she arrived at work, she got the shock of her life as she saw who her boss was.

title: Claimed by My Ex's Alpha Brother
synopsis: Ella is wolfless amongst the wolves, but at least she has her mate, Beta Noah Gravens... until she catches him cheating with her rival Ava. Shattered, Ella falls straight into the arms of Noah's brother, Liam Gravens, the newly returned Alpha of the Crescent Pack, who has loved her since childhood and knows she's his fated mate. But with jealous rivals, bitter exes, and two worlds pulling them apart, can Ella and Liam embrace the love they are destined for?

title: Their Brother Lost in Space
synopsis: In Their Brother Lost in Space movie, Timothy, adopted by the wealthy Snyder family, grows up devoted to his three older sisters — until the day their biological son, Matthew, returns and turns them against him with lies and manipulation. Cast out and blamed for things he never did, Timothy still repays their kindness: he saves them, sacrifices for them, and even secretly volunteers for Project Hail Mary, a mission to save humanity by sending one person with a rare gene into find a new planet. Only after he's gone, do the Snyders discover the truth about Matthew's schemes and Timothy's sacrifices. Thirty years later, Timothy succeeds on Planet Artemis, honored as a hero while his grieving family lives with the cost of their betrayal.

title: Runaway Single Mom, Safe in His Arms
synopsis: In Runaway Single Mom Safe in His Arms movie, single mom Maria escapes abuse and fights to protect her daughter, Judy. From factory struggles to elite schools, she faces enemies, family betrayal, and unexpected love. When billionaire Levi enters her life, everything changes...

title: Escorting the Ruthless Billionaire Doctor
synopsis: In Escorting the Ruthless Billionaire Doctor movie, Violet, desperate to pay for her father’s surgery, decides to sell her virginity, but the good doctor she calls is determined to pull her back from the edge. However, as the two share a heated, unforgettable night, Dax finds himself hooked on Violet, despite thinking she’s just another gold-digger. When their darkest secrets are laid bare, will their fragile connection survive?

title: Love Is a Dangerous Dance
synopsis: Hannah, a Farm-raised Ballerina, uses a contract engagement to secure her place in the prestigious Hargrove Ballet Company, but she's interrupted by Jack, a handsome assassin, who coerces her to help him. He's a dangerous obstacle, until Hannah discovers he could actually give her everything. As she finally surrenders, he pulls away... But when they face death together, they realize, life's too short to waste true love.

title: Reborn to Love Mr. Right
synopsis: Arianna dies a tragic death on the day of her graduation, while Derek, the driver's son, takes all the spotlight on stage. She gave him everything—her car, her credit card, even her father’s company—only to be used and discarded. While he spoiled Ivy like a princess, he treated Arianna like a servant. Only in death does she realize that Hayden, the billionaire’s heir - had been waiting for her all along. Now, fate gives her a second chance to make things right.

title: Daddy Help! Mommy’s in Prison!
synopsis: In Daddy Help Mommy’s in Prison movie, when a powerful CEO discovers his daughter and frees his college sweetheart from prison, they must overcome years of resentment and sacrifice to protect their child from those who tore them apart.

title: Money, Guns, and a Merry Christmas
synopsis: Damian, the CEO of the world's most powerful military-industrial group, is mistaken for a poor salesman earning only $3,000 a month. Unexpectedly, he enters into a quick contract marriage with Iris, a company’s boss. Damian accompanies Iris to her hometown for a Christmas dinner, where he faces constant belittlement from her relatives and ridicule from Iris's suitor. Damian continually turns the tables on the antagonists, proving his power and status, and ultimately finds true love with Iris.

title: The Hidden Billionaire in First Class
synopsis: In The Hidden Billionaire in First Class movie, they all thought Jett Hawkings was a lowly baggage handler and threatened to throw him off the flight. But when their plane is about to crash due to a storm, he's actually the secret billionaire that can save them.

title: Surrender to My Professor
synopsis: College student Sylvia Parker finds herself in a dangerous love affair with Lawrence Calhoun, the last man she should want. He's hot, he's harsh -- he's her professor. As Sylvia struggles to survive in a cutthroat campus and toxic family, never has she thought her hero would be the cold, strict and sexy Professor Calhoun. As their connection deepens, a forbidden romance blooms, threatening to destroy everything if discovered.

title: You Belong With Me
synopsis: In You Belong With Me movie, Kristine was betrayed by her boyfriend and best friend. She knew about him cheating on her while riding on her intelligence. Kristine decided to get back at him by sleeping with his rich uncle, Henry. Henry was aware he was being used as Kristine made it clear to him. But what started as revenge changed into genuine feelings.

title: The Billionaire's Virgin Surrogate
synopsis: In The Billionaire's Virgin Surrogate movie, what happens when a student surrogate proposes to her client that they should conceive the baby the natural way?  In the movie The Billionaire's Virgin Surrogate, desperate to save her father, Harper agrees to carry a baby for Will Trenton— a single, mouthwateringly hot billionaire. As their worlds collide and the boundaries blur, Harper finds herself irresistibly drawn to Will. But beneath the surface, a question remain: Is Will feeling the same?

title: The Billionaire Janitor Is Back!
synopsis: Billionaire magnate Jack retired to spend time with his family. He was once CEO of the world's biggest defense contractor, but he's not just a school janitor. His son throws him out of their house to make space for his new baby. Jack saves a young woman from danger. She's so impressed by his heroics she sets him up with her mother Emma, the icy cold headmistress. They start a contract marriage. The school dean keeps trying to overthrow Emma, Jack swooping in to save her from his schemes, even saving the school from bankruptcy! Right when Emma is facing unprecedented challenges, about to be removed from the school board, he steps in with billions of dollars to save her from humiliation. His true identity is finally revealed - he's the richest man in the world!

title: Cooking My Way Back to Love
synopsis: Chef Leon Kennedy, once the "King of Cooking," fell apart after his wife died in a tragic car accident. His deep depression led him to fall into homelessness, losing everything except his beloved dog, Dante. A restaurant owner takes him in, giving him a job, not knowing who he is. Working in the kitchen, he faces the abuse of the executive sous chef (Bryant), who belittles and disrespects him. Leon tries to keep his head down, but when a nefarious businessman (William) threatens the restaurant, Leon has to break out the skills and artistry that made him a legendary chef. The restoration of his glory and joy is shortlived, however, as the spiteful chef Bryant defames him, and the resentful William kills his beloved dog. Enduring ups, downs, and devastation once again, the aggrieved Chef Leon picks up his chef's knife, hungry for revenge.

title: Escorting the Heiress
synopsis: Serena caught her boyfriend, Ken cheating on her with her half-sister, Carol. He had always lied about holding it all in till marriage.  Furious by their actions, Serena gets drunk and ended up in the bed of Jesse. She thought he was her escort but he was a man who has been inlove with her for years.

title: Once Upon A Breakup
synopsis: In Once Upon A Breakup movie, after being abandoned on her birthday by her college boyfriend, Mia impulsively proposes to Carson, the charming but dangerous leader of the Moretti crime family. Though their relationship begins as a rash escape, it quickly turns into something real. But Mia’s ex refuses to let go. Obsessed, jealous, and spiraling out of control, he’ll stop at nothing to win her back, even if it means destroying the new life Mia’s trying to build with Carson. However, Mia isn’t looking back. She's thriving with Carson by her side and ready to show Aiden exactly what he threw away.

title: Pregnant by My Ex's Professor Dad
synopsis: In Pregnant by My Ex's Professor Dad movie: on her first day of the semester, Emily catches her boyfriend cheating on her. That night, she has a wild one-night stand with a stranger named Charles. The next day, they are mutually shocked to find out that Charles is Emily's new professor. They maintain a professional student-teacher relationship, but there's an undeniable tension between them. Just when Emily thinks everything will get back on track, she unexpectedly finds out she's pregnant...

title: Ex-Husband Roll Out of My Life
synopsis: In Ex-Husband Roll Out of My Life movie, Trina, a housewife betrayed by her husband and humiliated by her entire family, finally finds the strength to leave a loveless home. Thus begins her countdown to freedom.

title: The Return of the Lost Heiress
synopsis: In The Return of the Lost Heiress movie, Lana experienced her father's death. This made her never speak again. She became a mute. A few days later, she was lost while escaping being sold by her guard. Lana was found and adopted by Ron who showered her with fatherly love. Years passed and her birth family kept searching for her. Unaware of Lana's identity, they mistreated her.

title: Queen Never Cry
synopsis: In Queen Never Cry movie: 7 years ago, Nicole leaves her family fortune behind for her husband Ethan. She thought she's the happiest wife and mother -- until Ethan and her best friend Elaine sent her to jail and took her daughter away. Now seeing their true color, Nicole decides to regain her heiress status, take back her daughter and show everyone what a real queen looks like.

title: Maid for My Nemesis
synopsis: Conscientious class president Emma is keeping a big secret: She's the poorest girl at her wealthy private school. When her rival, uber rich bad boy Lucas Bennett gets her fired from the part time job that's paying her father's medical bills, he makes it up to her — by hiring her to be his personal maid! Lucas agrees to keep their arrangement a secret... as long as Emma caters to his every need.

title: Mistaken as His Mate: The Luna’s Regret
synopsis: In Mistaken as His Mate The Luna’s Regret movie, Alpha Caspian’s pregnant sister Marina arrives for his Luna’s coronation, but Luna Willow mistakes her for a rogue mistress. In a jealous rage, Willow bullies Marina, causing her miscarriage. Now the Brooks siblings want blood.

title: Kissed by Claw and Fang
synopsis:
In Kissed by Claw and Fang movie, Ivy, a human teenage girl, suddenly finds herself homeless after her family goes bankrupt. She's forced to live in her car-- a shameful secret she needs to hide from the vicious bullies at her elite private highschool. One day, she discovers that she's the mate of both Sebasian, the werewolf heir, and Zane, the vampire prince. These two supernaturally handsome boys have opposite personalities: one as passionate as fire, and the latter as cold as ice. Which one is her true love?  
Ivy later discovers that there's more to her real identity than she thought. It's a secret that could destroy everything.

title: Dear Brother, You Loved Me Too Late
synopsis: For sixteen years, Angelica has lived with a guilt she never deserved — her mother died giving birth to her. Neglected by her father, Martin, and despised by her brother, Christopher, she holds on to the only warmth he ever showed her. But when their cousin Madison moves in, even Christopher turns on her, wishing she were the one who had died. And in a way, he gets his wish when Angelica is diagnosed with cancer. But after her death, it’s Christopher’s world that begins to fall apart.

title: You Fired A Tech Genius
synopsis: After Erik, the biggest tech hotshot in all of Silicon Valley, gets sacked by his CEO's son William, he joins forces with Evelyn, the beautiful CEO of his old company's competitor. This causes his former employer to go bankrupt, and when William realizes he's fired the wrong guy, it's already too late...

title: The Billionaire Married a Homeless Girl
synopsis: In The Billionaire Married a Homeless Girl movie, after a one-night-stand, Adele Moore becomes pregnant. She wants to keep the child, but her father kicks her out of the house. With nowhere else to go, Adele becomes homeless.  She tries her best to raise her son despite her challenging circumstances. One day, Adele's son, Brad Moore, runs into billionaire Heston Deleon.  By chance, Heston discovers that Brad is his son. He tries to track down Brad, but loses their trail. Through a series of misunderstandings, Adele and Heston become entangled again!

title: Accidental Surrogate for Alpha
synopsis: In Accidental Surrogate for Alpha movie, Ella is a Luna werewolf kept hidden by her parents from everyone including herself. Without knowing this, Ella has always hated wolves. What she desired was motherhood. Her boyfriend has prevented that by drugging her. When Ella found out, she went for insemination but accidentally the sperm of an alpha wolf was placed in her.

title: Submitting to My Ex's Dad
synopsis: In Submitting to My Ex's Dad movie, after catching her fiancé cheating with her best friend just before their wedding, Flora runs away and has a wild one-night stand with a handsome stranger. Little does she know he's her ex-fiancé's father, and he has a dark secret. Will she surrender to the heat—or is it time to run again?

title: The Beggar King Returns
synopsis: Wall Street tycoon Ryan Chase is poisoned and pushed overboard by his fiancée, Mia, during a lavish yacht party. He miraculously survives—but loses his voice, his identity, and everything he once had. Left with nothing, Ryan is rescued by a kind mute woman named Sophia, who brings him back to her family's small restaurant and offers him a job. Despite constant abuse from Sophia’s spiteful stepmother Diane, Ryan and Sophia grow close and eventually fall in love. When Sophia’s father, James, falls critically ill, Ryan steps up to help the family. Meanwhile, Mia forges a marriage certificate in an attempt to steal Ryan’s multi-billion-dollar empire. Ryan’s loyal assistant, Thomas, risks everything to protect what’s left. When Diane discovers Ryan’s true identity and still refuses to help James, Ryan finally reaches out to Thomas—ready to return to the battlefield and take back everything that was his.

title: Djinn Under Contract
synopsis: In Djinn Under Contract Movie, Eli Baran is a genie in a magic lamp who can grant three wishes. After thousands of years, a billionaire uses his last wish to grant Eli freedom– but on one condition:  Eli must marry his granddaughter, Christine Parrish, for five years! To fulfill the wish, Eli transforms into a human, marries Christine, and secretly helps her become a successful CEO. However, Christine  ignores and constantly belittles him during their marriage. When the five years are almost up, Eli starts to realize that Christine might never truly love him. Then, when Christine's old flame reenters the picture, Eli's heart is completely shattered. Now, Eli is faced with a tough decision– should he stay by Christine's side once the final wish is granted, or is it time to for him to divorce Christine and finally live his own life?

title: Claimed by the Alpha I Hate
synopsis: All her life, Daisy Storm never knew what was wrong with her. Why couldn't she shift? Why didn't she have a wolf? Even though she was hated by her entire pack, Daisy thought at least she had her mate, the Alpha... until he cheats on her and breaks their mate bond on her eighteenth birthday, making her biggest bully into the new Luna. She ran away from home in tears, but just six months later her mother mysteriously dies, and she's ordered to return by the new Alpha in charge - the one she blames for her mom's death - Nolan Fenrir. She swears that she'll never forgive him for all he's done, and yet... Daisy feels this unnatural pull to Alpha Nolan, and despite his harsh surface somehow he feels the same. She can't have ANOTHER mate bond, could she? With the man she hates the most?!

title: The Vampire Prince's Bride
synopsis: In The Vampire Prince's Bride movie, Scarlett was a lonely orphan, living in the streets when the Vampire Lord Sean saved her. Moved to pity, Sean took her home as his Thrall and lover, swearing a Blood Oath and promising to keep her safe. Their happy, loving days came to an end when the sexy, dangerous human girl Chelsea swooped in, seducing Sean away. Not only did Sean Turn Chelsea into a vampire, he let Chelsea drink from Scarlett as well. Obsessed with his new lover, Sean missed the night of their Blood Oath, leaving Scarlett to die. Humiliated and hurt, Scarlett finally chooses to live for herself, risking her life to leave Sean behind and sever their bond as Thrall and Master. As her life hangs in the balance, Vampire Prince Alder suddenly appears to save her. Grateful and intimidated by his kindness, Scarlett doesn't realize her new prince charming is someone she's helped before.

title: Your Husband Is Mine
synopsis: Driven to despair after losing both her husband and baby, Vivienne only lives for one thing - REVENGE! But simple murder doesn't torture enough. Why not steal her husband and make her watch!

title: Trapped in the Boss's Embrace
synopsis: Lovestruck, Beatrice Lawson eloped with her college sweetheart Desmond Belmont and has been secretly married to him for ten years. However, when she discovers his affair with a wealthy socialite, Beatrice decides to divorce him and finally stop living in his shadow. As she begins to make a name for herself with a new apartment and new career, she meets the mysterious and attractive Damian Crowley. As the two men fight for her attention, Beatrice wonders if love is worth all the pain and sacrifice, or if she's better off fending for herself.

title: The Tutor Trap
synopsis: School hockey star Brady asks brainy wallflower Harper to be his chemistry tutor. In exchange, he promises to be her fake boyfriend, teach her how to flirt — and help her land her crush. But what will happen when their contract backfires, and the chemistry becomes more than just on paper?

title: Kiss Me One Last Time
synopsis: In Kiss Me One Last Time full movie, Adeline has cancer. A few months to live and she'll be dead. The one thing she needed was her husband, Blake's love. She couldn't get it as he never saw her as his wife rather as a blood bank for her step-sister. Adeline's condition worsened and donating blood wasn't helping. Soon, Blake finds out about her condition and regrets.

title: Goodbye, My CEO
synopsis: Sophie McKenzie runs straight into the arms of James Knight after she was being pursued by a gang. James Knight takes her in according to Goodbye, My CEO Movie, and offers her protection but that came with a price. However, Sophie wants to break free from this bond, but she finds herself stuck as James Knight refuses to let go.

title: Obsessed with His Silent Bride
synopsis: In Obsessed with His Silent Bride movie, Taken in as a ward of the Calvert family, Eva has always loved Declan Calvert, the boy who grew up as her protector. Nonverbal since birth, she struggles to express her feelings in a marriage built on duty—Declan only married her to honor his grandfather’s dying wish. Trapped in a toxic union, Eva endures Declan’s cruelty and his mistress Selene’s relentless schemes to drive her out. Despite it all, Eva clings to the hope that Declan might rediscover the love they once shared as children. Bound by silence, Eva must decide: fight for his heart or break free before it’s too late.

title: I'm In Love With My Brother's Best Friend?!
synopsis:
I'm In Love With My Brother's Best Friend?! is based on the novel published by Tapas Entertainment, Inc.

In I'm In Love With My Brother's Best Friend movie: when Kaitlyn Sinclair moves into her off campus apartment with her high school sweetheart for her freshman year of college, she immediately catches him cheating on her. She is forced to move into her brother’s apartment and share a space with his best friend who is in grad school on the same campus. When her childhood crush reignites, Kaitlyn and Cole must navigate their newfound adult relationship while evil exes, mean girls, and worst of all- Kaitlyn’s brother, try to tear them apart.

title: Breathe
synopsis: In Breathe movie, Sadie White takes her mom’s housekeeping job at the Stone family beachside mansion and accidentally saves global pop star Jax Stone from a mob of fans. Their worlds collide through forbidden chemistry, steamy tension, and explosive jealousy as Sadie is swept into Jax’s glamorous — and dangerous — life. But fame, sabotage, viral scandals, and heartbreak threaten to tear them apart. As Sadie discovers who she is outside of the chaos, she and Jax must decide whether love can survive the glare of the spotlight.

title: I Accidentally Sexted My Enemy
synopsis: Evelyn, an ordinary high school student, is publicly humiliated after her crush on a popular hockey player is exposed. Devastated, she musters up the courage to send him nudes anonymously in hopes of catching his eye. But she accidentally sends the pics to Colton instead, the captain of the hockey team who always teases her. What will happen between them?

title: She's Not Homeless, She's Healer Goddess!
synopsis: In She's Not Homeless She's Healer Goddess movie, Everyone accuses Trixie of being a gold-digging prostitute because of her hobo clothes. Little do they realize that she's the ONLY ONE who can cure the hottest and richest man in the nation - war hero, Lysander Armstrong! (And win his heart too)

title: 30 Days Till I Marry My Husband's Nemesis
synopsis: In the future, Blair will be murdered by her husband, Jack. She was given a second chance to go back to the past and fix her life. To avoid marrying Jack again and getting killed, Blair married his nemesis and her enemy, Nathan. Will this be enough to prevent her death?

title: Pregnant and Spoiled by the Billionaire
synopsis: In Pregnant and Spoiled by the Billionaire movie, Amelia is a hard-working Junior in College. In order to pay rent, she needs to find work. Her roommate got her a job at a local bar, but her first night on the job took a dark and twisted turn. Her roomate drugged her and pimped her out to a customer for the night. But at a critical moment in the night, Leo saved Amelia from being trafficked. After a night of passion, Amelia became pregnant with Leo's baby, but Leo thinks she's a gold digger. Where will she go? What will she do?

title: Dominated by My Dad's Boss
synopsis:
Based on the novel by Havley McQueen, published by Tapas Entertainment and Radish.
When Jayne Turner asks a stranger at a bondage party to teach her how to be a dominatrix, she has no idea he’ll turn out to be the man overseeing her father’s exit from the family company. What’s meant to be a single night of education about dominance and submission turns into something more when Jayne asks Dom to continue teaching her. Because of a morality clause in his contract, a relationship with her could mean his job if anyone finds out, but Dom agrees. They must keep their relationship strictly educational and entirely undercover, but as their passion grows, so does the risk of discovery. Jayne’s success on the movie set is thanks to Dom’s “instruction,” but as she begins receiving increasingly more threatening messages tying her to her deceased mother, famous actress Ingrid Hart, it's up to Dom to protect what he owns. With multiple enemies possibly behind the threats, Jayne isn’t sure who to blame. It turns out to be the gaffer on set, a man who’d worked with and been obsessed with Ingrid. Doug kidnaps Jayne but her quick thinking has Dom on the way to rescue her – which reveals their relationship and triggers the morality clause. Dom makes a deal with Jayne’s dad without her knowledge. Dad will back off trying to stop Jayne’s movie career, and Dom will return to London, never to see her again. The night of Jayne’s movie premiere, Dad reveals the truth and Jayne reaches out to the man she’s fallen in love with. At her message, Dom returns to beg forgiveness for leaving her. Jayne forgives them, and they can be together openly.

title: Super Godfather: My Ex Begs Me on Her Knees
synopsis: Cain Hunter is a broken man after his wife betrays him and ruins him financially. Just as all hope is lost, Cain is suddenly brought to the mysterious Don Ludwig, who makes him an offer: pass his tests, and Cain will succeed him as the new Godfather of Bourne Syndicate.

title: Heiress Crash Lands on Her Husband
synopsis: In a marathon of trumping identities, Lily must own her cheating ex, his mistress, their moms, her new royal suitor, the women after her true love, and finally, the dominant mother-in-law! Can Lily win them all?

title: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together
synopsis: In We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together movie, Lisa's contract marriage with Aidan ended without notice. She was agitated that he never valued her as much as she valued him. When they crossed paths again, she took her chance with him leaving an ill note on his chest. Lisa didn't know she would be seeing Aidan again, this time, as her boss.

title: Pucked in the Friend Zone
synopsis: In Pucked in the Friend Zone movie, when Reese unexpectedly reunites with her ex-best friend and first love Grayson four years after he broke her heart, she agrees to pose as his fake girlfriend for his sister's wedding. But as old feelings threaten to bubble out, Reese must decide if a chance at true love is worth the risk of repeating history.

title: Mr Hills' Adorable Wife
synopsis: Valerie Patterson almost lost out a luxurious life with a billionaire lover after the Patterson family nearly succeeded in exchanging her with her sister, Daphne, in Mr. Hills’ Adorable Wife Movie. Born with a birthmark which her mother considered ugly; Valerie was ignored by her family until Andrew Hills fell in love with her after a sexual encounter with her.

title: My Firefighter Ex-Husband Burns in Regret
synopsis: My Firefighter Ex-Husband Burns in Regret tells a story that following the tragic death of their daughter Alyssa in a youth center collapse, Hazel seeks justice and revenge on her firefighter husband Jace, who chose to save his ex-lover Candace and her daughter, Kimberly, instead. Consumed by grief and rage, Hazel holds Jace and Candace responsible for Alyssa's death. As she navigates her sorrow, Hazel transforms her pain into a drive for charity, establishing a foundation to help children. Burdened by guilt, Jace tries to make amends for his decisions, leading to his self-imposed exile. Ultimately, Hazel moves on, finds new love, and leaves Jace to face the consequences of his actions.

title: Secret Boss of the Five Keys
synopsis: In Secret Boss of the Five Keys movie, Grayson Rodgers is a gardener with a secret: Over the last five years, he's taken out the five heads of the Five Nation Syndicate, and taken their Gold Keys: The symbols of their authority, but also the keys to the vault that acts as a bank for their entire fortunes. He's now ready to stop, and give his wife a life of luxury and peace. But before he can reveal himself to her, he discovers her sleeping with a high ranking syndicate general, Ivan. Ivan wants Grayson to use his clearance as a gardner to help him break into the Golden Key Vault. Now Grayson must find a way to prove to everyone that he's the true leader, while catching Ivan in the act... all the while being thought of a just a gardener.

title: Daddy I'm Your Lucky Star!
synopsis: Lila is five when her uncle Harold and aunt Karen abandon her. Jonathan, a kind billionaire, finds her and takes her home. He adopts her, and from that day, the house feels brighter. Lila brings luck and warmth. Noah, Jonathan’s son, has not spoken for a long time; with Lila by his side, he finally finds his voice. At an auction, she helps Jonathan win a hidden treasure chest. She even “talks” with the family dog and follows the hint to help Noah find his missing violin. When danger rises, Lila “forces” Harold and the schemer Vivienne to tell the truth. The lies fall apart. She helps the family get out of harm’s way, exposes the schemes, and leaves Harold, Karen, and Vivienne with nowhere to hide.

title: Never Reject A Wolf Princess
synopsis: In Never Reject A Wolf Princess movie: Lia was born a princess, but all she really wants is a life of her own. So she chooses love over duty—only to be betrayed and rejected by her mate. But she’s not one to stay broken for long. When she unexpectedly bonds with a new mate hiding his own secrets, Lia is thrust into a world of power, deception, and second chances. Now, she’s done following the rules. It’s time to reclaim her throne—and make everyone who doubted her regret it!

title: Taming the Lion: Billionaire on Bikes
synopsis:
Taming the Lion: Billionaire on Bikes summary is all about Leo Striker, a sexy biker who saves Kara when being harassed by her ex-boyfriend.
Kara falls for Leo as he helps her learn how to protect herself.
However, Leo is a dominant who wants Kara. Can Kara enjoy being submissive?
Kara and Leo's romance is steamy, the biker gang trope is refreshing.

title: The Lost Son Returns as the Duke
synopsis: In The Lost Son Returns as the Duke movie: Kidnapped as a child, Arthur, Duke of Mercia, returns to his village to reunite with his long-lost family. What he didn't expect was to find them abused by everyone in town. With his identity a secret, will Arthur be able to avenge them?

title: I Love You More Than Life
synopsis: In I Love You More Than Life movie, during Eric and Grace's wedding anniversary party, Grace's stepsister Amanda suddenly appears and demands that Grace give Eric back to her, shocking everyone at the party. Amanda devises a way to purposely make Grace fall, which causes Grace to have a miscarriage. Instead of looking after Grace, her husband instead leaves with Amanda in his arms. This is Grace's cold awakening. She finally decides to divorce Eric.

title: The Words
synopsis: In The Words movie, based on the novel by Ashley Jade. 4 years ago, rocker bad-boy Phoenix broke nerdy good-girl Lennon's heart and stole her song to escape his abusive father. Now he's a famous rockstar, spiraling into drugs and alcohol, she's hired to keep him sober for 8 weeks on tour. Can Lennon and Phoenix heal old wounds, or will their past stand in the way of their second chance at love?

title: Swapped My Ex for His Billionaire Uncle
synopsis: There was a time when Nina believed her happiest moment would be walking down the aisle with Evan, her college sweetheart. But betrayal shattered that dream, teaching her that true love and forever were rare illusions. After their divorce, she vowed never to give her heart away again. Then Damon—Evan’s youngest uncle—stormed into her life, refusing to let her run. She tries to keep her distance, not wanting ties with her ex’s family, but Damon’s relentless pursuit leaves her breathless.

title: The Billionaire's Accidental Bride
synopsis: Claire Duval and Christian Cross get married by chance. The Billionaire’s Accidental Bride Movie has it that Claire was glad to have gotten engaged with Dylan Maxwell until he stood her up and she found out that he was cheating on her with her friend, Ava. Claire secretly got married to Christian at the spot as they were both stranded.

title: Stop! That Homeless Man Is an American Hero!
synopsis: In Stop That Homeless Man Is an American Hero movie, Ethan escorts his fallen comrade's ashes back home. On the way, he gets stopped by the local Sheriff who accuses Ethan of being a homeless vagrant. Ethan gets dragged in for questioning at the police station. They humiliate and torture him, but Ethan endures because he must protect his friend's ashes.  But then, the sheriff goes too far. He desecrates the ashes! Just when things are about to take a turn for the worse, Ethan's old army subordinate– now the Director of the FBI– appears! Will Ethan's true identity as an American hero finally be revealed?

title: Accidental Triplets with the Billionaire
synopsis: In Accidental Triplets with the Billionaire movie, urgently needing an heir to secure his position in the company, Oscar turns to surrogacy. But unexpectedly, his sperm is accidentally injected into Phoebe, who comes in for a gynecological exam. To ensure Phoebe keeps the baby, Oscar proposes a contract marriage, and the two embark on a journey filled with tests...

title: The Daughter of Zeus
synopsis: After witnessing her mother's murder at the hands of gods, Aria believes one thing: gods are heartless. One day she kills a mysterious golden lamb to feed her starving family—unaware that it's a sacred creature of Olympus. She comes face-to-face with her mother's killer, the Immortal Champion of Olympus - Kairos, who brings her back to Olympus to face justice. Through her journey, she learns of her real identity, the strength that she holds, and the heartbreaking truth behind Kairos' violent history. Together, they face danger, overcome trauma, and learn to accept their Fates that bind them together for eternity.

title: Queen Mom Rules
synopsis: At her parents' anniversary party, a successful CEO is dismissed as a low-class nobody, her diamond gift called fake, and she's even banned from the table!

title: When Love Walked Away
synopsis: Adrian leaves his own daughter Esther in a car while he hangs out with his childhood sweetheart, Stacy and her son Lucas. Under the hot summer sun, the car overheats and shuts down. The A/C stops working and Esther starts to overheat. She's at risk of heatstroke and almost faints. Esther dials Adrian's phone to ask for help. Without listening to her, Adrian hangs up. Just before Esther's tablet runs out of battery, she calls her mother. She begs her mom to save her. However, before Esther can tell Claire her location, the tablet dies. Claire starts to desperately search for her daughter. Will Claire be able to successfully find and save her daughter before the unthinkable happens?

title: The Virgin's Bucket List
synopsis: High school student Lindsay's life takes a dramatic turn when Wayne Adams, a star football player recruited by her dad, Mike, the school’s football coach, moves into her home. Their initial encounter is tense, but Lindsay must suppress her feelings due to Mike's warnings. Determined to find a boyfriend before graduation, Lindsay's attempts often end in awkward situations with unreliable guys. However, Wayne is always there to help when she’s in trouble. As their bond deepens, they start a secret relationship. Meanwhile, bullying at school escalates, prompting Lindsay to take a stand for her peers. Her efforts earn the support and respect of the school community. In the end, Lindsay and Wayne are crowned Prom King and Queen, and Mike finally approves of their relationship.

title: Open Your Eyes, My Billionaire Husband
synopsis: Hailey is cash-strapped and desperate for a way to pay her mother's heafty medical bills. Her family agrees to help her, on the condition she marries the billionaire Samuel Trent, whom is in a coma after a near-fatal car accident. However, it wouldn't be long before the infamous Samuel Trent would wake up from his coma and discover he's engaged to a complete stranger.

title: In Love with Dr. Baby Daddy!
synopsis: Spencer dumped Jade for a brainy girlfriend. She felt betrayed. They have been together for so long, why now? Infuriated by Spencer's choice, Jade hooks up with a stranger she met at the hospital. Soon, she'll find out that her strange man is her boss and ex-boyfriend's father. She'll also find out that she's pregnant for him.

title: Oh No! I Slept with My Husband!
synopsis: Beth Nelson mistakenly ends up with her husband in Oh No! I Slept With My Husband Movie. After getting married to a man who did not even spare her a glance during marriage, Beth faces her ungrateful father and stepmother who insist on her asking her estranged husband for more money to give them. Beth becomes angry, desperate and drunk.

title: The Hacker Heiress Strikes Back
synopsis: In The Hacker Heiress Strikes Back movie, in a previous life, heiress Emily was a genius in the hacker field. In a global competition, fake heiress Olivia accuses Emily of plagiarism, which totally destroys her reputation. Her family believes these false accusations and kicks Emily out of the house. In the end, she’s killed by fake heiress Olivia. In her second life, not only does Emily cut off her ties with her blind to the truth family, but she also gives Fake Heiress Olivia who was falsely accusing her of plagiarism a slap in the face.

title: Scandalous
synopsis: When young and fiery Eddie is forced to work for and spy on her father’s ruthless rival Trent RexRoth, their hatred sparks into a forbidden desire - an age gap love that could ruin them both.

title: Watch Out! She's a Mastermind Heiress
synopsis: In Watch Out She's a Mastermind Heiress movie, after growing up in the countryside, 21-year-old Isabella Patton is sent back to her wealthy birth family. Before long, she becomes acquainted with the smoldering (and much older) Oliver Bates, who begins to relentlessly pursue her, oblivious to the fact that she is his fiancée. Meanwhile, Isabella's cousin Eliza, who was raised by the Patton family in her place, is on a desperate mission to turn the whole family against her for good. Unluckily for Eliza, Isabella is a hotshot genius with unparalleled talent in the medical and tech fields, and is able to outduel Eliza at every turn. As Isabella's unique skills are revealed, she wins the support of her five brothers and parents, becoming the crown jewel of the Patton family while always remaining just out of Oliver's grasp.

title: The Cursed Alpha's Mute Bride
synopsis: In The Cursed Alpha's Mute Bride movie, cursed mute Wren believes no one will ever love her— until she meets Alpha Hunter Silver, who says they’re mates! But Hunter is cursed, too… Can they find love together and break their curses?

title: Spoiled by the Daddy CEO During Pregnancy
synopsis: Dawn’s fling with a stranger just got a billion-dollar twist: surprise pregnancy, and the baby daddy is none other than billionaire heartthrob Isaac Stanton! You’d think Dawn’s hit the jackpot… except why is she running away?!

title: Countdown to Life: Rescue at 30,000 Feet
synopsis: America’s top billionaire, Derek Wolf, is dying and hires elite surgeon Shaun to bring a donor kidney by plane for a secret transplant. But the flight is delayed when Kim — mother of Jessica, who’s engaged to Derek’s grandson Erik — goes to the bathroom. When Shaun urges them to hurry, Jessica humiliates him. After takeoff, Kim suffers a heart attack, and Shaun saves her, breaking her ribs in the process. Ungrateful, Jessica demands Shaun apologize in a humiliating way. When he refuses, she threatens to destroy the kidney. Forced to reveal Derek’s condition, Shaun pleads, but Jessica doesn’t believe him — until she smashes the case and sees the name on it: Derek Wolf, her own fiancé’s grandfather.

title: The Billionaire's Masquerade
synopsis: In The Billionaire's Masquerade Movie, after Shelby's father died, he passed on his inheritance to her with unfavorable conditions. She must get married to claim her inheritance. To claim it, she marries a poor stranger, Griffin. She didn't know that Griffin wasn't a poor man as she had thought. He's a billionaire who had admired Shelby from their last encounter, three years ago.

title: The Cooking Queen: A Recipe for Divorce
synopsis: In The Cooking Queen A Recipe for Divorce movie, Tiffany, once the legendary “Queen of Cuisine,” gave up her fame to support her husband Barry. But Barry betrays her, siding with his mistress Sera and treating Tiffany as if she's worthless. Heartbroken, Tiffany wanders aimlessly until fate leads her to Claude’s small restaurant. There, her hidden talent is reignited, and she dazzles her critics with her culinary prowess. Then, she crosses paths with Barry once again.

title: Bound by Vendetta: Sleeping with the Enemy
synopsis: In Bound by Vendetta: Sleeping with the Enemy movie, on her birthday, Daiana's father was killed. She's yet to find out who the killer is but she has a suspect. Daiana is torn between love and vengeance as her suspect turns out to be her lover. Daiana must decide whether to avenge her parent's death or forgive her lover.

title: Runaway Bride, Baby on Board
synopsis: In Runaway Bride Baby on Board movie, after being drugged, powerful CEO Eason spends the night with Chloe, unaware of her identity. When they cross paths again, Eason—failing to recognize Chloe—hires her as his secretary. While working for him, Chloe discovers she’s pregnant with his child. Just as she grapples with this revelation, Eason, desperate to save his grandmother, agrees to marry Maura, shattering Chloe’s heart. Refusing to reveal the father’s identity, Chloe deepens the rift between them. But the situation turns even darker when Maura, determined to keep Chloe away from Eason, kills Chloe’s mother and threatens her to stay away.

title: Blood & Silver: Rise of the Alpha's Rejected Mate
synopsis: In Blood & Silver: Rise of the Alpha's Rejected Mate movie, after a devastating betrayal that decimates two powerful wolf packs, young Ann Reed is forced into a mating bond with Alpha Dane Montague—her enemy, her savior, and the man who believes she’s responsible for his family's death. For three years, Dane torments her, determined never to love her. But when he finally claims her body and then shoves her aside, Ann shatters. She cuts their magical soul-bond and disappears—leaving behind only a severed ribbon, a credit card, and a secret she hasn’t even discovered yet. Years later, she returns not as Ann Reed, but as Aurora Moon, heir to a royal European pack, cloaked in wealth, power, and secrets. Her mission is clear: protect her children, reclaim her power, and avoid Dane at all costs. But when she walks back into his world, she triggers the one thing she feared most: his attention. As Dane fights the pull toward the mate he thought he hated, dark forces stir, old enemies rise, and the truth about the past—and their bond—is about to explode. Because Aurora didn’t come back to be claimed. She came back to conquer.

title: The Woman Starts The War
synopsis: In The Woman Starts The War movie, when nurse Cindy gets caught in a deadly mafia shootout, ruthless crime boss Allan D'Angelo saves her life by declaring she's his fiancée. Now she's a prisoner in his world - living in his mansion, wearing his ring, and playing a role that could get her killed.

title: Hate to Love You
synopsis: Inspired by the novel by Tijan. After a devastating senior year of high school, Kennedy made two rules for herself. 1. No one will know she's related to her brother and 2. She will never fall for another one of her brother's rivals. When Shay Coleman barges into her life with his irritating and irresistable charm, she's treatened to break both of them...

title: Seducing Mr. Larsen
synopsis: After being dumped by her ex, Nola unexpectedly finds herself in the arms of Ryan Laren—her ex’s future father-in-law, a man of immense wealth and power. Learning of her complicated bond with his daughter, Ryan tries to stay away. But Nola keeps breaking his rules, drawing him deeper into a dangerous attraction.

title: Uncle William, Please Say I Do!
synopsis: After Alaina saves powerful businessman William from a near-fatal car accident, he gives her a promise. Months later, William finds her at his nephew Jason's engagement party—only to discover she's Jason’s fiancée. Though he hides his feelings, William gifts her a family heirloom. When Jason betrays her, Alaina breaks off the engagement. With her grandmother's Alzheimer’s worsening and a wedding wish unfulfilled, Alaina asks William to marry her in a secret one-year contract. William sees this as his chance to win her heart, and as he protects her, Alaina also starts to fall for him.

title: Betrayed Alpha Queen Rises from the Ashes
synopsis: Nessa, secret Wolf Queen, has her wolf sealed so that she can runaway with her fated mate, Alpha Blaze Ashclaw. But Blaze mistakes the birthmark on their son to mean Nessa cheated and makes them his slaves. Only when the life of their son is threatened, is there a chance for Blaze to realize the truth, but will it be too late then?

title: The Alpha's Virgin Captive
synopsis: In The Alpha's Virgin Captive movie, Evelyn never meant to save the ruthless alpha, Dominic—but now she’s his mate. She’s wolfless and already chosen Harrison, but Dominic doesn’t take no for an answer. He kidnaps her, claiming her as his. She tries to run, but the more she resists, the hotter the desire burns between them. What terrifies her most? The way she’s slowly starting to crave him... more than anything.

title: Resisting Mr. Lloyd: An Age Gap Romance
synopsis: In Resisting Mr. Lloyd: An Age Gap Romance Full Movie, facing family pressure to quit college and marry, Clarisse's world changes when she meets Austin, the CEO of Lloyd Group after helping his grandmother after a scam. Learning about her financial struggles, he offers her money in exchange for a fake marriage to fulfill his grandmother's wish. They form an unexpected alliance, while Austin keeps his true identity a secret from her.

title: Tutoring my Rival Boy
synopsis: In Tutoring My Rival Boy movie, Life isn't easy for Chris Blanning, valedictorian at a snobby private school. It's hard enough dealing with bullies already, but when his scholarship isn't enough to cover tuition, he's got to tutor his worst enemy — Lucien Alaric, the spoiled bad boy he just saw trying to seduce their teacher into changing his grades! Even worse, Lucien's figured out his deepest, dirtiest secret in return. All he can do is keep his friends close, and enemies closer — but maybe Chris is getting a little too close...

title: I Accidentally Hired a Billionaire Husband
synopsis: Online, Emma had agreed to meet a man at a place and time whom she would get married to, and he had told her that he was putting on a green shirt. That was how she met Oliver in I Accidentally Hired A Billionaire Husband Movie, who was coincidentally putting on a green jacket, and running away from getting married.

title: Bound to the Rebel Wolf
synopsis: Their families slaughtered each other, and they’re sworn to hate one another… but the pull between them can't be denied. Maeve, the alpha princess, enters Luperiom determined to survive the kingdom’s brutal war college. What she doesn’t expect is a fated bond with Saxon Blackmoor—the most powerful wolf there… and her enemy. Now, the one wolf she shouldn’t want might be the only one who can save her.

title: Vicious
synopsis: In Vicious movie, after Vicious bullies Emilia out of town, he reappears years later with an offer she can’t refuse: A job that could keep her afloat. But Vicious is haunted by a past of abuse, and trusting him could drag Emilia back into the world that once broke her... Can she let herself fall for him?

title: The Quarterback Next Door
synopsis: Forever invisible Skylar Heron hasn't started her senior year so hot. First, she's embarrassed in front of the whole school when trying to ask out her crush Jamie Donner, her childhood best friend and next-door neighbor. Then, she gets paired up with him to work on a class project together. And, finally, to top it all off, she's forced to live with him when his house burns down and he moves into her room! But now, Jamie's crazy ex-girlfriend is out to make their lives hell. The only thing that can save both their years is... to turn the school freak into the most popular girl in school!

title: My Secret Husband is My Boss
synopsis: Kate married a stranger in order to secure her inheritance without ever seeing him. She returns two years later get a divorce, not knowing that her hot billionaire boss and crush Jack Townsend is her secret husband.

title: Fatal Attraction: The Hybrid Princess
synopsis: Natalie is a hybrid. She is a werewolf, dragon and vampire, and due to this, she is targeted by different people who are after her for so many reasons in Fatal Temptation: The Hybrid Princess Movie. Following her flee from her pack because of heartbreak, she returns when she hears of the death of her parents and a new Alpha.

title: The Heiress Strikes Back
synopsis: The Heiress Strikes Back movie about: Kidnapped as a baby, Amelia is forced to work as a maid for her kidnappers. Her brothers, the Kellers, never stopped searching for her. Soon, they closed in on her location but a case of mistaken identity hindered their search. A DNA test will be carried out and justice will be served.

title: Back Off! I'm the Real Mrs. CEO
synopsis: Who is the real Freya D’Lore? Time was against the original Freya D’Lore when a stranger stole her name and identity in Back Off, I'm The Real Mrs. CEO Movie. Freya D’lore was humiliated and insulted and could only watch her life-time's hard work go down the drain until she was eventually able to prove her identity on the spot.

title: Married In A Heartbeat
synopsis: Betrayed by her fiance and her own sister, Esther marries Ricky without knowing his real identity – a secret billionaire. Together, they have to stand up against Esther's evil family, take back her mother’s company and find their happy ending.

title: I'm Done Being a Yes-Man
synopsis: In I'm Done Being a Yes-Man movie, Enzo is the mysterious heir to the Quinn Corporation. He comes from a prominent family and has an extraordinary talent for football. He is infatuated with the daughter of his family's chauffeur, Stella Hall. One night, Stella gets into an accident from drunk driving, but she convinces Enzo to take the blame for her. Worried that her secret will eventually get out, Stella scams Enzo out of all his savings and hires a killer to murder Enzo. However, just as Enzo is about to die, a mysterious power sends him one month back into the past. Now that Enzo knows Stella's real personality, he's no longer in love with her.
