Enzo resolves to leave behind his "simp" image and make sure Stella gets what she deserves.

title: Fatal Temptation: Between Two Alphas
synopsis:
Fatal Temptation: Between Two Alphas movie summary will take us on a steamy ride as we see Mia, pregnant with her chosen mate Cameron's child, ends up as a rogue when a witch casts a spell on Cameron, he chooses her leaving Mia heartbroken.
As Mia gets expelled to be a rogue she meets her fated mate. But she's tied to both Cameron and her newly found mate.
The alphas are not willing to share, thus making the love triangle hot and curious to watch.

title: My Sugar-coated Mafia Boss
synopsis: Lily met Dax Leone in a masked party where he was running away from his enemies. A forced kiss on Lily sparked what would be a romantic affair between Dax and Lily in My Sugar-Coated Mafia Boss Movie. Dax offers protection to Lily and invests in her pastry business while he deals with his family after becoming the mafia boss.

title: The Alpha Queen Returns
synopsis: Jessica, the Wolf Queen, grew tired of war and bloodshed, so she disguised herself as a plain healer in the woods. To ensure a normal, happy life for her daughter, she sent her to the Russo pack. Little did she know, she had sent her daughter into a living nightmare. Her daughter was treated like a slave—humiliated, abused, beaten, and nearly raped, simply because she had no fame or power. Realizing her mistake, Jessica resolved to save her daughter and make those who mistreated her pay. Meanwhile, she discovered that the Russo pack had betrayed their country and collaborated with Lord Kilian Darkmoom. Finally, Jessica defeated them and restored peace to the wolf world once more.

title: Regret is the Punishment
synopsis:
In Regret is the Punishment movie, MC Karen is a stay at home mom, her husband Tom is a rich Lawyer. While Karen is out, her house catches on fire and their five year old daughter Anna falls to her death. 
Good samaritan Merry goes with the fire truck to take Anna to the hospital, driven by Bob, the fire captain. They need to take Anna to the ER for surgery as soon as possible.
The fire truck hits Karen's car, on her way back from cheating on her husband. She demands they grovel for forgiveness, then pay for damages, wasting their time. Merry and Eve, the paramedic, as well as kind passerbys, try to get her to move. Karen does not give in, not realizing the fire truck is trying to save her own daughter.

title: The Day the Champion Racer Lost His Bride
synopsis: In The Day the Champion Racer Lost His Bride movie, for five years, Alexis poured her entire heart into Ryder Kane—the golden boy of the racing world. She thought they were building a future together. But on the day she planned to propose, she learned the truth: Ryder never saw her as a partner. Just a placeholder. A “practice girlfriend.” Shattered, Alexis accepts an unexpected proposal from billionaire Everett Hale—and cuts Ryder out of her life for good. Now Ryder is forced to face the fallout. Will he let her walk away… or will losing her push him into a spiral of obsession, regret, and the fight of his life?

title: The Heiress Blacklisted Her Husband
synopsis: Giselle, the Duke's daughter and rightful heiress of the Von Howard's family, married Patrick Hilton three years ago after he saved her life. She secretly helped his company go public, but constant harassment from Patrick’s mother and relentless taunts from Becky leave Giselle, now pregnant, feeling hopeless. She decides to divorce Patrick. Despite everything, Patrick’s heart belongs only to Giselle. After the divorce, he realizes how much he needs her and begins a long journey to win her back.

title: Nanny to My Hot Bully
synopsis: In Nanny to My Hot Bully movie, Abbi is Felix's rival... and nanny. Things take a complicated turn when she moves into his house to care for him and his sister and Felix  and Abbi realize their feelings for each other. Can Abbi hide her feelings for Felix to keep her nannying job?

title: Fated to My Forbidden Vampire
synopsis:
Fated to My Forbidden Vampire Summary shows how werewolves are bound by the moon goddess. The movie talks about Theo and Heather who are tied by blood oath. Heather, who was termed as unwanted for being an orphan, is wanted and loved by Theo.
Fiona, Heather's sister, conspires a revenge plan to ruin Heather's happiness. Heather has to find a way to break the magic spell to protect her love.

title: CEO's Twins Want Mommy Back
synopsis: In CEO's Twins Want Mommy Back movie, with a loving hubby and cute stepkids, Cassandra's flash marriage seems too good to be true.  But will her troubled past catch up to her? And why do the kids seem so familiar?

title: Do Me Over
synopsis: Sarah Loren is a widow with a teenage son, Ethan Cole is a big shot CEO who wants to acquire her company. He is arrogant, brilliant, and unnecessarily good looking, and he'll stop at nothing to get what he wants, and what he wants… is Sarah's heart.

title: You Divorced a Genius Heiress
synopsis: When Elle Vanderbilt, the secret tech-genius Dr. Nova, is divorced and dumped by her husband for an imposter, she flash marries handsome stranger Roy Grant - only to discover he's her ex’s biggest rival. Together, Elle and Roy battle her cheating ex and the fake Dr. Nova for the world's biggest tech contract.

title: Puck Me Baby One More Time
synopsis: Lila Cobb once saved Alexander Vaughn, the hottest hockey player. One night of passion between them left her unexpectedly pregnant. Eight months later, Lila was cast out of her family and gave birth to a premature baby boy. Struggling to pay the hospital bills, she worked herself to the bone. Meanwhile, Alexander has been searching for Lila all along, determined to give her and their child all the love he has. But will he be able to find them before it’s too late?

title: The Quarterback's First Love
synopsis: In The Quarterback’s First Love movie, after her quarterback fiancee’s betrayal, cheerleader Maddie’s life unravels. Drawn to Cameron, another football player who feels oddly familiar, she faces new challenges as her ex, the cheer captain, and Cameron's mother plot to tear them apart.

title: Sweet Wild Bride of Mine
synopsis: Eliza Spencer, self-made billionaire, survives a murder attempt and wakes with amnesia. Rescued by Justin Patton, a handsome stranger in a wheelchair- she marries him unaware he's also a billionaire faking his disability. When her memory returns, she keeps her identity a secret to reclaim her company from her greedy family and protect Justin from his vicious half-brother and step-mother.

title: Duke With Benefits
synopsis: Taylor Young made a mistake at first which turned to the best decision ever. She abandoned her dream to go to Nashville where she could be a musician and chased after her childhood sweetheart to Oakville University thinking she stood a chance in his life, but she was humiliated until she met Lord Travis Harrington in Duke With Benefits Movie.

title: The Alpha's Daughter
synopsis:
“The Alpha’s Daughter”
Daphne Sinclair’s life shatters when her father, a powerful Alpha, is murdered on her 18th birthday. Betrayal by Alpha Atlas fuels her desire for revenge. Identity, transformation, power, and resilience collide. Daphne navigates a hostile environment, forging alliances and seeking justice. New situations are stressful, avoiding danger at the same time sucks. Survival game?

title: Fated to My Homeless Billionaire Alpha
synopsis: Elara catches her fiancé, Victor, cheating on her with her best friend, Helena. Devastated, Elara impulsively marries a humble homeless man named Liam. Unbeknownst to Elara, Liam is actually the billionaire Alpha leader of the werewolf world. And he spoils Elara beyond her wildest dreams!

title: I Married as the Replacement Bride
synopsis: Martina is the perfect Mafia daughter. Beautiful, quiet, and — most important of all — obedient. But to protect the one she loves most, she'll go against her father's orders and take her sister's place as bride to the deadliest, most notorious Mafia don of all... the Butcher.

title: Fuel to Our Fire: My Racer Stepbrother
synopsis: In Fuel to Our Fire My Racer Stepbrother movie, struggling to pay the bills to support her ailing mother and abusive step-father, Elaine turns to her work as a dancer at illegal street races. But, as fate would have it, she unknowingly runs into the world's most-feared and envied world-championship street racer... her step-brother. And gives him her virginity.

title: The Price of Loving You
synopsis: Pregnant with Alpha Cyrus's child, the only thing that can save Ally Jones's life is the sacred fruit of the Arbor Vitae. But her true mate Cyrus only seems to care about another werewolf, Emma. As Ally's body grows weaker, will Cyrus choose her... just this once?

title: Bound by Honor: Kidnapped by the Mafia King
synopsis:
Bound by Honor: Kidnapped by the Mafia King summary talks about the world of mafia families, the Saviano and the Mancinis who are bound by marriage alliance to help retrieve their family's glory.
When Luca meets Harper she's sold by her father at an auction.
Luca saves her not caring about the fact that he's betrothed to someone else. Their love can destroy their lives.

title: Accidentally Pregnant, Forever Spoiled
synopsis: In Accidentally Pregnant Forever Spoiled movie: since childhood, Ella has lived with her remarried mother and stepfather after her parents divorced. She endured indifference and abuse in her stepfather's household. After her mother passed away, her stepfather and half-brother treated Ella as nothing more than a tool to make money. Her stepfather even spent all of her college tuition, forcing her to work part-time to pay for her education. While working at a bar, Ella was drugged by a customer, but was rescued by a drunken Edward, leading to a one-night stand. Two months later, Ella discovered she was pregnant! Her stepfather, wanting to sell her off for a good price, attempted to force her into having an abortion. In a critical moment, Edward arrived in time to save Ella and brought her home, offering her care and protection. However, due to her low status, Ella faced insults from Edward's sister and bullying at school. A wealthy heiress, who also had her eyes on Edward, threatened her as well. Yet, Edward remained firm in his commitment to protect her. After overcoming multiple challenges, Ella transformed from a timid, self-conscious girl into a brave and strong woman, gradually winning Edward’s heart. She safely gave birth to their child, and years later, became a brilliant AI researcher.

title: Never Underestimate Girl Math
synopsis: In Never Underestimate Girl movie Math, Zosha is a poor orphan who gets bullied by all the rich Ivy League kids for working on a farm. But Zosha's about to beat them all at the one thing they least expect: math.

title: Ruthless Mafia Daddy
synopsis: The day Ellie's IVF process is a success, she finds out her fiance and her best friend are having an affair. Devastated, she decides to raise her child alone. The doctor reveals there's been a mix up at the sperm bank - she's pregnant with the Mafia Boss' baby. Ellie has been unwillingly dragged into a mafia war of succession. In order to protect her unborn baby, she agrees to a contract marriage with the mafia boss. They never thought this would lead them to true love.

title: Now You Know Who I Am
synopsis: Elena is chair of the Cooper Group. She handed the company over to her husband, Dalton. Elena returns to board of directors after a 5-year absence, but no one at the company recognizes her anymore. Elena is met with a workplace full of gossip, bullying, and rumors. Many speculate that "Dalton's wife" is some old hag. Flora, Dalton's secretary, has repeatedly, unsuccessfully tried to seduce him. One day, Flora sees Dalton and Elena sharing affection, and believes Elena to be his mistress. Then, she finds out Elana is pregnant. Wanting to be Dalton's mistress herself, Flora sets her sights on tormenting Elena, and forcing her out of the picture.

title: Return of the Reaper
synopsis: Isaac Kane is a single father with a dark secret: he was once the most feared killer on the planet. After making a vow to his dying wife to never kill again, he now spends his days as a down-on-his-luck single father. But when his daughter is kidnapped by a major crime family, he must break his vow... and kill his way through the Russian Mafia, while re-taking his place as a near-mythic killer that haunts the nightmares of the wicked.

title: My Dark Romeo
synopsis: After Romeo Costa ruins Dallas Townsend's reputation at the debutante ball and forces her into a marriage, Dallas makes a new plan: seduce him, break his rule, and get the family she’s always dreamed of. But Romeo is not easy to break. And Dallas isn't the type of girl to give up.

title: The Prince's First Love
synopsis: In The Prince's First Love movie, Lucas never expected to kiss a prince—least of all in front of the entire school. What began as a feud with Prince Nicholas turned into a forced friendship, and that into something far more complicated. Every glance, every brush of hands, pulls them closer... but Nicholas is torn between his royal duty and his growing feelings for the boy he once called an enemy. Neither dares to speak the truth—until the moment it can’t be hidden.

title: Rented a Billionaire Husband for Christmas
synopsis: In Rented a Billionaire Husband for Christmas movie, seven years ago, they shared one night. Now they’re fake-married—with a child he doesn’t know is his.

title: Go Away Stepmom, You Have It All Wrong!
synopsis: In Go Away Stepmom You Have It All Wrong Movie, on the day of her father’s wedding, Margaret rushes home early from college exams to attend the ceremony. She only to be mistaken by her future stepmother, Chloe, as her father’s mistress. While her father is away, Chloe takes every opportunity to humiliate and mistreat Margaret. Can Margaret clear her name and expose Chloe’s true colors before it’s too late?

title: My Three Ungrateful Brothers Come Crawling Back
synopsis: In My Three Ungrateful Brothers Come Crawling Back movie, Oriana's mom passed away when she was 6; her stepmother abandoned her at a trailer park. When she was 12, she saved the richest man on earth, Murray Morel, and was adopted as his granddaughter. 2 years later, her three brothers found her, and she decided to return to her biological family. In consideration of their egos, she hid her wealth from them but still secretly helped her brothers to succeed in school. However, the brothers are fooled by her evil stepsister and start to bully her. They kicked her out and almost beat her to death. After getting rescued by her adopted Grandfather, she finally sees the true colors of her brothers. She breaks up with them and plans to take everything back. The punished brothers eventually realize that Oriana is their real family and beg on their knees for her forgiveness.

title: Deadly Affair with My Brother-in-Law
synopsis:
Deadly Affair with My Brother-in-Law summary talks about Aurora who's engaged to Patrick, but she falls for Patrick's brother Noah.
When Patrick turns abusive towards Aurora Noah will do everything to keep her as his.
This forbidden romance is so hot that you can't help but root for the couple. As the title suggests, the movie is filled with drama, action, and romance.

title: The Deaf Heiress's Secret
synopsis: In The Deaf Heiress's Secret movie, A deaf heiress regains her hearing just in time to discover the people closest to her plotting against her. Keeping her recovery a secret, she plays a dangerous game of deception against those who believe her disability makes her weak. As she investigates suspicious events from her past, she must carefully navigate a web of betrayal while pretending not to hear the conspiracies unfolding around her in order to bring those who wronged her to justice.

title: His One and Only Love
synopsis: In His One and Only Love movie, Lyla grows up feeling different from others and struggles with a sense of inferiority. Forced by her family to work and earn money, she faces abuse at every turn. On her 22nd birthday, Lyla wishes for true love. While working a part-time job, she saves Leo, a handsome and gentle president, and unexpectedly becomes pregnant. Leo takes her in and cares for her tenderly, and over time, their love blossoms. However, as they uncover the mystery of Lyla's past, they find themselves entangled in a web of conspiracy and evil. How will Lyla defend their love? What kind of ending awaits her and Leo under the care of the Goddess of Fate?

title: Caution! Cute Baby Alert!
synopsis: In Caution! Cute Baby Alert! movie, One night with Robert the billionaire and Scarlett was pregnant. She never saw him again. Her parents rejected her and her baby was confirmed dead. Unbeknownst to Scarlett, her baby didn't die; instead, he was sold. Years later, a cute baby called her mommy. He wants her to marry his dad who pretends to be a chauffeur.

title: Recipe For Faking A Marriage
synopsis: Recipe For Faking A Marriage Movie is about a poor orphan, Every, entering into a contract marriage with billionaire Julian Barlow, until they fell in love with each other for a fact. Bella Barlow, Julian’s eight-year-old daughter was the architect of the meeting between Julian and Every, and it developed into a scintillating love affair which blossomed forever.

title: Queen of the Court
synopsis: In Queen of the Court movie, after abandoning her career as a tennis star, Lily Pearson dedicated her life to helping her boyfriend Adam's tennis career. But after helping him win his own Grand Slam...the fame changed Adam for the worse.  Adam's not only involved with a younger tennis star Mia Sparks, but he wants Lily to coach her as well. Will Lily accept this betrayal and love a cheating man she no longer recognizes, or will she have the courage to leave, and salvage her potential from all those years ago?

title: Breaking the Deal with My Hockey Bad Boy
synopsis: Breaking the Deal with My Hockey Bad Boy movie shows Jane Wellsy has a secret — she's got a crush on her stepbrother Nate Duncan. No one knows except for her worst enemy, hockey badboy Zach Gates. Even worse, Jane finds out Nate's new transfer student girlfriend was her bully from high school, Melissa! When Melissa finds Jane's smutty story and demands to know if it's about Nate, Zach swoops in to save her, kicking off their fake relationship to keep her secret safe. As they spend time together, Jane finds there's a warm, kind heart under Zach's cold bad boy persona, ready to heal her broken heart and face the world at her side...

title: Mafia Boss Takes High School
synopsis: When a High Level Mafioso finds himself in the body of a bullied high schooler, he uses it as a second chance at finishing high school. But will his street smarts help him to fulfill his dream of going to college, or will a group of bullies drive him to drop out again?

title: Fake Married to My Billionaire CEO
synopsis: After Sam's ex cheats on her and steals her money, Calladan Vandalay marries her at first sight. But he doesn't tell her that he's secretly the richest billionaire in the country. What will Sam do when she finds out? And can they keep their true identities a secret from the preying family and friends in Sam's life?

title: Freed by the Sexy Farmer
synopsis: In Freed by the Sexy Farmer movie, after her once-wealthy family loses everything, virgin heiress Lily Holt is sold to Mason Black. He is the notoriously cruel heir of the Black family fortune. Terrified of his violent reputation, Lily runs away from Mason the night of their fake marriage and crashes into Cal Foster, a sweet, sexy farmer who falls for her at first sight. However, when Cal discovers the man Lily’s running from is his landlord and long-time rival, he risks his life and livelihood to protect her.

title: OMG! You're My Baby Daddy!
synopsis:
“OMG, You’re My Baby Daddy!” is hilarity at its most finest.
A hook-up turns into a lifetime commitment! A surprised dad-to-be navigates parenthood, relationships, and growing up. Chaos ensues in this hilarious film. Laughs, tears, and awkwardness abound. Can he step up and become the dad he never knew he’d be? Unplanned parenthood has never been so funny!

title: My Boss Is My Secret Sperm Donor
synopsis: In My Boss Is My Secret Sperm Donor movie, Leia, struggling with infertility, is caught slacking off at work by her boss, Alec, while browsing a sperm donor website. Mortified by the encounter, she tries to move on. After carefully selecting a donor at the sperm bank, fate takes an unexpected turn—she ends up choosing Alec’s donation without realizing it. When will Leia discover that the child she’s carrying is actually Alec’s?

title: My Husband Regrets Divorcing Me
synopsis: In My Husband Regrets Divorcing Me movie, Audrey hides her identity as a CEO to protect Cornell's pride, working behind the scenes to help him secure a major hotel project and climb to the top as the hotel's CEO. As she helps him make his way up the ladder, his first love, Cecilia, returns, putting a strain on their relationship . Meanwhile, Audrey faces relentless pressure from those around her, including Cornell, which pushing her to consider a divorce. After enduring countless humiliations, she finally recognizes her worth and the price of dedicating herself to the wrong person. With her confidence restored, Audrey eventually chooses divorce and fight to reclaim her place as the CEO.

title: Pregnant by My Tough Daddy CEO
synopsis: After losing the money to cover her mother's medical expenses to her brother, the female lead gets bullied for being broke, but is saved by the male lead. She finds a part time job at a bar, and bumps into the male lead again, who decides to help out with the medical expenses. The female lead is pregnant with twins after a one-night-stand with the male lead. She ends up moving into his house and becomes everyone's favorite.

title: The Nurse's Secret Marriage
synopsis: In The Nurse's Secret Marriage Full Movie, Nurse Aria Browne gets married to billionaire CEO Mason Adams to raise money for her dying mother's operation. Purely contractual, the two never actually see each other during their courthouse ceremony. They meet again three years later - Mason, as the owner of Aria's workplace, and Aria, as the nurse who saved Mason's grandpa's life. They don't recognize each other, but their feelings for each other grow as they spend more time together. Falling for his grandpa's nurse, Mason decides to divorce his wife who, unbeknownst to him, is the very woman he's falling in love with.

title: Leaving My Alpha Husband in Ice Cold Regret
synopsis: When Snow discovers her alpha husband cheating, she offers herself as ritual sacrifice to be eternally frozen. And when she leaves, she will finally break their mate-bond, leaving ice cold regret to be his new forever mate! But what will he do to bring her back?

title: A Sweet Contract with the Mafia Boss
synopsis: In A Sweet Contract with the Mafia Boss movie: by chance, Tessa, an emergency room nurse, saved Victor, a dangerous and charming gang boss, but was strongly targeted by him. He was closing in on her, and she was running for her life—until fate tore away her last hope. Her brother was dying, and the sky-high medical bills were crushing her. Victor narrowed his cold eyes and said, "Be my woman, and I'll save him." She was forced to sign a marriage contract. She resisted his world but indulged in his protection and tenderness. When she found out that the mysterious man who saved her on the rainy night five years ago was actually him, the boundary between hate and love completely collapsed...

title: Mafia's Tender Torture
synopsis: Vesper, who is determined to raise money to save her father, finds Raymond, the boss of the Hell Gang, to become his contracted lover. However, Vesper doesn't know that Raymond has been secretly in love with her for many years. How can they overcome the misunderstandings between money and love...

title: Fake it Till You Love Me
synopsis: Fake It Till You Love Me Movie is about Edward Forrest and Caroline Dean. Edward has to do everything possible to remain the CEO of his company, and that would mean that he would get married to the lady he was caught in a scandal with to save face. A one-year marriage contract will cause them to fall in love.

title: In Love with the Alpha
synopsis: After getting her wolf, Maya learns that the alpha of her pack, Liam, is her fated mate. Meanwhile, the evil Rogue King searches for the True Luna who will be his bride, to make his power complete and help usher in a reign of darkness. Maya is this True Luna, and she must reckon with her destiny and the danger and transformation it brings.

title: How to Kiss a Vampire
synopsis: In How to Kiss a Vampire movie, eight years after Vincent abandoned her, Ella—now a single mom—is pushed off a rooftop and saved by a mysterious, flying masked man. She wakes up to find Vincent at her side. He denies being the masked man but insists his enemies are targeting her and demands she move in with him for protection. Why is the man who broke her heart now acting like her savior? And why does he seem... not entirely human? Can Ella trust him again—or is he hiding more than just a mask?

title: Two Alphas Are in Love with Me
synopsis: The wolfless Lyra, has been captive in the Wolfsbane pack for seven years, during which she was constantly abused by Alpha Roland. During one of her escapes, Lyra has an accidental one-night stand with Alpha Alfred, Moonshadow pack's strongest Alpha, and becomes pregnant with his child. Alpha Alfred rescues Lyra from Alpha Roland and brings her back to his pack. To protect her, Alfred and Lyra form a Fake Luna contract.

title: Kiss Me 99 Times a Day
synopsis: In Kiss Me 99 Times a Day movie, Alice Breslin, desperate to ditch a sleazy guy, impulsively kisses CEO Anson Vega. The next thing she knows, he whisks her away and they get married on the spot. After their whirlwind wedding, they slowly start developing feelings for each other as they spend their days together. In a dramatic twist, Anson unexpectedly discovers that the genius "Sam" he's been searching for all along is actually Alice.

title: Baby Trapped by the Billionaire
synopsis: When Katie's younger sister's cancer worsens, she finds herself signing a contract to give birth to a mysterious billionaire's heir. However, when proving their relationship to the CEO's grandpa turns out to be more difficult than expected, Katie and Mr. Brandt find themselves growing closer to one another, despite the contract's one and only rule: no falling in love.

title: My Husband Killed Me, then I Won the Mega Ball!
synopsis: Adoria Cummins gets murdered by her husband and is taken back in time! She uses the knowledge from her previous life to get revenge on all those who wronged her, starting with winning the Mega ball! Then comes Elijah Snyder, a lawyer who seems to have her best interest in mind, but there's just something about him… that seems too familiar.

title: Fatal Attraction: A Dark Mafia Romance
synopsis: To avenge her mother, Daisy disguises herself as a dancer to get close to the dangerous mafia boss, Hogan. Despite suspecting Daisy's intentions, Hogan finds himself irresistibly drawn to her deadly charm. Will Daisy manage to walk away unscathed, or will she be entangled in passion with Hogan?

title: Stop Crying, I Married Someone Better
synopsis: Scarlett Winters is devastated when her fiancé, Carlton Simmons, abandons her at the altar. Fleeing in humiliation, she’s nearly hit by a car, an incident orchestrated by Leo Forester, genius and legendary CEO who recognizes the runaway bride. Leo offers her an unusual solution: a contract marriage to help her regain her dignity and rebuild her life. As Scarlett heals, Leo secretly supports her, hiding his true identity and intentions. But when old enemies resurface and buried secrets emerge, Scarlett feels betrayed and considers leaving. Now Leo must decide: confess his feelings or risk losing her forever.

title: Big Bad Husband, Please Wake Up! 2
synopsis: Ellie Holland is forced to marry bigshot billionaire Wayne Lyons in order to save her father's life. For the hefty price of five million dollars, Ellie sold herself into the Lyons family with the promise of delivering an heir. There's just one catch… Wayne Lyons is in a coma!

title: Cancel the Wedding, Queen Moves On
synopsis: Maria’s perfect life crumbles when she discovers her fiancé's affair. Determined to take control, she confronts betrayal, finds herself drawn to Alec, her long-lost ex and now a billionaire. As their paths collide, old feelings awaken, and Maria discovers that love can be unexpected, passionate, and impossible to ignore.

title: Sadness Knows No Boundaries
synopsis: In Sadness Knows No Boundaries movie, Charlotte Hasting's life is turned upside down after her daughter dies due to her husband's negligence and favoritism for a pretty employee. To make matters worse, her husband won't believe her, and thinking that she's hiding their daughter from him, continuously makes her life a living hell.

title: End of the World, Start of My Empire
synopsis: In the End of the World, Start of My Empire movie, after World War III, Arthur Morgan is reduced to scraping by in the chaos, surviving on scavenged goods while being bullied and robbed by former high school classmates—until a chance discovery of alien technology changes everything. He rescues three women who become his wives and sets his sights on using this power to rise as the King of the Wasteland.

title: Bound by Love
synopsis: Aria won Luca’s love in an arranged mafia marriage, but when she secretly helps her sister flee the life, she betrays him. With their families at war and a baby on the way, Aria must decide whether love can survive when loyalty is paid for in blood.

title: Pretty Baby
synopsis: In Pretty Baby movie, Rosy Dolores, the city's most sought-after escort, enters a fake engagement with billionaire single father Tad Williams to locate the daughter ripped away from her at birth. Unbeknownst to her, Tad's charming daughter, Lily, is the very child she's been searching for.

title: The Lost Prima Ballerina
synopsis: Eve Wilson loses her daughter, Amelia Wilson during a Halloween party that saw a shooter cause severe commotion. Thirteen years later, the real Amelia Wilson who had been kidnapped and switched is waiting tables for her fake mother, but her fate changes during a ballet competition that led her back into the hands of her real family, the Wilson family.

title: You Drive Me Crazy
synopsis: In You Drive Me Crazy movie, 6 years ago, car restorer Yasmin was drugged and had a passionate encounter with a handsome homeless guy she thought she’d never see again — only to discover she was carrying his child. Now, fighting to save her 5-year-old son, she takes a job as secretary to Tristen Mars, former race car driver and CEO of Mars Motor Group. Little does she know this billionaire is the father of her little boy!  As old sparks reignite and hidden truths come dangerously close to the surface, Yasmin and Tristen fall for each other while still unaware that they’re the very strangers they’ve spent years longing to find.

title: Three Brothers Spoil Me
synopsis: Nancy, the long-lost Lancaster heiress, battles betrayal from her boyfriend Alan and his mistress Mia, who try to steal her place. When will Nancy establish her true identity and gain acceptance from those around her?

title: I Flash-Married My Best Friend?!
synopsis: Chloe and Mateo have been best friends for years, until they accidentally spend one fateful night together and end up in a flash marriage! Will Mateo confess he's been in love with Chloe for years, and pull her out of their "friend-zone"? And what will Chloe do, when she finds out Mateo is secretly a billaionire CEO?

title: Falling for My Divorce Lawyer
synopsis: Evie wants to get away from her abusive, cheating husband, but he refuse to let her go. She finds herself broke and homeless, until she meets Hunter. Can Hunter be the lifeline Evie needs to escape her dangerous asshole husband who'd rather see her die than let her win?

title: Good with Her Hands
synopsis: Years after an unexpected separation, Bella and Adam—once college classmates who fell in love at first sight—are unexpectedly reunited. Now a successful doctor, Bella is stunned when Adam, her first love and now a renowned NHL superstar, appears in her office, seeking help. As old feelings resurface, a twist of fate binds them in a contract relationship, giving their unfinished love a second chance. With each passing day, the spark between Bella and Adam grows stronger, but both must decide if this second chance will allow their long-dormant love to flourish into something lasting.

title: You've Got Male
synopsis: A few minutes after getting married, Leila's husband was screwing another woman. She found out that his marriage to her was a plot to steal her wealth. Desperate for a husband and a child, Leila sleeps with an escort who turns out to be her admirer. Will Leila accept his love for her when he reveals his identity?

title: After Divorce, I Built A Fabulous Life
synopsis: In After Divorce I Built A Fabulous Life movie, once a talented designer, Mia married Tyler for love and became a housewife post-graduation. However, a three-year marriage ended with a divorce decree. Tyler's heartlessness makes Mia give up hope, leading her to reclaim her beloved career. Eventually, Mia shines in her passion, and Tyler realizes his true feelings, allowing them to rediscover love...

title: Taming My Bullies 2
synopsis: Once enemies, now lovers, Rowan and Emma face new challenges as a couple: an heiress fiancée who'll stop at nothing to win Rowan over, an overbearing mother obsessed with the status quo, and Emma's own fears that she'll never fit into Rowan's world. Emma used to believe their hard-won love could triumph over their differences... but what if leaving Rowan is the right choice?

title: When Forever Fell Apart
synopsis:
In the When Forever Fell Apart movie, for their sixth anniversary, Natalie wants to surprise her husband Ethan, so she goes to the clinic to check on the sperm he stored… only to find out he took it out long ago!
Turns out, he donated to his ex and childhood crush so she could have his baby! And now that woman is back—with the child. Worse, Ethan actually brings them into their home, as if they belonged there.
After being let down again and again, Natalie finally makes up her mind. She’s done. She wants a divorce. She’s walking away. For good.
Will Ethan manage to save their marriage before it's lost forever, or will Natalie disappear before Ethan realizes that he's lost a truly good woman?

title: Wrong
synopsis: In the movie Wrong, based on the novel by Jana Aston, Sophie Tisdale has a foolproof plan to lose her virginity before senior year ends...until someone informs her that her partner-to-be has a bet on whether he can film taking her v-card. That someone being Luke, her gorgeous coffee shop regular....slash her new pelvic examiner. How wrong is it to have a thing for your campus gynecologist...and why doesn't Sophie really seem to care?

title: My Double Proxy Marriage to a Billionaire
synopsis: Family outcast Ella Davenport's father arranges for her to marry a scumbag, but when she shows up to sign the papers, she realizes she's already married. And this mystery hubby isn't just anyone - it's smoking-hot CEO Cole McBride! Cole refuses to believe that they're really married, but with his aging grandmother taking an instant liking to Ella, getting rid of her might prove harder than he thought. Can this accidental couple take the unlikely path from mystery marriage to real love??

title: Hillbilly Girlie Marries a Billionaire
synopsis: In Hillbilly Girlie Marries a Billionaire movie, small-town girl Emily moves to the city to collect a debt from her ex, Kevin, hoping to pay off her mother’s medical bills. But she discovers Kevin is now a sugar baby living off of wealthy woman, Rose, and together they humiliate her. Just as Emily hits rock bottom, she stumbles across Lucas. Through an unexpected misunderstanding, Emily becomes the contract wife of a CEO.

title: Someone Loved is Never Lost
synopsis: For seven years, Christmas meant grief––until Raphael Stone sees a face he thought he'd never see again. Lucy, his beloved wife, is alive, but she can't move or talk anymore. Worse, she doesn't seem to remember him at all. Will true love triumph over pain and misfortune?

title: Boss Me Around If You Dare
synopsis: In Boss Me Around If You Dare movie: Just after she is falsely accused of sleeping with her boss and fired, Olivia lands a new job at Wilder Conglomerate—only to realize her new boss is Theo Wilder, the man she hooked up with last night! Olivia says they can’t work together, but Theo challenges her to stay and take a bet: he says he can make her fall for him, while Olivia bets she can resist his seduction… but just how long can she last against her boss’ sexy advances?

title: Reborn for the Lycan King
synopsis: In Reborn for the Lycan King movie, reborn after her stepsister’s deadly betrayal, Diana shoots an arrow to choose her mate. It lands on Alexander, the hidden Lycan King. But with Ivy still plotting and her bond with Alex unclear, Diana must fight to change her fate—before it’s too late.

title: Curse of the Dragon King
synopsis: It's forbidden. It should be impossible. But you — a human — have been Marked: claimed forever as a dragon's mate. And not just any dragon... the Dragon King. A man whose dark beauty and lethal power are only whispered about. Will this mark mean your end? Or will it unlock a secret that could change everything?

title: All the Wrong Reasons
synopsis: In All the Wrong Reasons episode 5, Andrea must handle a sex column or lose her job. She had no idea about sex as she was inexperienced at it. Andrea sets out to have sex. In the process, she met Justin, an old-time friend. Justin volunteers to help Andrea with her sex column. What starts as a simple research turns into a steamy romance.

title: Her Desired Alphas
synopsis: Marabella's dark powers made her the target of her pack after she accidentally killed Kyan's father. No one understands her except for Jonah, her boyfriend and the future Alpha. When the Moon Goddess pairs her with Kyan instead, her only hope shatters, Will this mate bond turn out to be a blessing, or another curse?

title: The Bad-ass Heiress Returns After Divorce
synopsis: Framed for cheating and losing her 8-month-old unborn baby, Sophia vows to get revenge on those who ruined her life—Ryan Allister and Lana Sullivan. When the Sullivan family tracks her down and reveals she's the real heiress, not Lana, Sophia sees her chance to make her ex-husband and the faker pay. She hides her newfound identity and starts her quest for revenge. Along the way, Ryan realizes he can't live without Sophia and he was fooled by Lana in the beginning.

title: Operation Christmas Trap
synopsis: In Operation Christmas Trap movie, six years ago, Winnie and Logan fell in love and had twin daughters. But after Selina sowed discord between them, a misunderstanding drove the couple apart. Six years later, with a little help from their twin daughters swapping places, the truth comes to light.

title: Her Double, His Trouble
synopsis: Identical twins Erin and Elise were torn apart as kids. 20 years later, gently Elise is betrayed by the two people she trusted most — her husband and best friend — then tortured and left for dead. Grief-stricken and furious, badass CEO Erin steps into her dead sister’s life to exact revenge. Their faces may be carbon copies, but Erin is no one one to mess with as she systematically and pyschologically pits her sister’s husband and best friend against each other in a cat and mouse game to destroy the murderers.

title: A Hamptons Summer Affair with My BFF's Brother
synopsis: In A Hamptons Summer Affair with My BFF's Brother movie, Olive Parry agrees to be her BFF Sam’s fake girlfriend, and in return, he would pay for her expenses to save her little brother from his evil foster mom. One condition: don't fall in love with Sam’s older brother. Everything was working perfectly until Olive found out that the man she’d secretly pined for after a one-night stand, and Sam’s off-limit older brother were the same person.

title: The Return of My Mafia Husband
synopsis: The Return of My Mafia Husband movie summary is all about Leo Marino who keeps his identity as the don of the Marino family as he dates Olivia Gray, an ordinary girl. After being in a coma for eight years, he finds Olivia still waiting by his side as he proposes to her. But a don can't marry a nobody as he promises to give Olivia the world.

title: Divorce Tears from the Alpha, but I Shine Alone
synopsis: Ella fell in love with Holden, the Alpha of the High Mountain Wolf Clan, when they were children after he promised to protect her. Due to a witch's prophecy about destined mates, she became his Luna. However, Holden mistakenly thought she married him just to be Luna, so he grew to hate her. Due to the scheming of Ivy, Holden's childhood sweetheart, Ella thinks they're romantically involved and overhears Holden's plan to abort Ella's unborn child. She divorces him and leaves with the baby, then reuniting with her own clan, the Silver Snow Clan, and learns she's their long-lost princess.

title: Bound by Marriage - Freed by Love
synopsis: What began as a marriage of convenience soon became a maze of lies and hidden faces. Diana thought her cold husband was the enemy — until the real nightmare revealed itself. Now, trapped in a house of secrets, the only heart she might come to trust… belongs to the man she was never meant to love.

title: Pregnant By the Billionaire
synopsis: Mia Harper, down on her luck, marries wealthy CEO Carter Prescott as part of a deal. Their fake marriage soon blossoms into real romance, but their love is tested when Carter's ruthless ex, Lily, stops at nothing to win him back. The drama intensifies when Mia discovers she's pregnant with Carter's baby and uncovers the shocking truth that Lily is her long-lost stepsister...

title: Ms. Swan, Teach Me Love
synopsis: Charlotte Swan's put the past behind her to focus on her new job at the prestigious St. James Academy. Everything changes when Timothy Wolfe, king of the school decides that he wants HER. It's forbidden, it's taboo, but what's more... Charlotte has a dark secret that could ruin them both.

title: Unexpected Knot: Married to a Billionaire Nurse
synopsis: After learning that her boyfriend is cheating on her and is only after her fortune, Madeline decides to break up with him and accidentally gets married to Caden, a male nurse. She thought both of them were just hard-working poor people, but she gradually realized that her husband seemed to have hidden wealth and power.Caden Wilson Cashmore, the mysterious CEO of the group, became a male nurse volunteer in order to fulfill his brother's last wish. He's been searching for the recipient of his brother's heart, and could that person be the wife he married on the spur of the moment?

title: Break My Heart Again
synopsis: Break My Heart Again full movie story about: To protect her lover from the hands of her debtors, Lucie broke up with Felix giving him the wrong perception. Years later, Felix became wealthy and Lucie became his employee. Still angered by their past relationship, he promised to tear her apart and make her feel his pain. What happens when he finds out her true past intentions?

title: The One that Got Away
synopsis:
The One that Got Away summary is all about Anna Starr who finds herself stuck in a loveless marriage after giving up her passion to settle down.
Her husband is cheating on her thus making her marriage a misery. Anna meets her rock star ex-boyfriend Adrian, who still ignites the old passion in her.
This time around Anna has to follow her heart as she dreams of Adrian.

title: Love Me, Bite Me
synopsis: For centuries, the most powerful vampires, the Tepes family and the Velda family have remained an alliance which, if broken, could send the world into chaos like never before. The alliance is threatened by a seemingly normal human girl Sammantha Evans, a waitress at Club Dracula owned by the powerful Alarik Tepes. One fateful night on New Years Eve, the world will be changed forever…

title: My Stolen Billionaire Life
synopsis: Switched at birth, Allie had no idea who she really was until she fell for Xander Maddox. That's when she gets her DNA results. Now, she's torn between telling Xander who her father really is and risk losing him or keeping a lie from the man she loves.

title: Daisy Tucker and Mr. NYC
synopsis: In Daisy Tucker and Mr. NYC movie, after a flash marriage, country girl Daisy finds herself married to her new boss, Hamilton Smith, owner of Smith Media. But misunderstandings and plots by Hamilton's evil VP, Bianca, threaten to destroy their relationship before they can confess that they really love each other.

title: Betraying My Billionaire Husband
synopsis: When rich heiress Jane Walden's father is imprisoned for fraud, she's left to fight cancer and a secret pregnancy without any money. Wanting to protect her fiance and his new company from her disaster of life, she stages a fake affair in order to get him to fall out of love with her. But years later, even though he's finally a billionaire, Vincent still hasn't forgotten Jane. How does she break it to Vincent that he has a 7-year-old son named Dylan?

title: Runaway Princess Bride
synopsis: Riley Jones and Xander Thorne meet in Runaway Princess Bride after Riley ran away from her forced marriage to Corbin Hicks when he tried to force himself on her on their wedding day. Riley would come to find out that her parents were actively going to sell her, and that the stranger that saved her was more than a stranger.

title: The Seduction Game
synopsis: In The Seduction Game movie, when a brilliant, dirt-poor teen earns a scholarship to an elite prep school, she becomes the target of a cruel queen bee and her bad-boy pawn who’s tasked with seducing and destroying her before Ivy League admissions are announced — but what no one expects is that the girl from the trailer is playing them all, and she might just take the crown, the scholarship… and his heart.

title: Find Your Way Back to Me, My Childhood Sweetheart
synopsis: The richest man in the world's missing one last thing — his childhood sweetheart. He's determined to marry her, but never realizes she's right beside him! He searches everywhere for the girl who captured her heart. When will he realize he's already married to his Mrs. Right?

title: Genius Baby Gets Daddy Back
synopsis: After a medical mishap, the virgin Violet Gray becomes pregnant with the child of a billionaire stranger, Carter Watts. To provide for the child, they are forced into a hasty marriage. Carter leaves for a business trip and is away for six years, during which Violet raises their son, Patrick, on her own while working at a five-star hotel. Unexpectedly, the hotel is bought out by a mysterious new owner—Carter himself! However, after six years apart, they no longer recognize each other. By chance, Violet discovers that her charming boss, Carter Watts, is actually her long-lost husband...

title: My Mate is a Vampire
synopsis: A werewolf cursed to never shift. A vampire with dark secrets. Kaiya and Talon are supposed to be mortal enemies, but what will the two do when the impossible happens and... they form a mate bond?!

title: Freeze! Runaway Groom
synopsis: In Freeze! Runaway Groom movie, to pay for her father's medical bills, Ivy is forced to marry Byron, a wealthy heir, instead of her stepsister. But on their wedding day, Byron doesn't show up, leaving Ivy humiliated in front of all their family and friends. After they finally marry, they set three rules—agreeing they won't fall in love with each other. Eventually, Byron tells Ivy that the agreement is ridiculous because he's already fallen in love with her. He asks her if she loves him back. So, will Ivy reciprocate his feelings?

title: The Janitor Billionaire & His Swapped Bride
synopsis: After Nora's stepsister Bianca steals her AI-matched partner, Nora is forced to marry a janitor and becomes the laughingstock of her family. Little does she know that the janitor is the billionaire behind the AI matchmaking system, using their marriage to test her true feelings...

title: Out of My Way! The Reborn Mafia Queen Is Here
synopsis: Reborn after Felicia’s past-life bullying—where her identity was stolen and it ultimately led to her death—Arya is determined to claim her rightful place as a mafia heiress. She sets out to outwit and humiliate Felicia at every opportunity, protect her friends, move deftly under the radar while unleashing her past-life combat skills, when everyone gonna realize she is the real mafia heiress？

title: Straight A Pregnancy
synopsis: After a one-night stand with Ben, the hottest guy on campus, Kelsey realizes she's pregnant...and decides to keep the baby. But will Ben stick around - or will he stay a flirty fratboy forever?

title: You Are My Destiny
synopsis: In You Are My Destiny movie, Logan was blind and abandoned—until Giselle saved him, and they fell in love. She sacrificed everything for him, even giving him her corneas. But just as he regained his sight, she was gone. What he didn’t know was that she was pregnant—and fate made her his wife. Five years later, Logan returns as the Hale heir, unaware that his wife and their ailing daughter are the very ones he’s been searching for. When the truth finally comes out, will he win them back—or has he already lost them forever?

title: Daddy Forgot, but Mommy Remembers
synopsis: Nicole loses everything the night she’s framed—her freedom, her child, and the love of her life. Seven years later, she returns as a nanny in the very house that once destroyed her. Ethan, her ex-fiancé, still haunted by the woman he once loved, starts to feel something for the new nanny—without knowing it’s her. Secrets simmer, memories resurface, and Lila, their stolen daughter, is the unexpected thread pulling them back together. He doesn’t remember her. But his heart never forgets.

title: The Queen Bee Strikes Back
synopsis: Bella, heir to the wealthy Walton family, is tired of being surrounded by calculating rich kids. She falls for Marc, a plus-size guy who seems to love her for who she is, hiding her identity and even helping him get recruited to Harvard’s football team. But betrayal hits hard, Bella discovers Marc has been cheating on her with her classmate - and bully - Jessie, who constantly mocks Bella’s body. Even worse, Marc has stolen her identity, claiming he is the Walton heir to win clout and rise to the top of Western High’s social scene. Bella dumps him, has a stunning glow-up, and embraces her curves. When they mock her college future… could Bella’s next move leave them speechless?

title: Swimming My Way Back to You
synopsis: In Swimming My Way Back to You movie, Hazel has been in love with Marcus for eight years and spent three of them as his secret lover. Just when she thought she had finally won his heart, she overhears Marcus confessing that the only person he’s ever truly loved is his first love, Zoe. Heartbroken, Hazel decides it’s time to break things off with him—only to find out she’s pregnant...

title: My Enemy Alpha
synopsis: When you're forced to wed the dark and dangerous Alpha Ronan — your mortal enemy — you're sure you'll kill each other before you make it to the altar. But when a common enemy threatens to destroy your pack, will you accept that you are fated to one another? Or reap deadly consequences?

title: Wrong Marriage, Fated Groom
synopsis: Emily's fiance Henry breaks up with her on their wedding day. Pushed by her toxic best friend, Fiona, she agrees to enter a fake marriage with another man, but mistakes William, her mysterious billionaire CEO, for the man she's supposed to marry. After the wedding, William finds out that Emily is one of his employees, while Emily mistakenly believes that William is drowning in debt. William hides his identity till the day of the design competition when Fiona and Henry plot to sabotage Emily.

title: Knight in Shining Suit
synopsis: Astrid was dumped just when she thought she was comfortable with her fiancé in Knight In Shining Suit Movie. Humiliated by her family, Astrid goes to clear her head in a bar where she meets Ryder, her ex who humiliated her. She is confused about his identity; however, she dares to spark a conversation with him, leading to uncertain territory.

title: Homeless Billionaire Baby Daddy
synopsis: Daisy and Alex share a one night stand and part ways on one fateful night -- which leaves Daisy pregnant. Alex is on his way to her when he gets into a car accident and loses his memory. 5 years later, Daisy runs into a homeless Alex, and her daughter Poppy insists he's her father. When will Daisy realize this homeless man is her baby daddy? Will the family of three work together to take revenge against scheming villains?

title: You Fired A Genius Surgeon
synopsis: After Dr. Adrian Marksman, the most renowned surgeon in the country, gets dismissed by his boss's son, he joins forces with Dr. Vivian Hart, the brilliant and ambitious head of a rival hospital. This move drives his former hospital into financial ruin, and when Preston realizes he has let go of the wrong doctor, it's already too late...

title: Lassoed by a Cowboy's Love
synopsis: In Lassoed by a Cowboy's Love movie, Madison was a Manhattan heiress with it all—until she loses everything, including her now-cruel fiancé who stranded her in Texas. Broke and desperate, Madison wanders into a local saloon…and into the arms of Beau Hayes—her ex’s rugged, dangerously sexy cowboy uncle. After a steamy night, Beau offers her a job -- and an unexpected shelter. Now Madison’s trading pearls for cowboy boots, riding bulls, horses—and maybe even a cowboy.

title: Secret Strangers in Love
synopsis: When the fate of a business marriage seems inevitable, Emma Watson, the heiress of the Watson family, takes on an internship at Anderson Corporation. Meanwhile, Ethan Anderson, the heir of the Anderson family, steps in as the new CEO. Both hide their true identities while evaluating each other, but they unexpectedly fall in love at first sight. However, things take an unexpected turn when someone else mistakenly claims Emma’s identity, and she mistakenly believes another man is her “fiancé.” Determined, both Emma and Ethan set out to break off their "engagements" with their so-called "fiancés." Will they ever realize that the person they're searching for has been right in front of them all along?

title: Don't Mess with a Prep School Princess
synopsis: Sierra Lane thought she was getting her life back when she was finally released from juvie after taking the fall for her boyfriend, Jake. Instead, she’s met with a shocking truth: she’s the long-lost Lancaster Heiress, heir to one of the biggest fortunes in the country. Armed with a new identity and eager to reclaim her place at Hawthorne Prep, Sierra returns to school, ready to share the news. But instead of a warm welcome, she finds that Jake has moved on with her ex-best friend, Fallon. Even worse, Fallon has already been telling everyone that she and the heiress are best friends, making Sierra’s arrival a direct threat to Fallon's reign as queen bee of the school. As Sierra battles relentless gossip, sabotage, and an entire school that wants her sent back to juvie, she’ll have to prove she’s exactly who she says she is before Fallon destroys her reputation for good.

title: Taming My Bullies 3
synopsis: Rowan and Emma's relationship reaches a new stage, but new challenges lie ahead. Will they finally get their happy ending? Emma and The Big Four's story is coming to its finale. Stay tuned for the ending you've been waiting for.

title: The Heiress and Her Possessive Bodyguard
synopsis: Three years ago, Jack Hawkins saved heiress Grace Christensen from an evil stalker, but when they reunite, a misunderstanding turns them into enemies. Now, with Grace's safety threatened again, her father hires Jack as her personal bodyguard. When they're forced to spend every second together, will they be able to resist each other?

title: I'm Pregnant, Let's Break Up!
synopsis: Monica, a talent manager, and Adonis, an A-list star, have been in secret relationship for three years now. For Monica, it's all just unrequited love because Adonis has not even once expressed his feelings to her. Monica, now pregenant, decides to leave this relationship behind. It is only then that Adonis realizes all he needs is her. Years later, their paths cross again, and Monica is now an acclaimed film director. This time, will Adonis win back his love?

title: Alpha Mate Unchained
synopsis: In Alpha Mate Unchained movie, he killed his vicious father to save her.  Now the new Alpha King must hide his fated mate and use a decoy fake Luna to keep her alive. But while he’s away battling, she’s discovered by the Fake Luna and brutally tortured.  Can she survive long enough for the Alpha King’s return and vengeance?

title: CEO and the Country Girl
synopsis: In CEO and the Country Girl movie, when her sister betrays her and a ruthless CEO targets her family farm, fiery small-town cowgirl Avery Rogers clashes—and sparks—with Tyler Sinclair, the corporate heir sent to take her land. But as lust and loyalty collide, a small-town cookout—Tyler’s bold bid to save Avery and her father’s legacy—turns enemies into something dangerously close to lovers, and turning their worlds upside down.

title: OMG, I Got Married in Vegas!
synopsis: Look at how Emily Grace and William Valcor ran away from their engagement, only for them to still end up getting married to themselves in OMG! I Got Married In Vegas Movie. After declaring that they were both too spoilt for each other, Emily and William, unknown to them that they were the runaway bride and groom, eventually got married.

title: Lucifer's Bride
synopsis: In Lucifer's Bride movie, the King of Hell, Lucifer, hides his true identity and comes to the human world in search of the girl who keeps appearing in his dreams. He unexpectedly saves Angela from mortal danger, only to be forced to leave. When he returns, Lucifer realizes Angela is the one he’s been searching for—but she is once again facing a life-or-death crisis. Unable to use his magic powers, can Lucifer overcome escalating threats and protect her?

title: The Year in His Chains
synopsis:
In The Year in His Chains movie, when Anna's husband racks up a massive debt to dangerous mob boss Jeremy, she becomes the price - literally his property for one year. She expects cruelty from the notorious crime lord, but discovers something unexpected: a wounded man hiding behind his cold mask.
Her cheating husband wants her to seduce Jeremy for money. His controlling father wants her eliminated. But as Anna finds herself caught between lies and loyalty, she realizes the man who owns her might be the only one who truly sees her. Sometimes the chains that bind you are the only things that can set you free.

title: When Wife Won't Forgive
synopsis: In When Wife Won't Forgive movie, on their 25th wedding anniversary, Anne discovers her bestselling author husband, Jonathan, has been having an affair. Anne is fed up and wants to get a divorce. Jonathan thinks he's going to become the CEO of the publishing company, so he immediately kicks Anne to the curb. Utterly heartbroken, Anne decides she won't forgive Jonathan again. She resumes her position as Chairwoman of an elite publishing company, and removes Jonathan from his position. Jonathan finally realizes that Anne who played housewife for 25 years was actually a wealthy heiress.

title: The Secret of My Billion-dollar Marriage
synopsis: Emma, the heiress of the Coffman family ​​who is dumped by her ex, meets Lucas, the billionaire of the Fischer family, in a strip club. At this time, she happened to meet her ex and his cheating partner again. In order to slap her fiancé in the face, Emma asked Lucas to pretend to be her husband, and Lucas took advantage of the situation and proposed a fake marriage. But Emma thinks Lucas is a stripper/escort, and Lucas thinks Emma is a ghetto girl/gold digger. Both of them misunderstand each other, and they don't want to reveal their identities. Therefore, they must carefully conceal their identities from each other during the process of getting along after marriage, and at the same time fight against two villains who are always causing obstacles. In the process, they gradually create sparks, resolve misunderstandings, and eventually move towards a real marriage.

title: Darling, Please Come Home
synopsis: Stella Hearth was kidnapped while her brother, Dennis watched helplessly. In Darling, Please Come Home Movie, Stella’s life changed drastically as she was saved by a poor and dumb man who became a janitor in her school, forcing Stella to be bullied by her own brother because he could not recognize her after so many years. Eventually, Stella was recognized.

title: Dear Professor, You Are My Baby Daddy
synopsis: Med student Cora never expected to get pregnant—let alone with the baby of Damon Hawkins, the city’s most eligible billionaire bachelor... and her new visiting professor. She planned to keep the child a secret, but Damon kept pushing past her walls—until he dropped to one knee and asked her to marry him. What Cora thought would be a fleeting romance turned into a whirlwind of unexpected tenderness and indulgent love. But the closer they grow, the more dangerous secrets begin to surface. As betrayal and hidden bloodlines come to light, Cora must face the ultimate question— Can she truly find happiness... and reunite with the family she never knew she had?

title: Tempting the Mafia Twins
synopsis:
In Tempting the Mafia Twins movie, Genesis discovers her mob boss husband, Kiefer's affair, and loses one of her twin babies due to his mistress' schemes. Genesis reports him to the authorities and flees while still pregnant.
Seven years later, Genesis runs into Kiefer on the street. She thinks her murderous husband is going to kill her, but when Kiefer drags her back home against her will, she realizes the truth: Seven years ago, it was all a misunderstanding. Kiefer O’Reilly, the ruthless mafia boss, only wants one thing—to win Genesis’s love back.

title: Infatuated with the CEO
synopsis:
Infatuated With The CEO movie talks about Emma Caldwell who ends up sleeping with August Hughes, her business partner, after finding out her fiancé Derek is cheating on her. To save herself from the scandal she pretends to be with Derek who manipulates her into not breaking up with him.
August Hughes, despite being called a Casanova by the tabloids, chases after Emma, wanting her to be more than a one-night stand.

title: America's Favorite Ex-Husband
synopsis: In America's Favorite Ex-Husband movie, an aspiring writer’s life is turned upside down when he rescues an up-and-coming Hollywood starlet.  Ten years later, Daniel’s the house husband to America’s Sweetheart, ignored and invisible to the paparazzi and his own family.  When a megastar old flame comes back to seduce his wife, Daniel’s life reaches a new level of hell and he realizes he must do the unthinkable: divorce America’s Sweetheart!  By the time his famous wife realizes what she’s lost, it may be too late to win him back.

title: The Virgin Stripper and the Hockey Star
synopsis: In The Virgin Stripper and the Hockey Star movie, Jenna leads a double life: by day, she’s a quiet, unassuming student; by night, she secretly works as a stripper to pay for her sister’s medical bills. Her worlds collide one night when Casper, her cocky school rival and the star of the hockey team, walks into the club. He’s instantly drawn to the enigmatic dancer, Angel, unaware she’s the same girl he spars with at school. But the deeper their bond grows, the closer they come to unraveling each other’s truths.

title: Mancini’s Forbidden Bride
synopsis: Pregnant. Widowed. Dragged into the Mancini mafia. Ava never expected her late husband to be the hidden heir—nor to crave his ruthless brother. Ice-cold don Luca vows to shield her, but every touch ignites a forbidden fire. Rival gangs close in, her birth family plots betrayal, and the dynasty teeters on war. How long before Luca shatters every rule to claim the woman worth killing for?

title: Rules of Protection: The Bodyguard I Hate
synopsis: In Rules of Protection The Bodyguard I Hate movie, Elena and Ace used to be engaged for marriage. But, after Ace is disabled from the war, he pretends to cheat on Elena to save her from his new disability. Three years pass until the CEO of a medical insurance company gets shot. Elena needs a personal bodyguard, and Ace just happens to be the one for the job. Will Elena and Ace repair their rocky past and reignite the love they once had for each other?

title: Yellowstone: King of Montana
synopsis: In Yellowstone King of Montana movie, Henry Conrad, the legendary founder of Yellowstone Ranch and the King of Montana, hid his identity as a school janitor. Now, after 10 years -- he's returning to his throne. However, before he can reveal who he is, his son gets bullied, beaten and humiliated. Henry vows to protect his son, make the bullies pay and right the wrongs in this valley like a real King.

title: Fix You
synopsis: Olivia Beckett’s perfect life is unraveling—her family’s broke, college is slipping away, and her high school sweetheart has turned violent. Enter Sebastian “Bash” McDaniels, a rising boxer working nights at a bar to escape his past. When he rescues Olivia from her ex, their connection sparks, but as danger closes in, Bash must choose between his dreams and saving the girl who could break him.

title: Beach Volleyball Virgin
synopsis: Jenny Taylor dreams of losing virginity to her nemesis stepbrother, Chris Riggins, and accidentally kisses him the next day, resulting in public shaming by Chris' girlfriend Natalie and the rest of the volleyball team. However, Chris suddenly becomes caring and considerate, defending Jenny every step of the way. Could this actually be the start of a taboo relationship?

title: Hating and Loving My Adopted Brother
synopsis: In Hating and Loving My Adopted Brother movie, after Abigail's parents both die in an accident, she gets adopted by her dad's friend. She transfers to a new high school and clashes with Chris, who acts like a total selfish prick — only to discover that he's her new adopted brother! Living under the same roof, she falls for him... but does he like her back?

title: The Divorced Wife is a Genius Surgeon
synopsis: 8 months pregnant, Alyssa is abandoned by her husband for his mistress and their lovechild Lilly. Little do they know, Alyssa is actually Jane Davenport M.D.--heiress to the Davenport fortune, and the only heart surgeon in the world that can save Lilly.

title: Billionaire CEO's Secret Obsession
synopsis: Dr. Leah Anderson's life is turned upside down when she falls for the hot, seductive billionaire, Ryan Carter, whose obsession makes him a dangerous lover. Their passionate romance takes a dark turn as men in Leah's life begin to mysteriously disappear, and now she must face Ryan's chilling secrets, and confront her love for him.

title: He's Done Being Nice(English-dubbed)
synopsis: "I'm Jason Hayes, and today, I am reborn. In my past life, I was weak. In this one, I choose to be the villain." From a humble waiter to the king of the underworld, Jason fights back against every bully and outmaneuvers the most powerful figures, including the father-in-law of a crime lord. His ironclad rule: touch what's mine, and you won't survive. Only when he stops stepping aside does Jason learn a brutal truth: the world makes way for those who refuse to move.

title: Surrender to My Dangerous Boss
synopsis: In Surrender to My Dangerous Boss movie, Clara was in trouble for her mother's medical expenses and was forced to be a barmaid. The powerful Elliott appeared and rescued her, bringing her into his own world. The two gradually developed feelings in a complex emotional and workplace environment. Elizabeth repeatedly framed Clara and tried to drive her out of Elliott's life. With Elliott's support, Clara gradually found herself and learned to face life bravely.

title: What Doesn't Break Me
synopsis: Raised in rural poverty, Taylor gets into MIT, but her father and older brother rip up the acceptance letter and sell her to an old rich man for cash. With help from her mom and little sister, Taylor escapes—but loses all contact with them. Seven years later, Taylor is the richest person in the world. She returns home in glory—only to find her mom beaten and her sister sold by her brother. Fueled by rage, Taylor shows up at the welcome banquet held for the world’s top CEO—her brother, now her employee, doesn’t recognize her and calls her a whore in front of everyone. Can Taylor prove who she is, find her sister, and bring justice to those who crushed her? And when the truth comes out—what punishment awaits those who looked down upon Taylor?

title: A Fated Encounter
synopsis: A Fated Encounter movie summary talks about Emma Brown who is forced by her father Henry to take her sister Bella's place and marry Tommy Anderson to save her business. Unlike the rumor Tommy turns out to be a handsome and wealthy man. Soon Emma starts to fall for Tommy despite stating their relationship is just a contract to please their families.

title: Sit Down, Be Humble
synopsis: Stacy Van Ness, the heiress to the biggest winery in Napa Valley, conceals her identity to be with Pete Davis, just to get brutally dumped. She decides to show the world who she is - the richest heiress in the country...but no one seems to believe her?

title: Royal Heir Breaks My Heart in a Warzone
synopsis: In Royal Heir Breaks My Heart in a Warzone movie, the emergency room doctor fell in love with a special forces officer at first sight. But because of family difficulties, she had to pretend to be unfaithful and break up with him. She didn't know that after breaking up, she found out she was pregnant…and the special forces officer's other identity was actually a royal heir fulfilling his military service. Years later, she was forced to join an international medical team and met him again at the international peacekeeping base. She reunited with her special forces officer, her prince, whom she had been thinking about for a long time, but they were like strangers...

title: Monster in His Eyes
synopsis: In Monster in His Eyes movie, based on the book MONSTER IN HIS EYES by J.M. Darhower! Karissa Reed, 19, is trapped by her controlling mother and abusive ex, Tommy, but her world shifts when Naz Conti, a dangerous ex-con mafia boss, rescues her. Drawn to his danger, she challenges him to let her be his, with every kiss and daring move, risking everything for desire, curiosity, and forbidden love. Can she survive his world, and dare to love the man everyone warns her to fear?

title: The Hart-Breaker
synopsis: Nerdy girl Pearl is determined to catch the eye of her longtime crush, but is clueless on how to do it. But after a shocking encounter with Ethan Hart, the school's biggest bad boy, she makes a deal with him that will finally get her noticed. With his help, Pearl catches the attention of the guy she wants and sparks do fly... but in the wrong direction.

title: To My Romeo, with Love
synopsis: Penny and Mason are childhood best friends who’ve quietly fallen in love. But after spending their first night together, Penny is diagnosed with cancer—and makes the agonizing choice to push Mason away to protect him from the pain of losing her.

title: My Cold-Hearted Mafia King
synopsis: In My Cold-Hearted Mafia King movie, after her father's death, Vivian was abandoned by her stepmother Catherine and stepsister Olivia, then kidnapped and trafficked—until she was rescued by Damien Russo, the king of the mafia, and brought into his home. Despite their age gap, Vivian gradually develops feelings for Damien, while he struggles to resist the temptation. When an arranged marriage between Olivia and Damien is revealed, chaos ensues, putting their already complicated and budding romance to the ultimate test.

title: My Billionaire Ever After
synopsis: Aria Walker needs a husband to get out of an arranged marriage. When her long-term boyfriend reveals he's leaving her for her best friend, a heartbroken Aria turns to old acquaintance/"food truck worker," Norman Hill. Little does she know Norman Hill is actually a billionaire CEO. Aria's selfish family and bitter best friend try to sabotage her at every turn, but with Norman's support, Aria's marriage only gets stronger.

title: Playing by the Billionaire's Rules
synopsis: Playing By the Billionaire’s Rules Movie is about Becky Jacobs who had a contract affair with Nick Walton for three years with rules. One of the rules was that they would not fall in love but they both broke it and found it difficult to maneuver Nick’s mother who wanted him to marry someone else for an alliance to ensue.

title: My Dear Daughter, Love Me Once More
synopsis: In My Dear Daughter Love Me Once More movie, The male lead only has eyes for his first love and won’t even let Aria, his own daughter with his wife/the female lead, call him “Dad.” Aria waits all day for him on her birthday, only to witness him propose to his ex. At the school talent show, the mistress and her daughter bully Aria, and the husband helps them. To steal Aria’s summer camp spot, he feeds her a strawberry cake, knowing she’s allergic—she nearly dies. That’s when the female lead decides to divorce him and finally reveals her secret: she’s the daughter of a duke. She uses her true identity to fight for justice for her daughter. In the end, even when he kneels and begs Aria for forgiveness, she never calls him “Dad” again.

title: Corrupting My Billionaire Boss's Heart
synopsis: In Corrupting My Billionaire Boss's Heart movie, when Lyla Walker starts working at the world's most elite country club, she unwittingly brings chaos and temptation to her buttoned-up billionaire CEO Royce Kennedy. She's ready to risk everything for their forbidden relationship, unaware of the promise he made to her dying father.

title: Baby, Please Don't Marry Him
synopsis: In Baby Please Don't Marry Him movie, to secure her boyfriend’s future, Gloria pretends to be superficial and breaks up with him. Seven years later, she's forced into an arranged marriage, only to find her fiancé's uncle is her now-successful ex. As old feelings resurface and misunderstandings unravel, the two are drawn back together for a second chance at love.

title: The Comeback Play
synopsis: In The Comeback Play movie, once a legendary player, a disgraced alcoholic starts coaching his estranged son’s underdog NBA team, determined to prove to his haters that he can save the team and still be the God of Ball.

title: Money, Robots, and a Happy 4th of July
synopsis: The Iron Marine, Toby Stark, returns home after saving the country only to be brutally dumped by his ex who as no clue he's the richest guy on Earth! How will Tobias slap back at her?

title: The Mafia Boss Happens to Be My Sex Partner
synopsis:
In The Mafia Boss Happenes to Be My Sex Partner movie, Fiona Shaw's life of luxury shattered when her family's empire collapsed, leaving her burdened with a crushing $500 million debt. To save what's left of her family, she agrees to a cold-hearted bargain: a marriage of convenience to Henry Sterling, the second son of a powerful business dynasty.  

But behind the glamour of high society lies a painful truth. Henry is gay, deeply in love with his male secretary, Louis, and indifferent to Fiona. He married for one reason alone—to produce an heir under his mother Elizabeth's pressure, secure the family fortune, and defeat his rival half-brother, Jeff.  

Now, trapped in a loveless marriage and yearning for freedom, Fiona finds herself drawn into a dangerous affair… with a man whose secrets are even deadlier than her own.

title: In Bed with Your Lies
synopsis: Sara was reduced to a maid in a home her late mother built from scratch in In Bed With Your Lies Movie. While she was trying to navigate such injustice, she looked out for a certain painting from her mother to her, which she found in the possession of Noah Dempsey, a billionaire who she was a substitute bride to.

title: Hey Boss, Your Company is Getting Bombed
synopsis: In Hey Boss Your Company is Getting Bombed movie, Clyde is a middle-aged salesman who has been marginalized in his job. One day, he wakes up with a superpower of seeing when and how people would die. He tries to save multiple people from death, but no one believes him. A few days later, his power tells him there is going to be an explosion at his company that will kill everyone in the building. To save everyone, he has to find out who planted the bomb and stop them.

title: I Have Five Kick-Ass Brothers
synopsis: In I Have Five Kick-Ass Brothers movie, Raina "Smith" Lincoln has to leave her life of luxury after finding out she was switched at birth. She reunites with her seemingly impoverished biological family, the Lincolns, who hide their extreme wealth from her. Despite finding out that her family is poor, Raina embraces the Lincolns and they reciprocate. As her old family, the Smiths, and their evil daughter try to take her down, her true family, along with super rich, super handsome, billionaire Theo Jones, do anything and everything to defend Raina.

title: Hello, Let's Get Married
synopsis: Married moments after meeting for the first time, new couple Maya Moore and Ethan Armstrong attempt to make their spontaneous marriage work despite interference from their enemies and Maya’s mysterious past.

title: OMG, I'm Surrounded by Three Princes
synopsis: Erin, a down-and-out street vendor, is betrayed by her fiancé and best friend, but no one knows that her true identity is the long-lost princess. Just when the three princes find the clues and Erin can return to the royal family, her true princess identity is claimed by her best friend. In the many subsequent dangerous situations, Prince Charles repeatedly protects Erin, causing Erin to develop a different feeling for her "brother" Charles.

title: The Billionaire Female CEO from the Trailer Park
synopsis:
In The Billionaire Female CEO from the Trailer Park movie, Elise Gray was called to serve her country the day of her wedding, developing cutting edge fighter jets for the military. She was also able to use found Lockheed Gray, the world's biggest aerospace and military defense contractor, becoming the richest billionaire in the world.
Four years later, she goes home to her husband Cato to give him the wedding they never had, hiding her identity in order to give him the surprise wedding of his dreams. However, when she returns to her small-town she finds trouble - Beatrice has been relentlessly pursuing Cato, plotting to destroy their marriage. Cato's family, especially his mother Stacy, are also trying to push Elise to divorce Cato so he can marry Beatrice, resorting to humiliating her to get their way.
