Cato's loyalty and earnest love for Elise gives her strength to fight back till the end. Elise won't back down - no matter the cost, she'll defend her marriage and take back her dignity.

title: Cohabitating Lover
synopsis: In Cohabitating Lover full movie: Corinne, fleeing her wedding in her gown, and Andre both end up at an apartment leasing office due to the landlord's error and become reluctant roommates after arguing over who gets to stay. Later, Corinne lands a job at a rising advertising agency, only to discover Andre is her boss. A colleague grows suspicious of their relationship, spreads rumors, and while Andre defends Corinne, he asks her to keep their living situation a secret. Despite the rumors, they gradually fall in love. When Corinne's fiancé James appears and tries to get her back, she refuses and is subsequently slandered at work. To Corinne's dismay, Andre doesn't support her initially but secretly introduces her to a new project. They meet friends for dinner, leading to the friends falling for each other and revealing that Andre has been hiding something, which intensifies the conflict between him and Corinne. Corinne leaves the company and is found by James. Meanwhile, Andre's mother has also arranged a fiancée for him, causing their love to face numerous challenges.

title: Lost Heiress of Kingston High
synopsis: Katie Walker is the janitor’s adopted kid — bullied, humiliated, a nobody. Then the golden Maddox brothers show up looking for their long lost heiress sister: Katie! But the school’s queen bee steals her place. Now it’s Katie’s turn to level up, take back her crown, and make them all regret underestimating her.

title: From One Night to Mrs. Billionaire
synopsis: In From One Night to Mrs. Billionaire movie: Claudia is the adopted daughter of the richest man, Kaden. She drugged and framed Anastasia, wanting to ruin her reputation and divorce her husband Lucius. However, Anastasia was rescued by the drunk Kaden by mistake and became pregnant with Kaden's only child. Clarissa, relying on her status as the richest man's adopted daughter, was arrogant and domineering, targeting Anastasia at the company and at the banquet, but she didn't know that Kaden had taken Anastasia home to take care of her and fell in love with her. In the end, Claudia's true identity was also discovered by Kaden...

title: The Hitwoman
synopsis: In The Hitwoman movie, Madeline Archer, assassin, doesn't want bloodshed—but if she stops killing, her little sister dies. When Maddie is forced to take a contract on Hayden Kent, she runs into two problems. One, he's the District Attorney. And two–he was her first and only love. And he wants her back.

title: Baby, You Had It Coming
synopsis: Marry the man of her dreams was supposed to be the key to Ivy Donahue's happily-ever-after. Instead, it was only the start to an endless cycle of misery and heartbreak. But when her husband crosses the ultimate line, Ivy reveals she's not just any housewife—she's a billionaire heiress, and she's going to make him pay.

title: The Scent of My Fated Luna
synopsis: A half-witch, half-werewolf teen forced to hide her true identity struggles to survive a high school divided by magic and fangs—while resisting her fated mate, the future Alpha who doesn’t remember their childhood bond, and battling the jealous rival willing to destroy her to claim him.

title: The Three Badasses Who Want Me
synopsis: You just got dumped by your cheating husband who doesn’t realize you are actually British royalty! Your dad finds you 3 badass fiancés to show him up. But you only have 7 days to pick! Who do you choose? Or can you have all three?

title: Love Ages Like Fine Wine
synopsis: Austin Harrington was the love of Grace Mitchell’s life in Love Ages Like Fine Wine Movie until he unexpectedly stood her up on their wedding day. While Grace thought the worst about Austin, she did not know that Austin had been forced by his grandfather to take on family business which led him back to her on a grander scale.

title: After Divorce, My Ex-Wife Became a Billionaire
synopsis: In After Divorce My Ex-Wife Became a Billionaire movie, Claire, secretly the heir to a vast fortune, hides her true identity to marry Milo out of love. Living in Los Angeles, she quietly uses her wealth and influence to smooth out the obstacles on Milo's path to building his startup. Just as Milo is on the brink of success, Claire discovers he's been unfaithful. Confronted, Milo admits he's fallen out of love, speaks harshly to her, dismisses all she's done for him, and pressures her into a divorce. Heartbroken and deeply disappointed, Claire decides to reclaim her position as a billionaire heiress. She withdraws all her support, and lets Milo face the consequences of his actions, making him regret everything he's done.

title: Meet My Brothers
synopsis: In Meet My Brothers movie, Catherine Rowen spent three years as a contract wife, treated like a servant and discarded the moment her divorce papers were signed. Pregnant, humiliated, and threatened by her husband’s mistress, she hits her lowest point, until a helicopter lands, revealing the truth: she is the long-lost daughter of the powerful Lane family, rightful sister of Dominic, Connor, and Liam.

title: How to Land a Movie Star
synopsis: When ambitious casting assistant Cleo Marlowe risks everything to convince movie star Blake Wilder to act in her movie, she doesn’t expect him to say yes, or for the paparazzi to catch her walking out of his house. Branded as the girl who slept her way to a get ahead, Cleo becomes Hollywood’s favorite rumor. But while her reputation takes a nosedive, the notoriously cold and gruff Blake starts to show up for her in ways she never saw coming.

title: After Cancer I Turn into A Badass
synopsis: Evelyn has long been oppressed by her stepsister, misunderstood by her husband, and looked down upon by her family. After being misdiagnosed with terminal cancer, she suddenly comes to her sense and decides to live her final days to the fullest. She turns into a fierce diva, taking revenge on her oblivious husband and her evil stepsister. However, her husband suddenly realizes that he has mistaken someone else for his lifesaver...

title: Sisterhood of Lies: Pledge for Revenge
synopsis: In Sisterhood of Lies Pledge for Revenge movie, after Ashlyn dies in a sorority hazing “accident,” her identical twin sister June takes her place to get revenge on the real killers — Ashlyn’s back-stabbing bestie and her frat-bro boyfriend.

title: The Billionaire Firefighter and His Sweet Wife
synopsis: In The Billionaire Firefighter and His Sweet Wife Movie, on the wedding day, a fire breaks out. Chloe's fiancé, Kevin, abandons her to save his stepsister, Rachel, leaving her in danger. Leo rushes into the flames to rescue her. To reclaim her mother’s inheritance, Chloe impulsively marries Leo, unaware that he’s actually a billionaire CEO. As time passes, Leo begins to fall for Chloe ultimately becoming utterly devoted to her.

title: I Am Bloody Mary
synopsis: In I Am Bloody Mary movie, Mare and her fiancé Nick may not have much money, but they have love. As a foster kid with no family of her own, Mare dreams of a wedding with Nick’s family by their side, but Nick is secretive about his estranged relatives. Then, unexpectedly, his mother arrives, warmly inviting Mare into the wealthy and mysterious Thornwood family. She even offers to host the wedding at their grand estate. But the morning of the ceremony, a horrifying discovery shatters Mare's dream, and she realizes she’s not walking into a happy-ever-after, but into a nightmare twisted by the Thornwood family’s dark history--one that might end up killing her.

title: Understated Guardian King
synopsis: "Retired special forces soldier Cole Slade—codename “Reaper”—goes into hiding as a security guard to fulfill his fallen comrade Alexander’s last wish: protect his younger sister, Victoria. On Victoria’s wedding day, the groom runs away, the guests vanish, and a carefully planned corporate conspiracy comes to light. When the proud Victoria forces Cole into a fake marriage, they’re pushed into an uneasy alliance against their sworn enemy, Tristan—an ambitious man set on taking over the Kingsley family’s tech empire. As Cole’s lethal battlefield instincts resurface—from a bloody fight in the church to displays of overwhelming power at high-society banquets—they face not only Tristan’s deadly retaliation, but also the shocking truth that Victoria’s uncle, Conrad, is the mastermind. When a bloodstained dog tag reveals what really happened to Alexander, Cole must use the most extreme measures to protect this marriage—born from a lie—through both corporate warfare and gunfire."

title: We're Your Parents
synopsis: A college freshman comes home for her family's legendary Thanksgiving feast and starts to suspect there's something very wrong with her parents.

title: My Hockey Alpha
synopsis: Nina runs into hot hockey captain Enzo at a party after she catches her boyfriend Justin cheating. Since Enzo's a known player who only sleeps with girls once, Nina agrees to a no strings attached night of fun with Enzo, but when they both catch feelings, Nina learns that Enzo's player reputation is due to a rule: he can't have sex with anyone twice, or they'll die. The catch is...if Nina's his fated mate, she's safe. But that's not all. Enzo's got a crazy ex-hookup who won't let him go and wants to make Lisa's life a living hell. And once Nina lost her virginity, her true hybrid nature emerged, putting her sister Selena's crosshairs. Selena wants to escape the Lycan World by switching places with Nina. While Enzo and Nina try to navigate their budding romance amidst never ending drama, the Sister kidnaps Nina to the Lycan World--all with the help of Nina's internship colleague James. All the while Enzo is fighting to stake his pack's place in the human world by winning a hockey tournament against his sworn enemy Ronan, while Enzo's father plans to marry him off to none other than Nina's sister Selena. In the end, Enzo wins his tournament, and Selena comes into the human world and pretends to be Nina, until Enzo's father blows her cover. Enzo races to the Lycan World to save Nina, and they finally have sex for the second time and learn that Nina is, indeed, Enzo's fated mate. Enzo has one more rule...no more sex without engagement, and he takes Nina as his fiance...and they live happily ever after.

title: Why My Contract Ex-Husband Keeps Chasing Me
synopsis: In Why My Contract Ex Husband Keeps Chasing Me movie: Natasha marries Jaxon to be able to pay for her mom's hospital bills. Jaxon's grandfather had offered her a contract to be Jaxon's wife. While the two started their marriage happily, things got twisted when Jaxon is tricked into believing Isabella saved him. He grows resentment towards Natasha, who finally had enough when Isabella was attempting to frame her and sabotage her pregnancy. Natasha divorces Jaxon, who believes she is a cheater and was only ever after his money. Ultimately, Jaxon learns everything he knew about Natasha was wrong, and that she is a lost heiress herself. He learns that she genuinely loved him, and he lives in his regret trying to win her back.

title: Audrey in Full Bloom
synopsis: In Audrey in Full Bloom movie, Harvard MBA Audrey Lorenzo Bloom is on her way to shatter barriers as powerful conglomerate BloomCo’s first female and non-white CEO. She’s been preparing for years, even using an alias as a Latina cleaning lady to learn the inner workings of the company. Now on the eve of the banquet introducing her, Audrey discovers her fiancé thinks she’s an illegal alien and plans to defraud and deport her, the senior executives are plotting a coup to put her white cousin in charge, and her bitterest enemy since childhood, Ryder Marlow, might not be her enemy after all…

title: I Hired a Billionaire Manny
synopsis: 5 years ago, Sienna and Damian had an one night stand. Now, she's back with their daughter Poppy as the CEO of a huge production company in LA. To reconnect with them, Damian hides his billionaire identity and becomes Poppy's manny. Will they stand against the world and build a new life as a family?

title: Creation Itself Is Love
synopsis: Mia Langford, a talented but financially struggling art student, never expected her quiet life to collide with power, desire, and betrayal. A single reckless moment in class—an impulsive gaze and a forbidden sketch—draws the attention of her professor, Wesley Winslow, a brilliant yet dangerous man whose presence alters the trajectory of her world. Before Mia can understand the shift, her manipulative stepmother arranges a sudden engagement between her and Wesley’s entitled son, Darius—an alliance designed entirely for wealth and influence. But everything changes on a fateful night when, drugged and blindfolded, Mia ends up in Wesley’s arms instead of her fiancé’s. What should have been a mistake becomes an irreversible entanglement—emotionally, physically, and morally. As their forbidden bond deepens, Mia becomes trapped between two powerful men—one who seeks to possess her and one who risks everything to protect her. Darius, driven by jealousy, control, and entitlement, escalates his obsession. He forces Mia into humiliation, threatens her reputation, and captures evidence meant to destroy her future, using blackmail and emotional warfare to keep her under his control. Meanwhile, Mia fights for dignity in a world determined to shame and silence her. Rumors spread on campus, classmates turn against her, and her image becomes a weapon used to dismantle the life she worked so hard to build. Wesley becomes her only refuge—but also her biggest contradiction: the man she should run from, and the only one she wants. Their connection grows from forbidden desire to something dangerously close to love—forcing both to confront their fears, ethics, and the power structures binding them. In a world where everything—her body, her name, her future—is being claimed by others, Mia must decide whether to surrender…or fight for her identity, her freedom, and her own voice.

title: Sleep with Me, Mortal!
synopsis: In search of the "masculine energy" she needs to balance her magical power, naive witch Astrid Hall leaves her all-female coven for a co-ed private school where sparks fly between her and blind but devastatingly handsome Nate Woodford. When she discovers the curse that robs him of his sight, they make a deal: if she cures him and returns his vision, he'll do anything she asks. But Astrid is in for the culture shock of her life when she learns "sleeping together" doesn't quite mean what she thought it did!

title: My Dear Brother is Obsessed With Me
synopsis: Clyde enlists small time actress, Violet, to play the role of his long-lost sister, fulfilling his father's dying wish. Together, they face constant scrutiny and challenges from the antagonist. Living together , they inadvertently developed a forbidden romance. Determined to prove their taboo relationship, the antagonist sought to tarnish their reputation, leading Clyde's father to arrange Violet's marriage to another. In a desperate bid to reclaim their love, Clyde resolved to interrupt the wedding ceremony...

title: Taming My Ex's Billionaire Uncle
synopsis: Cora comes from an ordinary middle-class family. On a rainy night, she is first abandoned by her fiancé Finn, and then entrusted by her ailing father to Neo as someone under his guardianship. Neo is a cold, sharp minded lawyer and the man in power behind the Garcia family, the richest family of all. Forced to live under the same roof with him, Cora finds herself constantly confronting his presence. Neo is rational and dangerous, a man who never lets anyone get close to him easily—yet Cora seems to be the exception. Through repeated clashes, Cora chips away at Neo's indifference with her intelligence and subtle allure. Meanwhile, Neo struggles between restraint and desire: he wants to push her away, yet cannot ignore the growing pull he feels toward her. Gradually, Cora realizes that what she wants is not merely revenge on Finn, but to take control of her own fate—and to shake the heart of this untouchable man. But just as Neo finally begins to lower his guard, Cora discovers that deep in his heart there exists someone else: a “white moonlight” who has long since gone to Europe.

title: CEO Queen: A Mother’s Revenge
synopsis: In CEO Queen A Mother’s Revenge movie, after 15 years of living as a humble orphanage worker, Mary Miller's peaceful life is shattered when a brain hemorrhage leaves her comatose. While her youngest adopted daughter Grace desperately tries to save her life by selling her own blood, her other children Rose and William reveal their true cruel nature. When Mary finally wakes and claims to be Phoenix Group's legendary CEO, she faces brutal mockery and violence. But those who dare abuse the "delusional old woman" are about to learn they've made a terrible mistake—as Mary's vast empire prepares to strike back against all who wronged her family, while rewarding the one daughter who loved her without knowing her true identity.

title: The Art of Letting Go
synopsis: When Olivia signs up for a life-saving surgery that will erase every memory - including the man who broke her heart - she's finally ready to walk away from her painful marriage. But with 14 days left on the clock, her cold, distant husband realizes too late what he's about to lose.

title: True Heiress Never Lies!
synopsis: Pampered real heiress Ellie is framed and sent to juvenile detention by her family. They believe she lives comfortably, unaware that under the fake daughter's orders, Ellie suffers brutal abuse. Three years later, she is released, broken inside, but still seen as spoiled. Only when her father beats her and her prosthetic falls off do they realize the truth...

title: The Adjuster
synopsis: In The Adjuster movie, after his sister dies due to losing health coverage, Matteo Leone, a broken man, takes justice into his own hands by killing the insurance company CEO. But he isn't just out for revenge, he has a bigger goal: Expose corrupt health insurance companies for preying on their most vulnerable customers. Matteo stays one step ahead of the police, leaving a trail of clues to send his message, soon becoming a hero to the people the evil CEO's thought they could silence.

title: Stay-at-Home Dad Levels Up
synopsis: The Stay-At-Home Dad Levels Up tells the story of Jack Parker, a penniless orphan deeply devoted to his wife and son. Unfortunately for Jack, his wife’s family has always disapproved of him, and are actively trying to sabotage their relationship. All that changes when Jack becomes the heir to one of the richest companies in the world. Now Jack must convince them that he is really a billionaire, before they sabotage his marriage, get his daughter taken away, or even have him killed.

title: How I Made the Alpha Mine
synopsis: In How I Made the Alpha Mine movie, Luca Conri is the wolf-less runt of the Nightreign Pack, whose bark is bigger than his bite. Tormented by his own Pack and hunted by rivals, Luca is reluctantly put under the protection of his dominant Alpha -- and older brother's best friend -- Dalton Grey. However, everything changes when the two become fated mates, a bond that violates the natural order of the Pack. As enemies close in and traditions try to tear them apart, Luca and Dalton must decide if they want to give into their lustful temptations in a forbidden romance that threatens their own lives.

title: The Billionaire and the Baby Trap
synopsis: In The Billionaire and the Baby Trap movie, to get out of her loveless marriage, Elara needs to get pregnant, but her husband refuses to touch her. One fateful night, she finds herself in Cole's arms, not knowing he's a secret billionaire CEO -- and her husband's uncle. When will Elara realize Cole's identity -- and that he's just the Mr. Right she's been looking for.

title: Falling for My Dad's Best Friend
synopsis: In Falling for My Dad's Best Friend, Kylie, a bold young woman infatuated with her dad's best friend. Jaxon tests his limits as she tempts him with Kylie's charm. As Jaxon struggles to resist her, the tension between them escalates, leading to an ultimate betrayal that changes everything.

title: Pregnant by the Golden Billionaire Bachelor
synopsis: After a one-night stand with an infertile billionaire silver fox, a 45 year old maid discovers she’s pregnant with his twins… as he strives to secure his company’s legacy by producing heirs, they must navigate their clashing worlds and unexpected feelings to see if they can build a family together.

title: Wings of Fire: The Dragon Slayer Is My Ex-Lover
synopsis: In Wings of Fire The Dragon Slayer Is My Ex-Lover movie, Freya Swann turned her back on her first love, Tristan Blackwater five years ago…But she never told him she had his child! Now he’s returned to the kingdom as a dragon-slaying hero and Freya is his personal servant! Will Freya finally tell Tristan the truth?

title: The Lady Boss's Small Town Valentine
synopsis: In The Lady Boss's Small Town Valentine Movie, a workaholic's life is turned upside down when she finds out her fiance is having an affair with her horrible assistant. She blows the biggest deal of her life when she has a breakdown over it during the pitch. Now, her grandfather, the CEO of her hotel company, relocates her to a tiny mountain town to take over one of their failing properties. To make matters worse, she's stuck with a small town (but devilishly handsome), co-manager, who cares more about people than profits. And she has to live with the co-manager in a little chalet...

title: Mafia Boss Owns My Body
synopsis: Law student Lily Wingrove has run out of options. Her mother is dying, and the bills keep coming. Desperate, she signs a contract with young mafia boss Eric Moretti, offering her body in exchange for money. Eric moves fast. Money appears. Threats disappear. He is ruthless but magnetic, and every time he saves her, his power pulls her closer. Then he places her in the world of his sworn rival, star prosecutor Daniel Hayes. To the city, Daniel is justice itself. To Lily, he is patient, kind, and everything Eric is not. He protects her with law instead of fear. His love feels pure, even healing. But something beneath his perfection feels wrong. He knows too much, reacts too quickly, and his care sometimes feels like control. Now two men fight for her in opposite ways: one through dominance, the other through devotion. As her mother’s time runs out, Lily must decide who to trust before both the devil’s power and the angel’s secret destroy her.

title: Backstage Romance with the Popstar
synopsis: In Backstage Romance with the Popstar movie, Rockstar Dexter Hayes thinks he found his next hit when he dumps his loyal assistant Casey for rising star Scarlett Hart. What he doesn’t know is that Casey is living a double life as Echo, the mysterious super-producer who built his career and secretly owns his label. As the truth unravels, can Dexter and Casey can find their way back to the music, and to each other?

title: Accelerating Love
synopsis: At her wedding, ordinary girl Lillian experiences a heartbreaking betray when she catches her boyfriend cheating with her best friend. In the moment of desperation and defiane, she determined to prove her own worth and impulsively takes the hand of a scruffy mechanic Luca, who stands beside her as it happens. Instead of becoming a burden, their marriage flourishes as they navigate a series of sweet, unexpected moments and overcome challenges together. To Lillian's surprise, Luca is not just a simple mechanic - he is secretly Hamilton, a billionaire CEO and legendary race car driver. What started as a fake marriage turns into genuine love. Watch as the two of them join forces to write a extraordinary rising love story!

title: Hold Me in the Dark
synopsis: The new intern, Isla, never imagined that the cold and demanding CEO Christian — who shoved her relentlessly on the tennis court during the day — was the same person who broadened her view to unknown territories at night in an exclusive BDSM club. But when the mask comes off and secretive identities assimilate into reality, is this a game she can stay afloat… or submerge deep within the shadows of desire seeking unexpected redemption?  Produced by：Vantage Entertainment

title: Son in Law's Revenge
synopsis: After being mistreated by his wife’s family for years, Leo discovers that he is the heir to a vast fortune. Now it’s time — for revenge!

title: Succession: Beauty and the Billionaire
synopsis: Grace Esther's life falls apart when her mother kicks her out after discovering she's not her real daughter, and her boyfriend also leaves her for her step-sister. Fortunately, an old family friend takes her in. There, she meets his attractive CEO grandson, Aden, who gives her a job as his assistant, and they soon develop a romantic connection. What she doesn't know is that her real father has finally heard about her and is desperate to find her...

title: Taming the Mafia Boss, He's Mine Now!
synopsis: In Taming the Mafia Boss He's Mine Now movie: Leah, the daughter of the Cruz family, appears to be a "fierce delicate flower" who throws money around in nightclubs and acts in a cynical way on the surface. In reality, she is a down-and-out heir whose power was seized by her stepfather. During a misunderstanding, Leah, fueled by alcohol, generously spent a large sum of money and "kept" Allen, the "bankrupt noble young master" — little did she know that this man whom she could pin against the wall and whose shirt she tore open was actually the person in power of the Smith family, a mafia clan. A misunderstanding about "keeping someone" kicks off: He can wear an apron and cook dinner, and when she is framed by her stepsister Lisa, he will press the muzzle of a gun against the forehead of the enemy. She once thought that he was a person in distress who needed her protection, but when she herself was in trouble, she discovered that the overwhelming power of the Smith family could be casually wielded by him — she thought she was the hunter, but she didn't know that from the moment she pinned him against the locker, he was willing to shed all his disguises just for her... Let's see how Leah makes a comeback from the "sugar mommy" to become the wife of the mafia boss, staging an ultimate love story between two powerful individuals where "You hide your power to protect my vulnerable part, and I shed my thorns to give you my sincere heart."

title: My Step-Brother is My Ex?!
synopsis: My Step-Brother is My Ex?! full movie tells a story that four years ago, a misunderstanding ripped Hannah Hart and Dean Dumont apart. Hannah vowed she would never see Dean again... until her father unexpectedly remarried Dean’s mother. Now Dean and Hannah are stepsiblings… but neither of them know it!

title: When Love's Sorrow Plays Again
synopsis: Christy Lane, famous violinist, is forced to betray the love of her life. Pregnant and destitute, an illness slowly robs her of her ability to perform. All she has left now is an instrument she can no longer play--and a seven year old daughter, determined to bring Daddy back.

title: The CEO's Wife is A Badass
synopsis: In The CEO's Wife is A Badass movie, Cora, a modest artist and the wife of billionaire Brandon Pearson, finds herself managing his gallery while he's away on business. However, her role as the CEO's wife is unexpectedly eclipsed by her college classmate Ashley, leaving Cora scorned by her colleagues. Can Cora reclaim her place and prove her worth?

title: The Magnificent Bodyguard
synopsis: Caspian's the best special forces soldier the world's ever seen. Desperate to find out what happened to his parents, he takes on a dangerous mission — protect the genius CEO who found the cure for cancer, Chloe Brooks. Under constant attack from greedy men who want to take her cure for their own profit, Chloe will do anything to keep DIVINIA, the miracle drug, and her sister Iris safe. The only one who can help her? Caspian, who saves her time and time. But who IS he? Why is he so good at fighting? And can Chloe trust him, when their first meeting ended with a steamy one night stand!?

title: My Boss Loves Me Too Much
synopsis: In My Boss Loves Me Too Much movie, Ella planned to challenge herself by taking a new job after years of managing crises, but her world is turned upside down when her new boss, Christian, drags her in a fake marriage! What starts as a simple arrangement soon becomes something far more intense. Every touch, every kiss, draws Ella deeper into his world. But what she doesn’t know is that Christian has been playing a dangerous game all along, determined to make her his forever.

title: Feast of Power
synopsis: In Feast of Power movie, Nick, who's secretly the wealthiest man in the world, lives as stay-at-home husband with his wife, Bella. Just as he’s about to reveal his true identity and share his wealth and power with her, he discovers Bella’s betrayal. Nick realizes he had mistaken Bella for his true love. He later finds Elena, a woman who loves him for who he is, not for his wealth or power. Determined, Nick takes back everything he had planned to give Bella and chooses to share it with Elena instead, leaving Bella full of regret.

title: He Said the Baby Was Too Expensive
synopsis: In He Said the Baby Was Too Expensive movie, heiress Iris gave up her family fortune to marry Dorian, a poor average-joe. Three years later, she's about to welcome her first child, when suddenly, her crazy control-freak mother-in-law (Tessa) insists the hospital she's staying at is too expensive. Tessa manages to convince Dorian that they should switch to a cheaper hospital. Dorian, being a spineless mama's boy, gives in to all of Tessa's demands and starts bullying Iris too. Iris fights off increasingly unreasonable demands, all while dealing with unbearable pain in her heavily pregnant belly. Just as she can't take it anymore, Iris's father finally appears, bearing gifts for his new grandchild. How will Alec defend his daughter? When will Iris give her husband and mother-in-law a slap in the face?

title: The Photo that Changed Everything
synopsis: On their wedding night, the CEO of the Walker Group, Griffin Walker, is tied up to a chair and forced to witness his wife Isabella cheat on him with three men at the same time. Enraged, he seeks revenge, but Isabella stops him in his tracks with a single photograph. For the next eighteen years, Griffin willingly raises Isabella's twins - a boy and a girl - born from her and one of those men, Ethan. He endures humiliation and mockery from them and is forced to transfer his company and all assets to the twins when they turn eighteen. Everyone thinks Griffin is held captive by that single photo, but at the moment Isabella's family celebrates their triumph, Griffin finally reveals the truth...

title: My Billionaire Sugar Baby
synopsis: Catherine Rogers might only be the contract wife, so we can't compare her with the rightful partner! My Billionaire Sugar Baby Trailer shows this part as she has a steamy intercourse with her sugar baby, Adam Hartford. Adam teaches Catherine golf, the arts of kissing, and staying away from predators! What are his methods?

title: Mistaken as the Mistress
synopsis: In Mistaken as the Mistress movie, Vivian comes home early to celebrate her son Noah's engagement party. But his fiancée Mia mistakes her as his mistress, resulting in Vivian's public shame and abuse. When Noah arrives and finds his mother missing, he quickly erupts in anger and vows to find his mother at all costs!

title: The Heiress Is Back, Three Brothers on Their Knees
synopsis: 18-year-old Blair Beaumont is the genius heiress of the richest family in the U.S. After spending three years preparing to take over the family business, she's ready to return home and announce herself the next successor. But Blair's world shatters once she sees her mother, once beloved in the household, now being beaten and branded a 'homewrecker' by Blair's three older brothers. Even her father has turned against her, replacing his wife with the family maid as 'Mrs. Beaumont.' What happened during Blair's absence? Can she expose the truth behind her family's betrayal and get justice for her mother?

title: The Gourmet CEO Turns out to Be My Baby's Dad
synopsis: Betrayed by her family, Skylar is forced into a compromising situation with a sleazy-looking director in exchange for her grandmother's medical bills. However, she unexpectedly has a one-night stand with Maxwell, CEO of Klein Group, instead, leading to an unplanned pregnancy. Sent abroad, Skyhlar returns six years later with her son and opens a restaurant. Fate eventually brings her and Maxwell back... Will he recognize Skylar as the unforgettable woman from that fateful night?

title: Slimming Revolution
synopsis: In Slimming Revolution Movie, Declan, the Harrison family's heir, marries Claire, the daughter of a wealthy tycoon, due to a family arrangement. However, on their wedding day, Declan is shocked to see that Claire, whom he's meeting for the first time, is a plus-size woman, nearly 300 pounds. The wedding guests quickly turn Declan into the laughingstock of the event. Reluctantly, Declan starts married life with this stranger, and Claire's intense love for him only adds to his stress. When Claire's efforts to protect their love inadvertently anger Declan, he, obsessed with appearances, cruelly takes out his frustrations on her, even criticizing her weight. Feeling deeply hurt, Claire decides to embark on a journey to lose weight, determined to make Declan regret his actions.

title: Forgive Me, Forget Me Not
synopsis: In Forgive Me, Forget Me Not movie, Lottie is forced to give up on the man she loves in order to save his life. Year later, she runs into him again and he's a bigshot lawyer with billions at his disposal. But not only that, he has a cold hard vendetta against her... for stabbing him.

title: My Ex is in the Navy SEALs
synopsis: In My Ex is in the Navy SEALs movie, six years ago, Regina chose to break up with her boyfriend Julian to avoid hindering his promising military career due to her overwhelming debt. Six years later, they reunite in a foreign land, Julian is now a commanding officer, while Regina is a single mother. Their chemistry reignites, but their bonding faces uncertainties of their class differences and pressure from people around them. This time, will they find their way back to love again?

title: Coaching His Heart
synopsis: In Coaching His Heart movie, after a one-night stand, Kate and Tom are separated by a misunderstanding. They reunite one month later when Kate becomes the assistant coach of a men's hockey team and Tom joins as their new captain. Forced to work in close proximity, sparks of their unresolved passion begin to reignite. Only this time, Kate must hide a big secret to keep her job—she's pregnant with Tom's child - a revelation that could change everything.

title: When Love Comes Too Late
synopsis: A car accident leaves Winnie's daughter on the brink of death. Her doctor husband, Aaron, chooses to save his first love Monica's child instead, leading to the death of his own daughter. Winnie seeks justice for her lost child, only to face relentless interference from Monica and distrust from her husband.

title: The Boy I Hate
synopsis: When her boyfriend suddenly drops out of their roadtrip to her best friend's wedding, Samantha Smiles is forced to take the long drive from LA to NYC with the boy she's spent the last five years trying to forget. The boy she spent one secret summer night with. The boy she let take ALL her firsts: Tristan Montgomery, AKA her best friend's older brother! Torn between loyalty and her resurfacing (mutual?) feelings for Tristan, Samantha has to make a choice: will she keep living for others, or will she finally, for once, do something for herself?!

title: Mommy, I Got You A Date
synopsis: Liam and Annie were a young couple until Annie was nearly assaulted. In the process of saving her, Liam severely injured the attacker, resulting in his imprisonment. The wealthy Holland family head revealed Liam as their heir, forcing Annie to leave him by promising to save him if she agreed, hiding her pregnancy and pretending to love money. Six years later, Annie is a janitor, and Liam is the Holland heir. Despite his resentment, Liam still loves Annie and repeatedly saves her, but she avoids him, fearing for their son Henry's safety and feeling guilty for the past. Liam decides to win her back by focusing on Henry, believing that with Henry, Annie will return. He carefully plans to remove the obstacles that separated them.

title: The Billionaire's Fake Wife
synopsis: In The Billionaire's Fake Wife movie, when an explosion destroys Dr. Jen Connor’s lab, billionaire heir Roman Johnson rescues her and her comatose sister. Jen offers Roman one impossible deal: she'll pose as his sweet, old-fashioned fiancée for one weekend, so his cold, powerful father may restore the foundation funding she desperately needs. But inside the lavish Johnson estate, Jen faces ruthless tests from staff, family and Roman’s venomous ex-fiancée Kim, who begins to suspect the truth. As romantic tension builds between Jen and Roman, so does the risk of discovery. What starts as a lie becomes dangerously close to real love, just as Kim uncovers the secret Jen hoped would stay buried.

title: You Fired a Fashion Icon
synopsis: Dani, a mousy, plain-looking designer, saves her company's Paris Fashion Week show only to have her success stolen by lazy but stylish intern Brynn, who gets Dani FIRED by her boss's power-hungry daughter. But when a rival fashion house recruits Dani, she gets the glow-up of the century and becomes determined to show off her design skills and reclaim her title as the true couture QUEEN.

title: Fate Beneath Your Tender Torture
synopsis: By day, Caroline is an icy corporate executive; by night, she masks up in leather and slips into an underground club, hunting the man responsible for her miscarriage. There, a mysterious younger aristocrat draws out desires she’s long buried— only to reappear days later as a new “intern” at her company. Is he an ally… or her next threat?

title: The Break-up Bet With My Billionaire Ex
synopsis: In The Break-up Bet With My Billionaire Ex movie, when Layla and Joshua break up, they sign a separation agreement: If they're both still single in five years, they get married. Five years later, after becoming the world's hottest and wealthiest chef, Joshua takes the position of head chef at the restuarant where Layla works. Joshua wants her to fulfill the contract, but with her health in an unstable condition, Layla lies and says she's already engaged. Still, an undeniable chemistry builds between them, and the flames of love become hard to suppress. Will Joshua ultimately discover Layla's lie? Can they bridge the gap of lost time and truly be together again, love conquering all?

title: My Duplicated Husband
synopsis: In My Duplicated Husband movie, for five years, Esther has been trapped in an abusive marriage. Her husband, Carl, cheated on her, was physically violent, and indirectly caused the death of their daughter. On their fifth wedding anniversary, during another violent confrontation, Carl dies accidentally. In shock, Esther buries his body in the backyard and goes to sleep. The next morning, Carl appears in front of her again — alive and behaving like the caring, gentle man he once was when they first fell in love. His personality no longer matches the abusive husband she buried. Esther begins to question what is happening. Did Carl somehow return from the dead, or has someone replaced him?

title: Your Love Broke My Heart
synopsis: Seraph was a princess cherished by her family her entire life, until her sister was murdered. When her husband and best friend helped the killer escape justice, she was forced to grow up overnight.

title: Mother Warrior Unleashed
synopsis: In Mother Warrior Unleashed movie, when her teenage daughter is grabbed by sex traffickers, the legendary warrior, Navy SEAL Lieutenant Phoenix Ryan, abandons her life of anonymity as a small town diner owner to rescue her daughter and destroy the Navarro Cartel that has taken her.

title: Crossing The Line To Love
synopsis: In Crossing The Line To Love movie: three days before her wedding, freelance writer Nichole catches her fiancé in bed with her bridesmaid. In a moment of heartbreak and rage, she storms into a bar and kisses a random stranger—only to realize he’s Fabian Winston, a wildly popular contemporary artist and the sole heir to a powerful elite family. The kiss goes viral overnight. Faced with mounting public pressure and relentless media, Nichole is pushed into a contract marriage with Fabian. What starts as a scandal-driven deal slowly unravels into a messy, irresistible entanglement of power, secrets, and unexpected feelings.

title: Love in the Ashes of us
synopsis: In Love in the Ashes of us movie, Nina and Easton have been in love for ten years. She stands by him through everything, from his days as an unknown student to becoming a billionaire. But just as Easton reaches the height of his success, Nina catches him getting too close with his business partner, Candice. With Candice stirring the pot, Nina finally gives up on him completely. One day, the three of them board the same flight. Mid-air, the plane experiences a sudden emergency. During the crash landing, Easton chooses to protect Candice—leaving Nina, who is pregnant with twins, in critical danger...

title: Callsign: Legacy
synopsis: In Callsign Legacy movie, when lowly enlisted man Cole Summers sneaks into a Navy Flight Simulator and completes mission simulation that no one else can, the Navy realizes that he's their only hope to prevent WWIII...  but first he must deal with crooked politicans, evil tech billionaires, and even his own disgraced family legacy.

title: You Fired the Backbone of Detroit
synopsis: In You Fired the Backbone of Detroit movie, Hank Walker, mechanic by day and genius auto engineer by night, is fired under new management. Betrayed, Hank is offered a dream job from rival company Mach 15. Will Hank get to build the supercar of his dreams? Or will interference from rivals old and new cost him everything?

title: Dungeons of Ecstasy
synopsis: In Dungeons of Ecstasy movie, after a near-fatal car crash shatters her body and her heart, travel journalist Emily escapes to remote Italy—only to be ensnared in the mysterious Dungeon of Ecstasy, where her captor, uncannily resembling her long-abandoned ex-husband, forces her through dangerous, sensual trials that awaken forbidden memories and a love she never knew was meant to heal her.

title: Pregnant and Married to a Movie Star
synopsis: In Pregnant and Married to a Movie Star full movie, pregnant and broke bartender Lacey is offered the role of a lifetime when non-commital movie star Chris Powell asks her to pose as his fiancee. Neither of them knows that the baby she's carrying is actually his.

title: The Ex-Wife's Comeback Strategy
synopsis: In The Ex-Wife's Comeback Strategy Movie, after hooking up with her husband Benjamin who she's never met before, Aria learns that he wants a divorce with her. Her plan to just run away is demolished by her studio's new commission, which is to design Benjamin's new house. Aria hides her identity and starts working with Benjamin for the cash. Benjamin falls for his designer Aria during this time, as she develops feelings for him too...

title: Take Me Hades, I'm Dying
synopsis: When her sister gets blackmailed by a ruthless sex club owner, Dakota James is desperate enough to offer a contract relationship to Jaxon Shaw, a mysterious billionaire who never touches his lovers.  Until Dakota.  From her first touch, Jaxon starts to feel.  Their secret relationship ends brutally when Dakota discovers she's dying and breaks up with Jaxon to protect him.  When Dakota gets in too deep with the club owner, she is saved by the masked man Hades—Jaxon in disguise.  But time is running out for the fated lovers. Will Jaxon uncover Dakota’s deadly secret in time to save her?  Or will the forces against them destroy their love before it’s too late.

title: The Little Witch
synopsis: Freya is kidnapped by a coven of witches, hidden away in a tower like Rapunzel, waiting for the day her magic awakens. The evil witche's plan is thwarted when a brave witch hunter saves Freya and runs away with her. Now Freya must navigate a modern world that she's never lived in before, and learn the true meaning of love and sacrifice.

title: Love Me Two Times
synopsis: Emma and Liam shared a magical night together that ended abruptly when Liam left the next morning without a explanation. Six months later, they get reunited at Emma's sister's wedding where Liam is the best man. As their unsolved feelings come rushing back, Emma decides to fake date Liam for the weekend to get her ex to leave her alone.

title: XL Stands for Xtra Love
synopsis: Ellie wants to be a world famous model, but no one'll give a chubby girl a chance. She has a one-night stand with fashion company CEO Eason, raising their son Lucas alone. Hoping to land a job as a model, she answers HALE Group's casting call only to discover that the boss interviewing is her baby daddy, Eason Hale himself!

title: Song of My Mother's Tears
synopsis: In Song of My Mother's Tears movie, Faith searches for her lost family when she learns that she doesn't have long to live. But turns out, they're the people she hates the most!

title: Rock On! Band Beauty in Disguise
synopsis: This story follows Astra, a determined girl gifted with extraordinary strength. When her twin brother loses his voice before a crucial band rehearsal, he’s threatened by a lawsuit. Astra steps in for him. Disguised as a boy, she resides in the boys’ dorm to uphold the ruse despite lacking musical talent and being unmistakably female. Amidst comedic mishaps and tense moments, Astra discovers unexpected love and genuine companionship.

title: Legally Bound To Love
synopsis: The story follows Leilani, whose adoptive father has been framed by her ex-boyfriend. Desperate for help, she turns to the one man she trusts the least—Diego Marlowe, a ruthless, undefeated attorney who also happens to be her enemy’s future brother-in-law. What begins as a dangerous deal and a fake relationship soon spirals into a high-stakes game of power, secrets, and irresistible attraction. As they use each other to navigate the battles surrounding them, one question lingers: Is Diego truly just her lawyer—or something far more dangerous to her heart?

title: The Summer My Heart Stopped
synopsis: High school senior, Isabel, will soon die from a serious heart condition. She has a secret crush on her best friend Alex, and plans to confess her feelings to him after graduation. However, a huge misunderstanding in the middle of senior year ruins their friendship. Alex now holds a grudge against Isabel. He even lets her classmates bully her. Ten years later, Alex finds a collection of short vlogs that Isabel left for him. The videos reveal a shocking truth, a truth that completely changes Alex's world.

title: The Elite Heir's Ultimate Comeback
synopsis: In The Elite Heir's Ultimate Comeback movie, Hector and Alice have been in love for years. But just as Hector is about to reveal his true identity, a tragic accident leaves him in a coma. Alice’s family, despite their limited resources, contributes what they can to his recovery. As Hector slowly regains consciousness, he can only communicate by pressing a call button. Meanwhile, an antagonist posing as a doctor manipulates the family. In a critical moment, Hector finally speaks, warning the antagonist that with a single phone call, he can bring them to justice.

title: Confessions of a Vegas Showgirl
synopsis: She’s a stripper trying to escape her past and survive. He’s the billionaire who never forgot her. She never thought she’d see him again after high school—until he walks into her club and proposes. Now she must hide their marriage from everyone who could destroy them both… and find out if he truly loves her, or just loves owning her.

title: The One I Never Forget
synopsis: In The One I Never Forget movie, five years ago, a tragedy that claimed the lives of loved ones from both sides forced Sofia​ and Justin​ apart, a separation further complicated by Doris's​ lies, Sofia's miscarriage, and Justin's severe injury. Five years later, Sofia returns to Los Angeles as a renowned journalist, while Justin has become a baseball superstar. Their reunion is fraught with conflict, fueled by misunderstandings (Sofia falsely claims to be married; Justin mistakenly believes Sofia left him for money), obstructions (continued opposition from Doris and schemes by Esther), and danger (Esther's plot to commit murder). Ultimately, Justin uncovers the whole truth about the past, Doris confesses her wrongdoing, and Esther is exposed for her crimes and arrested. Transcending their pain, Sofia and Justin achieve dual fulfillment in their careers (Sofia completes her major report; Justin wins a championship) and in love. Their story highlights how honesty and forgiveness can allow love to be reborn from the ruins of lies and violence.

title: Secret Billionaire Returns on Christmas
synopsis: This Christmas, Eddie travels to his loving wife’s hometown to finally reveal he’s the billionaire CEO of the nation’s hottest start-up. But in a house and town full of Scrooges, will Eddie’s arrival be a Christmas present, or go down like a lump of coal?

title: My Scar, His Debt to Pay
synopsis: Rachel and Ethan were trapped in a war zone. While trying to save Ethan, Rachel was left with a disfiguring scar on her face. They fell in love and got married, but there was only one evacuation spot. Rachel gave it to the injured Ethan, and Ethan promised he would come back for her—unaware that Rachel later discovered she was pregnant. Six years later, Rachel returns to the country to save her daughter, Sophie, only to find that Ethan had already married the hospital director’s daughter and started a new family after his return. To protect his reputation and status, Ethan even slandered Rachel and Sophie. At this critical moment, Rachel’s long-lost father finds her and reveals that she is actually the daughter of the chairman of the Harrington Medical Group. In the end, the scumbag doctor loses everything and suffers the consequences of his own actions, while Rachel goes on to live a happy life with her daughter.

title: Ace! The Golf King's Reconquest
synopsis: In Ace The Golf King's Reconquest movie, "Lion" was once the Grand Slam champion that ruled the world of golf. Devastated by the loss of his wife, he disappears to take care of their baby daughter at the peak of his career, leaving behind his insurmountable legacy. Hiding away as a gardener, "Lion" pulls weeds and mows the lawn at a golf club to make a living. Desperate to give his daughter a better life and pay for her tuition, "Lion" steps back on the golf course to reclaim his former glory! The roar of the mighty "Lion" will be heard around the world!

title: The Lady Boss CEO is My Daughter
synopsis: After Matilda's only daughter, Elodie, is rescued from her kidnapper by local police - she is turned over to foster care and never to be seen again. Matilda and her son, Carson, never stopped searching for her -  spending every last penny on posters and PI invesitgations till they starved. Then, after twenty long years of desperate attempts to get Elodie back, she returns. Except, now she's Billionaire CEO Miss Atkins and her company is going to destroy the very home she grew up in - and the only remaining clue that could bring the family back together again.

title: The Warlord Returns
synopsis: War hero Harrison returns from war to discover his sister has died by her fiancé, Karter's hand. Harrison infiltrates Karter's banquet wearing his worn fatigues, announcing to Karter that his punishment will arrive in 3 days. Eventually, he reveals his true identity as the Director of FBI, and achieves his ultimate revenge.

title: Double Life of a Cell Block King
synopsis: In Double Life of a Cell Block King movie, Harrison hits rock bottom after a betrayal by his own stepfamily.  He deliberately goes to prison to gather evidence of his stepfamily’s crimes. After his release, a sudden marriage ties his fate to Sophia, and the two are quickly pushed to the margins, facing humiliation, poverty, and open scorn from those in power. As Sophia chases a chance at a new future, Harrison is repeatedly branded as a ex convict—until a single moment inside the Maple Group building signals that everything they believed about him may be wrong.

title: The Devil Wears Desire
synopsis: A woman with only three months left to live is caught in a dangerously seductive web. There’s the billionaire playboy who kept her as a secret lover but now brings his fiancée around, an ex-boyfriend back in her life with no memory of their painful history, and a mafia boss who sees his late wife in her, harboring a twisted desire to keep her close by any means. As lies and secrets blur the lines between love and obsession, what choice will she make?

title: Ms. Detective and Mr. Thief
synopsis: After 15 years, sparks fly when Isabel and Ari reunite and become passionate lovers. She's a police detective trying to make her career by catching a mysterious master thief. As Ari helps her investigation and their affair gets steamier, will she realize that her lover is the criminal she's hunting?

title: Seduction Cove
synopsis: In Seduction Cove movie, Seduction Cove is a show designed to test couple's loyalties with hot baddies, cash prizes and insane challenges. After Hayley's cheating ex runs off with her sister, she's reunited with Adam, a man who saved her from a near death experience. Will the reunited soulmates survive Seduction Cove?

title: My Loser Daddy is a Big Shot
synopsis: In My Loser Daddy is a Big Shot Movie, with the help of their daughter Cassie, Ethan, a veteran, and Leanne, CEO of Osborne Group, marry on a whim. Despite facing scorn from friends and family, Leanne stands by Ethan as he uses his exceptional skills to protect them from various threats. Unfairly labeled as a deserter and gold digger, Ethan eventually reveals his true identity as the leader of the secret justice group, 'GUARDIAN FORCE.' He hides his identity to root out traitors and dismantle an evil organization, all while being a devoted husband and father.

title: The Imperfect Marriage
synopsis: Based on the novel by L. Steele. After her fiancé cheats on her, Vivian flash marries a hot silver fox… only to realize he’s her ex’s dad. The deal is simple: two weeks of marriage, a CEO title for Quentin and enough money for Vivian to save her sick dad. But as her ex keeps humiliating her and his dad keeps saving her, Vivian's fake marriages starts to cross very real lines.

title: Lady Boss Takes on Vegas Bullies!
synopsis: In Lady Boss Takes on Vegas Bullies! full movie, Jane goes undercover as a janitor to investigate allegations of employee abuse. But when she is forced to reveal her true identity to protect her loyal workers, no one believes her, and now, someone has stolen her identity as executive of the casino! What can she do as a meager janitor?

title: Help! My Hot Boss Has My Nudes!
synopsis: He’s her Hot Boss. She’s his employee. But when she sends him a pic of her boobs by mistake, desire, scandal, and secrets turn the office–and her heart–upside down.

title: Alpha Daddy Make Me Yours
synopsis: In Alpha Daddy Make Me Yours movie, Wolfless Omega Lyra has always been called the unwanted runt. But she never thought that during this year's summer, when she moved back into the house of the alpha that she's secretly had a crush on for a long time, Alpha Damon-- he would also be her best friend's dad! At home, she can't hold back her long accumulated desires anymore-- they explode out. She fantasizes about Alpha Damon taking her virginity, dreaming about him, even while she knows that an Alpha like Damon would never fall in love with an omega like her. Moreover, Damon is her dad's best friend! When they finally have a forbidden touch, the truth slowly comes out.... could it be... that they're fated mates?

title: Gossip Godmother
synopsis: When brilliant scholarship student Zoey Whitmore starts receiving mysterious gossip posts that predict her future with terrifying accuracy, her world implodes: her mom is arrested, her boyfriend betrays her, and she becomes the obsession of two powerful rivals — a royal heartthrob and a mafia prince. Each post helps Zoey overcome the bullying of her private school peers, but each victory leads to a new, even harder challenge. With the help of her "Gossip Godmother", can Zoey rewrite her fate one future post at a time?

title: Wanted by the Rogue Alpha
synopsis: Driven by an instinctive pull, Xavier, the Alpha of a rogue wolf pack, senses the emergence of his fated mate. Tracing this profound connection, he finds Dr. Isla, an Omega. Captivated by her unique blend of gentleness and resilience, Xavier is determined to claim her. However, Isla believes her destined partner is another. This sparks intense rivalry as Xavier relentlessly pursues her. Initially wary and misunderstanding Xavier's motives, Isla gradually comes to understand the complex male beneath the Alpha exterior. Their journey unfolds into a thrilling and passionate romance. Yet, their burgeoning bond faces relentless trials: treacherous internal pack politics and looming external threats. Ultimately, through shared peril and unwavering resolve, they overcome every obstacle, their love culminating in a lasting union.

title: How To Trap President's Son
synopsis: In How To Trap President's Son movie, in a world where money rules everything, he’s the President’s son - a handsome, spoiled playboy above the law. She’s just a cleaning lady with a dream and… a mop. One accidental kiss turns into a media scandal, and suddenly they’re forced to fake a romance for the public.

title: Love On the Sidelines
synopsis: In Love On the Sidelines movie, Natalie had it all—engaged to football star Karl and carrying his child—until tragedy struck. Her brother caused Karl’s sister’s death, and Karl’s injuries ended his career. Yet, she vanished for seven years. Now, Karl sees her with a "husband" and "daughter," seemingly happy. But he won’t let her go.

title: I Swapped Bodies with My Nemesis
synopsis: In I Swapped Bodies with My Nemesis movie, Nick and Lexey were being forced into an arranged marriage by their parents. They despised themselves and so were against the marriage. Cupid, having heard their cries, decided to intervene. He switched their souls into each other's body. Now Nick is Lexey and Lexey is Nick. Forced to experience life from a new perspective, they must live together.

title: My Accidental Alpha's Desire
synopsis: Heather found her mate James was cheating with his uncle's fiancee. She was so hurt that she went into his uncle Antonio’s room to seduce him, and kissed him... However, The cold man seems had feelings for her so that he couldn't control himself and kissed her hardly...

title: My Alpha Boss Gave Me Triplets
synopsis:
In My Alpha Boss Gave Me Triplets movie, Evie, a talented but vulnerable human designer, becomes bound to Leopold, the ruthless Alpha of the Stonehearth Pack, leaving her pregnant with his rare triplets. To protect her, Leopold forces her to move in with him, presenting their relationship as purely transactional while privately struggling with uncontrollable mate-bond instincts that cause him to share Evie's pain and emotions.

As Evie is drawn into Leopold’s corporate and pack world, Darleen, a powerful she-wolf from another pack determined to claim Leopold, escalates from professional threats to phsyical ones. Evie's estranged family piles on by attempting to kidnap her. Will Leopold be able to prioritize his mate over everything, and save her from the whirlwind he brought her into?

title: Falling for My Nemesis Stepbrother
synopsis: In Falling for My Nemesis Stepbrother movie, Nicole has always been the good girl. While Kane, her stepbrother, is the opposite. To the world, he’s a dangerous bad boy. To Nicole, he’s the boy she never stopped loving. On the night of a deadly street race, Nicole runs into the road to stop Kane from destroying himself, while Kane fights feelings he knows he shouldn’t want.

title: Guarding Her Body, Claiming Her Heart
synopsis: Her life was a fairytale lie until she caught her fiancé in bed with her own brother. When an attempt on her life shatters her last illusions, she is thrown together with the only man she can trust: her new bodyguard, Derek. He’s cold, aloof, and frustratingly professional - yet a single look from his piercing eyes is enough to make her burn. Can she truly trust the man sworn to protect her when everyone else has betrayed her?

title: Twilight Romance: Flash Marriage to Mature Tycoon
synopsis: Ray, a middle-aged businessman who has given up on love in Twilight Romance Flash Marriage to Mature Tycoon. Posing as a construction worker, he enters into a flash marriage with Jocelyn, a woman who has just been kicked out of her house. Their union starts off with a sweet and dreamy honeymoon phase, but their love is interrupted by persistent bullying from the family of Jocelyn's daughter-in-law. After repeatedly saving Jocelyn from disaster, Ray reveals his hidden billionaire identity to her, and the two of them embark on a life of luxury. That's when Ray's ex-wife returns to drive a wedge betwen Ray and Jocelyn, and as Jocelyn prepares to sacrifice herself for the sake of her husband's career, Ray gives her the most romantic of surprises...

title: The Knockout King
synopsis: Jax Carter, the bastard son of a disgraced housekeeper and a fight gym patriarch, secretly trains under three outlaw coaches. When he's entered into The Crucible, an elite, once-in-a-generation MMA proving ground, he must carry the weight of betrayal, shame, and thousands of pounds of hidden resistance training. As rivals rise and family tries to crush him, Jax must prove once and for all: he wasn’t born to break... he was built to fight.

title: Private School Playboys
synopsis: Head over heels for Ethan Sutton, it-boy of Lowell Private Academy, Maddie Sinclair has always put him first. But when she finds out he's been cheating on her with heiress Vanessa Archibald, Madeline hatches a grand escape plan with Ethan's opportunistic mother. Will Ethan capture her heart back before it leaves permanently for London, or will Rhys Wyndham, mysterious new bad boy from London end up sealing the deal before Maddie even boards the plane?

title: Love Me After My Death
synopsis: Caroline has just been diagnosed with cancer in Love Me After My Death movie. And told she only has three months to live when Stacy, her husband Eric's old flame, shows up with a six-year-old kid that she claims is Eric's Child. Eric goes on to repeatedly wrong Caroline, and as her cancer symptoms worsen and she slips into despair, she decides to divorce him. Only after their separation does Eric realize that he can't live without her, and he then finally learns of his ex-wife's cancer diagnosis. By then, it'stoo late for reconciliation, as Caroline is determined not to spend her final days loving him.

title: Park Avenue Girls Don't Play Nice
synopsis: When Anna Sinclair is cheated out of a prestigious art scholarship in Paris, her only chance to escape her abusive parents, she reinvents herself as a glamorous New York socialite to catch the eye of rich kid Preston Kingsley and secure a second shot at her dreams. But things get complicated when she starts to fall for Preston’s best friend, Brooks Whitmore, Upper East Side royalty and the biggest threat to exposing Anna's true identity. Will her secret turn Brooks against her, or will it bring them the happy ending that neither of them saw coming?

title: Pride & Prejudice
synopsis: In Pride & Prejudice movie, despite societal pressures to marry, Lizzie Bennet, second eldest of the Bennet sisters, has her heart set on spinsterhood. But when her father falls gravely ill, Lizzie is unexpectedly thrust into the classist world of courtship in order to save her family from destitution. After a fateful encounter with the broody, mysterious millionaire, Mr. Darcy, Lizzie’s forced to choose between denying her feelings for the sake of her family or allowing herself to fall recklessly in love.

title: The Christmas Switch
synopsis:
In The Christmas Switch movie, sixteen years ago, Molly has an affair with Colton, the son-in-law of the powerful Grant family. When she gets pregnant, Colton heartlessly tells her to get an abortion. Furious and heartbroken, Molly secretly swaps her newborn daughter with the baby girl born to the Grant family’s heiress, Rachel.
That baby—Rachel’s real daughter—grows up as Dolores, raised in the slums. Meanwhile, Molly’s biological daughter, Sara, is brought up as the Grant family’s beloved princess.
Now, both girls attend the same prestigious school. Their paths cross again. Dolores, strong and kind, catches the attention of Aaron—Rachel’s father and the Grant family patriarch. At the same time, Sara’s longtime crush, Ryan, starts falling for Dolores. Feeling threatened, Sara begins scheming against her, afraid of being replaced. As tension builds, the secret behind their true identities slowly starts to unravel...

title: The Lost Daughter's Silent Cry
synopsis: In The Lost Daughter's Silent Cry movie, in a cruel twist of fate, Annabella Walton's perfect life is shattered. Ten years later, to save her disabled adoptive father, Annabella, now named Amelia, is forced to deal with the Walton family again...this time, as the target of their attacks. Will the Waltons figure out the truth? Or will it be too late for Amelia?

title: Secrets and Soulmates
synopsis: A group of sexy singles move in together with one unforgettable goal: uncover their secret soulmate. Each person has a hidden match living alongside them, but finding true love isn't easy when secrets, temptations, and sexy challenges are around every corner. Will our singles recognize true, fated love—or choose the wrong heart?

title: Falling For My Ex's General Dad
synopsis: This story follows a naive yet kind-hearted American girl who travels to Russia in search of her husband, only to discover he is a notorious playboy. Stranded and endangered in a foreign land, she is rescued by a Russian general. Through their growing interactions, her fear of him gradually transforms into admiration and affection. However, in an unexpected twist, the Russian general she falls for turns out to be the father of her deceitful ex-husband. Where will their forbidden love lead them?

title: My Father, My Hero
synopsis: After falling into the water and losing his memory, Warren Davis, a once-powerful chairman, unknowingly becomes a porter at the very hotel he founded. He endures humiliation from his employees - and even his own son, as they treat him as nothing more than a lowly servant, until he remembers who he is.

title: Her Turn to Fall(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Miles devoted his life to molding Wendy into a business queen, only to be betrayed and killed. Meanwhile, Wendy believed she could have had a perfect life with the charming Jack instead. Given a second chance at life, Miles decides to dump Wendy and court someone else. But Wendy is also reborn, convinced her rise to power has nothing to do with Miles. But as life resets, she finds a different reality: Miles no longer revolves around her, and he has a new love. And Jack turns out to be a scumbag.

title: Her Turn to Fall(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Miles devoted his life to molding Wendy into a business queen, only to be betrayed and killed. Meanwhile, Wendy believed she could have had a perfect life with the charming Jack instead. Given a second chance at life, Miles decides to dump Wendy and court someone else. But Wendy is also reborn, convinced her rise to power has nothing to do with Miles. But as life resets, she finds a different reality: Miles no longer revolves around her, and he has a new love. And Jack turns out to be a scumbag.

title: My Sunset Love Affair with the Billionaire CEO
synopsis: Middle-aged and jobless, Jennifer loses both her pension and home to her greedy son and daughter-in-law. In a desperate attempt to turn things around, she joins a dating reality show, The Diamond Bachelor—only to meet the mysterious and charming Paul Marshall. Unbeknownst to her, Paul is a CEO hiding his true identity. Moved by Jennifer’s kindness and independence, he proposes, and they marry in a whirlwind romance. But to protect Jennifer, who despises lies and deceit, Paul and his stepdaughter Emma keep their wealthy background a secret. Together, they fiercely shield Jennifer from those who wish her harm—including her own son. Through family conflicts and emotional twists, Jennifer eventually uncovers Paul’s real identity... and the shocking truth: Emma is her long-lost daughter. A dramatic journey leads to heartfelt reunion and healing.

title: Cyberking Reclaims His Throne
synopsis: In Cyberking Reclaims His Throne movie, Max Lennox is the world's number one hacker, CYBERKING. Just when he's about to uncover the Pentagon's secrets and expose them to the world, he gets betrayed by his girlfriend, who shoves him off the roof! He miraculously survives, but loses all his memories... except for his genius hacking skills. He gets saved by a kind-hearted programmer, Suki Ruskin. Together, they try to get Max's memory back, hoping to figure out who did this to him. Will he ultimately reclaim his throne as The CYBERKING?

title: Campus Saga: Superpower Teen
synopsis: The football captain humiliates me and has nude photos taken of me at school. At my lowest moment, I inherit my late father’s powerful conglomerate and a ring that activates five superpowers. I shed my weakness and turn my pain into revenge.

title: Desired by Two: the Vampire and the Hunter
synopsis: I'm a disaster. One minute I'm spilling coffee on my ridiculously hot boss, Simon, the next I'm discovering I have a secret power I can't control. My world is a mess of spilled coffee and tangled feelings, and I'm caught between two unbelievably hot guys. Simon, my mysterious boss, is as alluring as he is dangerous - a vampire who promises to teach me to harness my magic. Then there's Michael, my kind and loyal best friend. But he's hiding a deadly secret: he's a hunter sworn to destroy everything Simon stands for. They both want me. And as my magic gets more powerful, so does the fire burning between us. How can I choose when they both know my darkest secrets?

title: Her Secret Crusader
synopsis: In Her Secret Crusader movie, Lyndon was the City's hero. After freeing the City from danger, he hid his identity to protect his girlfriend, Tatiana, from harm. Now City Hall is once again in danger as the Sewer rat returns to take it down. The mayor and his daughter are the Sewer rat’s target victims. With Tatiana’s betrayal revealed, Lyndon becomes a hero again.

title: The Fashion Queen Returns
synopsis: In The Fashion Queen Returns movie, once the Queen of the Red Carpet, Eve Corbelle is content with her new life as a housewife--until a sudden betrayal brings her back to the center of her fashion empire at the Grand Maple Gala.

title: Love Trap with My Dashing Knight
synopsis:
In Love Trap with My Dashing Knight movie, the wealthy heiress Emily White marries Tim Carter, a man from humble beginnings, for love. She spares no effort in elevating him to the position of CEO, using her family’s vast resources to secure his success. Yet, after ten years of marriage, Tim betrays her, secretly engaging in an affair with his secretary, Laura Green. Stripped of power, Emily is reduced to a housewife, trapped in a hollow, loveless marriage, suffering alone.
Eager to secure her position, Laura devises a ruthless scheme—she hires a male escort to seduce Emily, planning to obtain "evidence" of her infidelity and force her out of the marriage with nothing. However, in a twist of fate, she mistakenly targets Ryan Clarke, the illegitimate son of the influential Clarke family, believing him to be an escort. The moment Ryan sees Emily, he immediately recognizes her—she is the woman who unknowingly saved him years ago.
Harboring unspoken emotions, Ryan seizes the opportunity and infiltrates the White household, becoming Emily’s chauffeur and live-in assistant. He relentlessly flirts and teases her, awakening long-buried desires within her.

title: The Doctor Will See You Now
synopsis: In The Doctor Will See You Now movie, when Jane visits the hospital for an allergy, she falls for the handsome doctor, Henry Darcy, at first sight. Gathering her courage, Jane asks for his contact information, only to be coldly rejected multiple times. Undeterred, Jane crafts a plan to win his heart. A sweet romance unfolds between a determined ballerina and a reserved doctor.

title: Don't Blink, You'll Miss It
synopsis: The Master of Magic, Daniel Angier, went into hiding after losing his brother in a tragic casino heist gone wrong. But after reconnecting with a close friend of his brother’s, Daniel sets out to reclaim the title of the Master of Magic in order to save his childhood orphanage.

title: That Makes Two of Us
synopsis: Four years ago, at the wedding arranged by their families, Max, the scion of the conglomerate, was absent, leaving the down-and-out socialite Alice as the nominal Mrs. M. Four years later, Alice has transformed into a well-known divorce case investigator, while Max returns home as the chairman of the M Group and entrusts her with handling his divorce case—neither recognizing the other. The meddling of a scheming colleague and the conspiracy of a cousin pile up one misunderstanding after another. When the truth comes to light, the two, who once passed each other by, finally come together after resolving their knots.

title: Don't Mess with Supermom
synopsis: After quelling external disturbances, the best warrior of Republic of Valoria, Zoe Miller, returns to home. However, she discovers that her daughter has been mistreated by her relatives David's family. In a fit of rage, Zoe unleashes a massacre at the banquet, accidentally revealing herself to be the legendary Secretary of Defense. Later, she learned that her adopted son Jacob had already been betrayed by enemy spy Robert, and what was even more astonishing was that Mia's father, President Louis, was also deeply involved in a power vortex. With Mia critically injured and on the verge of death, can Zoe successfully protect her daughter?

title: Divorce Me One Last Time
synopsis: Hallie Bildner, a successful NYC CEO engaged to a billionaire politician, is shocked to learn that her high school sweetheart never signed their divorce papers. Determined to settle the past, she returns to her hometown, only to find her ex hiding two big secrets: the true reason he broke her heart and that his 7-year-old daughter is actually hers. As old feelings reignite, Hallie faces a choice between the life she built and the one she left behind.

title: Insta-Married
synopsis: Syrena and Harrison wake up next to each other one morning to find out they've announced their engagement through Instagram. To protect both of their company's reputations, Syrena and Harrison decide to fake their relationship for the public.

title: The Beast on Her Leash
synopsis: In The Beast on Her Leash movie, to find evidence of Vincent's crimes—the murderer of her parents—Eliza accepts an invitation from Vincent's father to become the president of Evertech AI. Unexpectedly, the father imposes an additional condition: she must educate his youngest son, Ryder, who is as ferocious as a wild beast, into a civilized man. After agreeing, Eliza finds Ryder an extremely difficult man to handle, and the two often clash with intense tension. However, during their coexistence, Ryder falls in love with Eliza. When Eliza realizes she has feelings for Ryder too, she is forced to push him away in order to pursue Vincent's crimes. The entanglement among them is filled with ambiguity and excitement, where opportunities and dangers coexist.

title: Alpha Revenge: Wolf King and His Human Luna
synopsis: Her parents were cruelly killed by werewolves, yet she has now become the Fated Luna of the werewolf Alpha. However, their love defies werewolf traditions, sparking conflict as they face rogue wolves and ancient prophecies. With hidden powers and fierce rivalries at play, love, destiny, and power clash in this thrilling tale of passion and survival.

title: Boss, Your Wife's a Whole Detective!
synopsis: After a flash marriage arranged by her late mother’s best friend, Jenny waits three years for her husband Charles, who left abroad right after the wedding. When he returns, misunderstandings, accusations, and missed chances drive them toward divorce. Just as Jenny is framed by rivals, Charles steps in to protect her, but new twists and family schemes continue to keep them apart.

title: Alpha's Regret After His Pregnant Luna's Death
synopsis:
In Alpha's Regret After His Pregnant Luna's Death movie, Alpha Declan is tricked by his brother's treacherous widow, Olivia, into locking his pregnant Luna, Evelyn, in a Silver Cage for three days. He thought he was teaching her a lesson, but it was all part of Olivia's schemes to take Evelyn's place as Luna! 
Declan refuses to believe Evelyn, even as she begs him to save her, convinced it's all an act. He only realizes he's condemned his own Luna and their pup to death when he sees their dead bodies with his very own eyes.

title: Heiress Returns: Boss's Defense and Love
synopsis: In Heiress Returns: Boss's Defense and Love movie: The daughter of the world's wealthiest man pursued a man who manipulated and mistreated women for three years, during which she endured emotional abuse. Despite transferring hundreds of millions in assets to this manipulative individual, she received no formal recognition or respect in their relationship. On their third wedding anniversary, this deceitful man brazenly introduced his mistress to her, mocking her lack of wealth, beauty, connections, and desirability, claiming she deserved to be betrayed. Unbeknownst to him, with just a single decision from her, he and his mistress would lose everything. At this critical moment, the male protagonist—a peer of the female lead in terms of wealth and family background—appears. However, due to misunderstandings orchestrated by the antagonistic secondary characters, he is mistaken for a hired model intended to embellish the scene. Ironically, both the male and female leads initially perceive each other as impostors, with the male lead even mistakenly believing the female lead is his arranged marriage partner. Enraged by the betrayal of the secondary male character, the female lead hastily signs a divorce agreement and marries the male lead. Yet, the secondary characters remain oblivious to the gravity of their actions. Let us observe how they are subsequently humiliated in various ways.

title: Slay to Fosters: I Took His Uncle
synopsis:
