Reborn heiress Emily remembers everything - the false accusations, her family's betrayal, and her death at Olivia's hands. Now armed with knowledge of the past, how will she handle the fake heiress who destroyed her life?
Caroline Harrington, the only daughter of a top wealthy elite family in LA, concealed her true identity and broke away from her family to marry middle-class CEO Liam Foster. Throughout their marriage, she secretly used her family's resources to support Liam's business. However, Natty Parker, the youngest daughter of the Parker family, had long harbored feelings for Liam. She conspired with Liam's mother to set a trap—engineered to make Caroline appear engaged in inappropriate physical contact with Liam's uncle, Connor, right in front of Liam. This misunderstanding led to their divorce, and Caroline was driven out of the household. Heartbroken, Caroline returned to her family, determined to take revenge against her ex-husband and his relatives. Yet, amidst her quest for vengeance, she unexpectedly developed profound feelings for Connor. Meanwhile, after discovering his mother and Natty’s plot to frame Caroline, Liam became determined to win her back. Now torn between Connor—her mature and alluring current husband—and Liam, the man she once deeply loved, Caroline faces an agonizing choice: which path should she take?

title: My Ex-Wife The Mafia Princess
synopsis: Vera and her husband Lucas once survived a life-or-death fire together. Yet years later, in their contractual marriage, Lucas—plagued by selective amnesia—failed to recognize that his wife was the "white moonlight" he’d never forgotten. Instead, he treated her with cold indifference and even pressed her for a divorce. Vera tried to reveal her true identity to Lucas, only to be sabotaged by her romantic rival. She narrowly escaped death in a car crash, but was rescued just in time by Victor, a powerful mafia boss—who soon realized Vera was his long-lost biological sister. Overnight, Vera—still suffering from memory loss—transformed into a globally dazzling mafia heiress. Meanwhile, Lucas, who’d seemed cold and heartless on the surface, began to act with "tsundere" reluctance: he couldn’t help but go to great lengths to win her back, embarking on an arduous, bittersweet journey to chase his wife. The two navigated countless predicaments—from a wealthy tycoon vying for Vera’s affection, to a two-faced rival scheming against her, and even a seemingly kind man setting traps for them—before finally clearing up their misunderstandings and committing to each other. Just as they found their way back to one another, however, the haunting doubt of "unexpectedly becoming a father" (to a child he didn’t initially recognize as his own) came crashing back…

title: Mama, Sing Me a Lullaby
synopsis:
In Mama, Sing Me a Lullaby movie, Single mother Tracey works hard to raise her twins on her own.  Her youngest son Henry hates his family and considers Logan, his older brother with a heart condition, to be a burden. Logan is hit in a car accident and adopted by a rich man, changing his life forever.
Tracey continued to work odd jobs as a janitor. Both Tracey and Logan never gave up on finding each other, and Logan, now CEO, feels a connection to Tracey the moment they meet again.
Tracey's selfless sacrifice has been wasted on Henry. He finds her embarrassing and is eager to deny knowing her, even actively bullying her.
Finally, at Henry's wedding, just as Henry is about to smash a bottle of wine on Tracey, Logan receives the DNA testing results. The woman on stage being humiliated is his own mother!

title: The Ghost of You and I
synopsis: In The Ghost of You and I movie, Lieutenant Ryan Cross is fighting on the front lines, but he doesn't tell his wife, Alice, for fear of worrying her. Tragically, Ryan is killed in action while trying to save his comrades. However, his lingering regrets cause him to transform into a ghost and return to his wife’s side. Back home, Alice, who thinks Ryan is just hiding from her, is convinced he's been cheating! Pissed, Alice decides to get back at Ryan by marrying another man. On the day of the wedding, Alice’s bridal car passes Ryan’s funeral procession.

title: ReelTalk EP20-Wings of Fire: The Dragon Slayer is My Ex-Lover Premiere Screening
synopsis:
Sparks flew at ReelShort’s first-ever exclusive screening of Wings of Fire: The Dragon Slayer is My Ex-Lover. Follow stars Seth Edeen and Nicole Mattox as they reignite their chemistry in the latest sizzling ReelShort show. From the big screen to the Q&A and fan meet and greet, this star-studded night was on fire.
Fans, cast, crew, and surprise ReelShort stars showed up for a night full of laughs, dragon slaying, and maybe even a little drama. Watch closely, you might just spot a few familiar faces in the crowd. Don’t miss this behind the scenes look at the hottest premiere of the season!

title: Don't Watch Me Waste Away
synopsis: Believing that Celeste had indirectly caused his sister Gloria’s tragic death in prison, Byron let love curdle into hatred. For five years, he tortured Celeste’s body and soul—until the day he learned she was dead. Only then did regret set in.

title: Who's Laughing Now, My Ex? (English-dubbed)
synopsis: For seven years, Elle Gold secretly helped Joe Judd build DK Corp into a successful company. On their wedding day, pregnant and ready to reveal the truth, she is humiliated by Joe. In an attempt to please his first love, Sue Cole, Joe allows Sue to steal Elle’s spotlight by wearing a wedding dress. Elle endures their cruelty time and again, only to discover that Joe and Sue are having an affair. Worse, Joe believes Sue’s lie that she’s the founder of DK Corp. Devastated, Elle demands a divorce. With Carl Irwin’s help, she plans her revenge. At the signing banquet, she exposes her true identity, pulls her investments, and watches as Joe crumbles in regret.

title: Who's Laughing Now, My Ex? (English-dubbed)
synopsis: For seven years, Elle Gold secretly helped Joe Judd build DK Corp into a successful company. On their wedding day, pregnant and ready to reveal the truth, she is humiliated by Joe. In an attempt to please his first love, Sue Cole, Joe allows Sue to steal Elle’s spotlight by wearing a wedding dress. Elle endures their cruelty time and again, only to discover that Joe and Sue are having an affair. Worse, Joe believes Sue’s lie that she’s the founder of DK Corp. Devastated, Elle demands a divorce. With Carl Irwin’s help, she plans her revenge. At the signing banquet, she exposes her true identity, pulls her investments, and watches as Joe crumbles in regret.

title: Silicon God Strikes Back
synopsis: In Silicon God Strikes Back movie, Leon is a genius engineer who has a special knack for creating computer chips. His life was perfect – great job, loving wife – until one day, his family doctor informs him that his wife has stage four cancer! Leon does everything he can to save her, but soon realizes that his wife isn't who he thought she was. He decides to change his entire life. He's ready to prove that his talents can dominate the tech world.

title: Dark Notes
synopsis: In Dark Notes movie, based on the novel by Pam Godwin. When Ivory Westbrook catches the attention of her new music professor Emeric Marceaux, she discovers his dominating discipline goes beyond the classroom, unfurling a torrid and taboo relationship that could destroy everything she’s worked for, or fulfill desires she never knew she had.

title: The Bride of the Wolf King
synopsis: Hundreds of years ago, a contest of power and desire caused the Wolf King to lose the woman he loved the most. The Wolf King was in tremendous inconsolable grief and he had sealed up his memory. Then somehow the two met again. The grievances and affairs from the previous life slowly emerged. "And this time, I will kill everyone who obstructs our love. And you shall be my princess, the one and only."

title: Beg for My Return After Kicking Me Out
synopsis: The U.S. nuclear medical professor Charlie Clare quits his career for family, but is abandoned as his wife and daughter favor his love rival Isaac. After suffering his family’s ignorance, he decides to leave for the Unicorn Project, which he designed for healing his daughter’s neuro-skel birthmark as his life work. But unaware that Charlie’s burning his life for them, his wife and daughter deepen the rift with Charlie upon reunion and eventually destroy everything Charlie left for them with their own hands before realizing their errors, only to find it too late.

title: Head Witch in Charge
synopsis: The Sherwoods are the most respected witches in all of Witchingdom, and as heir it's Leona's duty to protect her family's ancient wand and enter an arranged marriage. But all her plans go up in pixie dust when she crosses paths with notorious bad-boy witch Erik Svensen... and ends up magically bound to him in an unbreakable marriage! To undo her mistake and preserve her family legacy, she must accompany Erik on a magic-filled road trip to get him to cast a divorce spell, but the longer she spends with her husband, the more she feels all her walls and duties come crashing down.

title: Love Again At 40
synopsis: In Love Again At 40 movie, Emily, a janitor with minimum wage and a sick daughter to care for, flash marries her ex-boyfriend Mark Cardmon twenty years after he disappeared. And got his face reconfigured due to a car accident. However, neither Emily nor Mark suspected each other of being the person they knew before while falling with each other in love for the second time. Through helping Emily's daughter Selene with her surgery and fending Emily at work from toxic colleagues, Mark gradually realizes that Emily is his boyfriend and Selene is his daughter. Will they finally be able to get married now they are well into their 40s?

title: Breaking My Bodyguard
synopsis: Vera Marchesa just wants one thing: freedom from the dangerous mafia world she grew up in, and her overprotective bodyguard Dante, who refuses to love her. Determined to prove she's not a helpless princess, Vera pushes the one line Dante swore never to cross… even if that means they will crash and burn together.

title: I Leashed A CEO!
synopsis: In I Leashed A CEO movie, a drunken woman walking her dog late at night was led by the dog to a tycoon’s private car. Chasing the car, her clothes got caught and torn by the door. The two had an intimate SM encounter in the car, fully photographed by paparazzi and making gossip headlines. To calm public anger, the tycoon lied that the woman was his fiancée and searched for her using a dog leash as a clue. His stepsister faked her identity after seeing the news. The woman knew the man that night was the tycoon but dared not tell anyone, nor did she know her sister’s impersonation. She later became his personal bodyguard via an interview, and affection grew between them. Yet the stepsister kept sabotaging their relationship, causing constant conflicts. Will this scandal - triggered farce reveal the truth? Will the two lovers finally get together?

title: When Love Is Unequal(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Livia Dawson used to have loving parents and a sweet home. She was a little princess. But after she had a younger sister, everything changed. They stopped loving her like they used to. Just because she turned the AC down by one degree for her sister, they locked her up in a fridge. Maybe her death will finally wake them up.

title: When Love Is Unequal(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Livia Dawson used to have loving parents and a sweet home. She was a little princess. But after she had a younger sister, everything changed. They stopped loving her like they used to. Just because she turned the AC down by one degree for her sister, they locked her up in a fridge. Maybe her death will finally wake them up.

title: The Secret Between US
synopsis: Tessa and Asher were first loves. Asher left without a word due to family reasons. Three years later, they reunite, but Tessa is now the fiancée of Asher's nephew.

title: The Hockey Captain That Hates Me
synopsis:
Plus-size figure skater Skylar Carter hates the arrogant hockey team captain, Mason Reed, with good reason. When Skylar’s prank against the team leaves Mason injured, she’s forced to be his assistant or risk losing her own sports future. 

Forced together, their rivalry turns into undeniable chemistry. But after the school announces only one program will survive to next season, Skylar and Mason may be falling for the one person whose victory could destroy their dreams.

title: Love & Blood
synopsis: When Sophia sets out to find her missing twin sister, Tina, the trail leads her to The Red Veil, an elite vampire nightclub ruled by the ruthless Von Drák family. As she digs deeper into its dark, seductive world, Sophia discovers a chilling prophecy, a forbidden romance, and a supernatural war that could consume them all.

title: Daddy's Got Girls and Guns
synopsis: The mysterious secret agent Peter Rogers was awarded the National Medal of Honor by the President and had retired from the military. While dining out with his daughter Leslie, Peter is mistaken for a blind date by the beautiful CEO Sydney Greenfield, and the two unexpectedly get married. When his classmate and ex-girlfriend, who were unaware of Peter's true identity, encountered him again, they subjected him to various insults and ridicule. Upon hearing about this, Sydney publicly revealed that Peter was her husband, putting everyone to shame.

title: The Betrayed Mother is the Divine Heiress
synopsis:
Lena — heir to the divine legacy of Athena.
A nurturing, gentle mother figure, easily moved by compassion, yet beneath her warmth lies a sharp, commanding presence. Once the High Strategos of the fabled Order of Aegis, she vanished from power after a devastating fire twenty-five years ago—when she risked her life to save seven infants and raised them as her own.
For decades, Lena kept her true identity hidden. But on her fiftieth birthday, the seven sons she sacrificed everything for are swayed by their birth families, turning against her and branding her a trafficker. Betrayed and heartbroken, Lena awakens her long-buried power. No longer willing to endure in silence, she rises to reclaim control, expose the truth, and remind the world—and her sons—why she was once feared as a leader destined to command.

title: Mafia Heiress’s Forbidden Obssession
synopsis: Mafia Camorra family boss Michael is assassinated, forcing his 20-year-old only daughter, Gloria, to take over the family business. While dealing with internal and external threats to the clan, she falls in love with Theo, her late father's close friend and a 34-year-old former FBI agent turned bodyguard. After spotting her own photo inside Theo's pendant, she becomes convinced that he loves her back—only to later discover that the photo is actually of her mother. As their romance intensifies, Theo's past as an FBI agent leads Gloria to suspect he may have been involved in her father's murder, plunging their relationship into crisis.

title: Hidden Companionship
synopsis: After a car accident, Memi falls into a coma—but her soul awakens and witnesses a nurse secretly swapping her newborn son. Powerless to act, Memi watches for seven years as her real son, Nick, suffers abuse. Just as the nurse plans to harvest his corneas to cover the truth, Memi miraculously wakes up and rushes to save him.

title: The Royals
synopsis: When the British heir dies suddenly, a modern royal family spirals into chaos. Party-loving twins Prince Liam and Princess Eleanor are forced to grow up fast—Liam is thrust toward the crown while falling for Ophelia, the palace security chief’s American daughter, and Eleanor hits rock bottom after a dangerous betrayal. As King Simon grieves and the monarchy teeters, ruthless Queen Helena joins forces with scheming Prince Cyrus to keep control at any cost. A dynasty built on glamour is about to face its darkest reckoning. Buy full season: https://www.lionsgate.com/shows/the-royals/the-royals-season-1

title: Marry to Top Star at 40s
synopsis: The female lead divorces her husband after enduring his domestic abuse, alcoholism, and infidelity. She quits her job as a high school teacher and becomes an obscure, little-known talent manager. During this time, her ex-husband continues to tear her down, while the relentless demands of her work leave her overwhelmed and exhausted. As if that weren’t enough, the top superstar she manages, Lucas, constantly gives her a hard time—teasing her every day and creating work out of thin air just to torment her. How did her life become so dark? But—what?! Lucas was once her student? And Lucas says he likes her? No, impossible. Absolutely impossible!

title: Too Late for Love: 15 Days After Miscarriage
synopsis:
In Too Late for Love: 15 Days After Miscarriage movie, Iris and Benjamin were once the ultimate power couple—total relationship goals for everyone, and loaded to boot. They went from college sweethearts straight to tying the knot, and he even gave her a kidney to save her life, swearing he’d love her forever. But by their third year of marriage? Benjamin was hooking up with his mistress out in the open, no shame at all.

Crushed and done with his nonsense, Iris set a "15-day countdown" and quietly planned her divorce and escape. But his pathetic lies and the mistress’s bold-faced disrespect pushed her over the edge—she lost the baby. Completely broken, she finally took off, all by herself.

Benjamin had no clue how much he’d hurt her until she was gone. That’s when his brutal "redemption tour" started—you know, when someone messes up bad and then begs for forgiveness, but it’s already too late. He offered a reward worldwide to find her, but Iris outsmarted him at every turn. His career and reputation? Gone in a flash.

Even after he dumped the mistress, got on his knees to beg for mercy, and took a knife for Iris (ending up seriously hurt), he couldn’t melt her cold heart. In the end, he just had to watch—lonely and full of regret—as she built a new, happy life. And that’s when he finally got it: "Belated love ain’t worth squat"—affection that shows up too late? It’s totally useless.

title: Too Late, Alphas
synopsis: In Too Late Alphas movie, Aria was the beloved heiress, but on her birthday, she was abandoned by her two Alpha fiancés, Adrian and Julian. The scheming maid Selena took her place, using a potion to fake a mate bond and steal their trust. Drowned, forgotten on her birthday, even wounded by their own hands—Aria's heart turned to ice. Just as everyone thought she would submit, she declared: "I will marry Damien, the Alpha of the Blood Moon Pack!" The new engagement freed her and brought her a powerful guardian. When the truth was revealed, the regretful Alphas realized they had lost Aria forever—she was now the Luna of another pack.

title: Don't Let Your Son Fall, Hon
synopsis: Diana discovers her husband Victor is having an affair with her best friend Claire. Trapped in a marriage filled with deceit and abuse, she invites Claire’s 19-year-old son Leo to live with her as an act of revenge. But Leo has been secretly in love with Diana for years. What begins as a calculated scheme evolves into a genuine connection, forcing them to navigate threats from a crypto scam, blackmail, and violent confrontations. In the end, they must choose between  destruction and redemption.

title: Turns Out My Pretty Boy Is a Billionaire
synopsis: Mia is a glamorous TV anchor—but behind the fame, she’s beenbetrayed by her family, friends, and husband.Adopted by a wealthy family as a child, she once lived a life of love and luxury. But when the “real daughter” returns, Mia’s perfect world crumbles—her family turns cold, and her husband cheats with her best friend. At her lowest point, she meets the breathtakingly handsome Henry. She thought he was just a struggling model, so she supported him for three years. But when her husband and his mistress come back into her life, Mia is forced to end her secret relationship with Henry. Then fate takes a shocking turn. At a lavish birthday banquet, Mia discovers that Henry is actually the richest man in the city—and to her surprise, he starts pursuing her! As Henry’s true identity is revealed, Mia’s own hidden side also comes to light: she is, in fact, an internationally renowned jewelry designer. Once overlooked and betrayed, Mia finally rises above it all, embraces a new life, and finds happiness hand in hand with Henry.

title: Flash Vows
synopsis: They mistook each other for the partner in the contractual marriage. After the flash marriage, they discovered that they were meant for each other.

title: Her Final Bet
synopsis: In Her Final Bet movie, Scarlett Spades, a seemingly ordinary housewife, is secretly the last heir of the murdered Gambling King, forced into hiding since her family was wiped out. When her devoted husband is framed by a rigged casino and driven to the edge, Scarlett is dragged back into the underworld she swore to abandon. Playing the naïve "lucky girl", she seduces cheaters into arrogance and destroys them with impossible wins—until her revenge awakens the true mastermind behind her parents' deaths, and one final bet demands blood, love, even her life...

title: Mafia Mamma's Hot Lover
synopsis: In Mafia Mamma's Hot Lover movie, betrayed housewife Maria’s life is upended when she unexpectedly inherits a vast mafia empire at her grandfather’s funeral, transforming from a dismissed “middle-aged housewife” into the “Godmother” of the St. Clair crime family. As she navigates her new role—seeking peace in a world of violence—she rekindles a forbidden love with Richard, her childhood crush and the family’s trusted advisor. But Richard is secretly the long-lost heir of their greatest rival, torn between blood and loyalty. Forced to publicly oppose each other while secretly allying, they must survive assassinations, family treachery, and their own hearts to expose the true mastermind behind the conflict, end the bloody feud, and claim both power and love.

title: Fated To My Billionaire Call Boy
synopsis: Diane makes a deathbed promise to her grandmother to have a baby—only to immediately uncover proof of her husband Miles' affair. Devastated, she ends their seven-year marriage. In a drunken rebound move (courtesy of her bold bestie Maggie), Diane spends a wild night with a gorgeous callboy named Eddie… but her night blindness hides a jaw-dropping truth:  Eddie is actually Dominic—her and Miles'college classmate who's been secretly in love with her for years. After studying abroad, he's now returned as a ruthless billionaire… and he'll stop at nothing to win Diane back. By day, he's a powerful tycoon; by night, he voluntarily plays her devoted callboy, determined to make her fall for him.

title: From Ashes To Us
synopsis: A sudden hospital fire reunites Cindy with her first love, Jackson, after eight long years. Now a heroic fire captain, Jackson risks his life to rescue a nurse trapped in the blaze—only to discover she's none other than Cindy, the woman who shattered his heart during a college break by seemingly cheating on him. As fate begins to turn its wheels, long-buried truths slowly surface. Cindy never betrayed him—instead, she chose to hide her pregnancy to protect Jackson’s future, raising their son Noah alone ever since. Now, facing the child who doesn’t know his true identity, Jackson’s paternal instincts awaken, while Cindy’s long-hidden maternal secret teeters on the edge of revelation. As the flames of their past reignite, they’re met with overwhelming obstacles: a jealous boss, a ruthless mother, sneering colleagues, and a kidnapping plot that pushes Cindy to the brink once more. This is a story of misunderstanding and sacrifice spanning eight years—a journey of love, forgiveness, and impossible choices. When the flames die down, can true love rise from the ashes? He once promised, “Wait for me. I’ll come back to marry you.” She gave everything to keep that hope alive: “For you, I held on to hope.” Love never died—it was only waiting for the fire to return.

title: Lady CEO's Fatal Contract
synopsis: In Lady CEO's Fatal Contract movie, after a heart transplant, Violet learns her donor, Eve, died at the hands of her boyfriend, Liam, a famous artist. Seeking proof, Violet signs a BDSM contract to become his servant, but Liam doesn't abuse her—he protects her with a tenderness that terrifies her. When her ex-husband uncovers her lie and blackmails her, Liam quietly makes him disappear. Now Violet faces an impossible truth: she came to destroy a monster, but he may be the only one who truly owns her.

title: Reborn Queen in the Modern World(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Vivian, a 200-pound mother of three, is neglected by her husband and bullied by his childhood friend who covets her place. But fate intervenes when the soul of an Empress awakens within her. The ancient ruler wastes no time—shedding weight, reclaiming beauty, and seizing her own destiny. As a dazzling new Vivian emerges, her husband scrambles to win her back. But her eyes are set on a far grander prize: building an empire of her own.

title: The Last Gambling God
synopsis:
Legendary gambler Henry Smith is framed by his nemesis and fellow gambler, Lip Orville, and forced into hiding after Lip kills his brother, David. 
On the run and out of options, he’s saved by Sophia and assumes a new identity——Carl, a janitor at an underground casino (a speakeasy officially) in Chicago. But when Lip returns, now allied with the mafia, and the infamous mob boss, Don Bazzini, Carl is dragged back into the dangerous world of gambling. At the same time, Carl/Henry begins plotting his revenge.

title: The Genius Returns
synopsis: Ada, a math genius reclaimed by the noble Selivis family, is treated as an outsider and framed by her scheming sister. But they picked the wrong genius to cross.

title: Midlife Flash Marriage: My Billionaire CEO
synopsis: After her divorce, Amy lost her daughter and raised her son alone. One day, on the way to visit her grandson, she unexpectedly saves Sophie and is introduced to the powerful Mr. Smith. Hiding his true identity, Smith impulsively marries Amy. During their life together, Amy is often bullied by her in-laws, but Smith always steps in to defend her, humiliating the bullies and helping her build a better life. Though Amy’s son is weak and not very capable, he is filial and kind-hearted. Eventually, when his wife’s family goes too far in mistreating Amy, he finally stands by his mother’s side. In the end, Amy discovers that Smith is actually the richest man in the city—and that Sophie is her long-lost daughter. At last, the family is reunited.

title: Love Under Contract
synopsis: Jennifer Sullivan, a lawyer, becomes a spy for Isaac Marks in order to save her sister. In the midst of love, hate and conspiracy, she gradually uncovers the truth of the arson case, and when the murderer is finally caught and Isaac reforms, Jennifer decides to let go of her past and make a fresh start with Isaac.

title: Love Under Attack
synopsis: Leading lady, Jess Gonzales, must whittle down 25 male suitors to four that she wants to actively date. After she makes her choice, the remaining singles she rejected have the opportunity to sabotage her dates for a cash prize!

title: Secret Life of A Mafia Sweetheart
synopsis: Two heirs of rival mafia families fall in love under false identities. A gang war leaves Alyssa injured with amnesia, Dylan poses as her fiancé，entangling them in love, betrayal, and buried family secrets…

title: A Relationship Kept in The Dark
synopsis: In A Relationship Kept in The Dark movie, renowned photographer Jane falls for rookie model Hector, unaware he's the heir to a business empire. Hector hides his identity to win her heart, but jealousy and misunderstandings drive them apart. When Jane’s life falls apart, Hector steps in secretly to help—and later reveals his true self with a grand gesture of love and a proposal.

title: Ex-Convict Janitor and His Heiress(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Nick Hale, who just got out of Dragon Prison, takes a mission from a dying cellmate, Don Rossi, protect his sister, Jade. Nick hides himself as a simple dojo janitor. However, when a rival challenges Jade to a life-or-death duel in seven days, he decides to step in. In the ring, Nick is going to shock everyone with his power.

title: Attractive Model is a Billionaire CEO
synopsis: In Attractive Model is a Billionaire CEO movie: on the night of her divorce, Selina's best friend ordered the top escort, Morgan, at a high-end club. Morgan claimed to be a professional male model, while Selina pretended to be an unemployed office worker. It wasn't until Selina started working at ZT Group that she noticed the new president had the same scratch marks on his neck as that night, and his magnetic voice was all too familiar. At the merger meeting, he threw Selina's proposal in front of her ex-husband and saying: "After all, your wife... no, your ex-wife's taste is indeed much more refined than your lover's."

title: Ivy & Thorn: Ivy Never Fades (English-dubbed)
synopsis: In their past lives, Ivy and Daisy were both at the orphanage, waiting to be chosen by prospective parents. Daisy opted for a wealthy family, while Ivy joined a humble cleaner's household. Yet, Patrick Vance, the heir of the affluent family, was drawn to Ivy's independence. Consumed by jealousy, Daisy killed Ivy and then took her own life at their wedding. Reborn on the day of the selection, Daisy decides against the wealthy path, hoping to replicate Ivy's fate. However, she soon discovers that the cleaner's family is far from the paradise she imagined...

title: Ivy & Thorn: Ivy Never Fades (English-dubbed)
synopsis: In their past lives, Ivy and Daisy were both at the orphanage, waiting to be chosen by prospective parents. Daisy opted for a wealthy family, while Ivy joined a humble cleaner's household. Yet, Patrick Vance, the heir of the affluent family, was drawn to Ivy's independence. Consumed by jealousy, Daisy killed Ivy and then took her own life at their wedding. title: Love Under Fire
synopsis: In the Love Under Fire movie, When a disciplined former Secret Service agent is forced to partner with a reckless global pop star after his daughter is kidnapped by her obsessive ex, their race across the Philippines ignites a volatile romance- one that forces them to choose between control, trust, and the people they love most.

title: Caged by His Twisted Love
synopsis: Nora Harrison thought she killed mafia boss Luca Moretti. But he survives and resurfaces as a billionaire investor, trapping her in his world and forces Nora into a dangerous game: become his woman or lose everything she loves.

title: Peace Out, I'm Marrying Someone Else(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Oliver Logan is the wealthiest man in the world, but even his vast fortune can't hold onto Chloe Stone. Confident in Oliver's love, Chloe brazenly uses his money to support her lover. Once Oliver sees her true colors, he finally awakens to the truth. Now, he's going to tell them he's marrying someone else and ensure they lose everything!

title: Golden Feather: Temptation Game
synopsis: In Golden Feather: Temptation Game movie, at the Golden Feather Academy, after being rejected, Queen Celine offers her playboy stepbrother Leo a night with her if he can seduce and destroy the boy who refused her—the president's son, Logic. But when Leo's fake pursuit turns real, Celine loses control of Leo forever...

title: Between Two Worlds: A Bride for a Bun (English-dubbed)
synopsis: Stranded in a famine-ravaged era, Conrad Hayes unlocks the Two-Way Gate System—a bridge between eras powered by marital bliss. His first wife, the ailing Joyce Bennett, is bought with a single steamed bun. Soon, he rescues her sister Sherry and shelters the poor girl, Renee. Using the Gate to trade across time, Conrad amasses wealth and influence, but danger follows every move.

title: Awakened Bride
synopsis:
Five years into her "marriage", Queenie Saad discovers a devastating secret: Yosef Gray's legal wife is his first love, Vivian Lynch, and they have a daughter together. Reflecting on her sacrifices, including severing ties with her family, Queenie realizes Yosef's heart never left Vivian.

Shattered but resolute, Queenie files for divorce and reveals Yosef and Vivian's hidden affair. Embracing a fresh start, she marries her childhood friend, Chris Jones. Only then does Yosef realize his mistake, but it's too late...

title: Wake Me Up, My First Love
synopsis: In Wake Me Up My First Love movie, Cathy, the fierce boss of the Scorpion Gang, falls into a coma after a staged car accident. When she wakes up, her family elders deceive her into bringing home Prince Alexander of Monaco as a sperm donor to secure an heir. Though they start off disliking each other, sparks slowly begin to fly. Neither of them realizes that Alexander is actually Cathy's long-lost childhood sweetheart—and they’ve been searching for each other all along.

title: Rejecting the Five Alphas
synopsis: Elara, a she-wolf with miraculous healing blood, who was adopted by Alpha Mason ten years ago. Promised to one of his five sons, she endures years of humiliation and betrayal as they repeatedly choose the manipulative maid, Jenny, over her. After a final, heartless act where they forcibly drain her blood to save Jenny from a fake suicide attempt, Elara has had enough. On her 18th birthday, she publicly rejects all five of them as her fated mates. She has accepted a marriage alliance with the powerful Lycan Prince, Xavier Lockhart, securing her own powerful future.

title: The Return of My Drama Queen
synopsis:
The Return of My Drama Queen movie summary takes us to the world of France in a tale of rebirth as we meet Marie Antoinette who wishes to reunite with her while getting executed.
In her new life as Antonia she's not only reunited with her lover but is married to him.
However, their marriage is on the rocks as her husband Nick suggests a divorce.

title: The Mob Boss Substitute
synopsis: She was an ordinary school teacher. After discovering her husband’s affair, she angrily divorced him, only to be mysteriously kidnapped while on the run. Upon waking, she is told that she has been mistaken for the deceased leader of a powerful crime syndicate and is forced to take control of the underground empire. To survive, she must navigate both the criminal underworld and the law, all while secretly investigating the conspiracy behind this case of mistaken identity. When the true culprit’s identity is revealed, she discovers that this impersonation scheme is shockingly linked to her own origins.

title: Love Bombing
synopsis: In Love Bombing movie, in Reelshort's first unscripted series, 40 singles swipe on each other in real life in order to find true love. They are taken on a series of date challenges designed to test compatibility, connection, and long-term potential. But those who didn’t match are given a second chance at redemption: if they successfully break up any of our newfound couplings, they receive cold hard cash. Can love survive love bombing?

title: Too Late, Mr. CEO(English-dubbed))
synopsis: After three years of abuse, Sasha divorces her domineering CEO husband and leaves endurance behind. Focused on her career, she rises fast as admirers gather around her. While her ex rages over the child he believes she lost, Sasha becomes a woman completely out of his reach. When he finally swallows his pride to win her back, he learns it may already be too late.

title: Too Late, Mr. CEO(English-dubbed))
synopsis: After three years of abuse, Sasha divorces her domineering CEO husband and leaves endurance behind. Focused on her career, she rises fast as admirers gather around her. While her ex rages over the child he believes she lost, Sasha becomes a woman completely out of his reach. When he finally swallows his pride to win her back, he learns it may already be too late.

title: From Probation to Proposal: Triplets with the CEO
synopsis: Born in a rural area, Bella's mom suffered from Alzheimer's disease. Bella faced workplace bully as she was broke, making it difficult for her to become a regular employee. When her mom was about to forget her, she met George Hawthorne. After having one-night stand with him, she received a notice of becoming a regular employee. She hated herself for selling her body to get this and began avoiding him. However, her entanglement with him became deeper. After learning that Bella was pregnant, he took her home and began pampering his little wife.

title: My Nephew, The Crown Prince(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Yvette, orphaned daughter of a fallen general, once married Crown Prince Jeremy and suffered endless humiliation. Reborn on the day of the imperial marriage decree, she refuses to repeat her fate. This time, she chooses the Emperor's injured brother, Prince Yale. Miraculously awakened, Yale gives her respect and protection, and love grows between them, while Jeremy, recalling the past, realizes too late he has lost her forever.

title: Rewritten Vows
synopsis: Aurora Quinn loved Oscar Russel, but he and his sister Luna betrayed her. After death, she learns Oscar’s brother, Lucian, was her true protector. Reborn, she returns to the moment Sir Russel asks her to choose a husband and picks Lucian. Oscar keeps scheming but at the wedding Lucian exposes him onstage. In the end, Sir Russel revives and expels Oscar, while Aurora and Lucian start anew.

title: The Double Life of My Deliveryman Husband
synopsis: In The Double Life of My Deliveryman Husband movie, Verna Collins came to the city to visit her daughter Sheryl Vance, who had just given birth to a baby. However, she met Ivy Wright, who was posing as a beggar to find an ideal wife for her wealthy father Emerson Wright. Ivy was charmed by Verna's kindness and arranged a blind date between Verna and Emerson. Emerson, thinking Verna was a fraud, pretended to be a delivery man. But to his surprise, Verna didn't care. Emerson was captivated by Verna's kindness and gentleness and quickly married her. However, at this time, Verna discovered that Sheryl had been deceiving her by using excuses not to let her see her grandson. Sheryl even hired an actor to pretend to be her at her grandson's party. Verna angrily confronted Sheryl, but the latter accused her of being a fraud. Just as Verna was being beaten by her in-laws, Emerson, who had been attending the party incognito, stepped in to stop them. The Dylan family, unaware of Emerson's identity, learned from Sheryl that Emerson was just a delivery man and insulted him. At this moment, the vice president of the Wright Group was invited to the party and was shocked to see Emerson. He immediately stopped the Dylan family from insulting him. But at Emerson's hint, he didn't reveal Emerson's identity. As a result, the Dylan family lost the cooperation with the Wright Group that was within their grasp, but blamed Verna, thinking she had deliberately embarrassed. Verna was heartbroken after seeing through Sheryl's true colors. To cheer her up, Emerson took her to a real estate agency and said he would buy her a house. Of course, to maintain his poor image, he bought a second-hand house. But they happened to run into Sheryl, who was there with Natalie to buy a house...

title: The Beggar Prince & His Runaway Bride
synopsis: Sasha Tyler happens to save the drugged Crown Prince, Felix Wayne, and takes his token by mistake. Disguised as a little beggar, Felix sets out to find his savior and the token. Their paths cross again when Sasha, desperately needing money and food, signs up for Crown Princess selection, unaware that the beggar she knows is actually the Prince seeking a bride!

title: Sister's Rebirth(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Elaine Carver is reborn on the day her brother, Ryan, demands she buy him a luxury car. In her past life, this single act buried her under crippling debt and led to her death. Now armed with foresight, she watches coldly as Ryan runs up an astronomical bill at the dealership. When the final invoice—a staggering 100 million—is presented, Elaine refuses to pay. Her family is left in shock. This time, Elaine is fighting back, and they are about to face the full consequences of their greed.

title: The Betrayal Game
synopsis: After being betrayed and murdered by her boyfriend, Samuel, and his lover Jessica, Nina wakes up before it all happens. Determined to rewrite her fate, she secretly records their affair and plots her revenge. When Samuel tries to scam her again, Nina walks straight into his trap to spring her own. At a tense family gathering, she reveals the proof of their lies, exposing their affair and fraud for everyone to see. This time, it's not Nina who's ruined, it's them.

title: Dine, Dash & Destroyed (English-dubbed)
synopsis: Joyce Pike takes her mother-in-law, Grace, to her husband's fancy restaurant invested by her, only to discover they serve pre-made meals. Seeking justice, she faces humiliation from her husband's mistress. But Joyce is ready to fight back.

title: The Serpent Lord Wraps Her Close (English-dubbed)
synopsis: To save her mother, whose body is turning into snake scales, Leah sells herself and is fatefully bound to Sean, the Serpent Lord, bearing nine serpent eggs. While Sean protects her, he is forced into a heavenly trial and leaves her behind. Alone, Leah returns home, only to be framed as a demon and nearly killed by her village. Sean returns in time to save her and discovers she is the daughter of his long-lost benefactor.

title: The Serpent Lord Wraps Her Close (English-dubbed)
synopsis: To save her mother, whose body is turning into snake scales, Leah sells herself and is fatefully bound to Sean, the Serpent Lord, bearing nine serpent eggs. title: Flight Changed, Marriage Ended (English-dubbed)
synopsis: Celia meticulously planned a family trip, only to have her husband Vince cancel her ticket at the last minute so his childhood friend Dana could join them. Realizing her years of unappreciated efforts, Celia embarks on a journey of revenge and self-discovery...

title: Flight Changed, Marriage Ended (English-dubbed)
synopsis: Celia meticulously planned a family trip, only to have her husband Vince cancel her ticket at the last minute so his childhood friend Dana could join them. Realizing her years of unappreciated efforts, Celia embarks on a journey of revenge and self-discovery...

title: Fated with the Alpha CEO
synopsis: On a full moon night five years ago, Sienna Miller, in a drunken mishap, stumbled into the wrong room and had a one-night stand with Xavier Payne, resulting in the birth of her son, Zack Miller. Fast forward four years, her son Zack begins to show strange symptoms, causing fear and misunderstanding among people, and is labeled a monster and locked up. Just as things seem dire, Xavier appears and saves Zack. It is then that Sienna discovers the mysterious man from five years ago is, in fact, the legendary werewolf...

title: Paper Marriage, Real Pregnancy (English-dubbed)
synopsis: Orphaned young and sold to a remote village, Lorris Seth is forced to marry Derek. On their wedding night, she escapes under duress and has a passionate encounter with Luke Garrison. Unable to find her afterward, Luke searches in vain, while Lorris discovers she's pregnant. To survive, she sells lunchboxes at Garrison Group's construction site. When Derek finds her, Luke appears and unexpectedly proposes a fake marriage.

title: Crimson Storm: Lone Avenger (English-dubbed)
synopsis:
Two decades ago, the esteemed Big Nine clans conspired to annihilate the Reid family. Craig Reid, the only survivor, was rescued by a sagacious master who recognized his potential. Under his guidance, Craig's extraordinary talent propelled him to the zenith of earthly cultivation, poised for ascension. Yet, the anticipated heavenly tribulation never came. His master, sensing that Craig's destiny was tangled with unresolved karma, expelled him from the sect.
Now, Craig crosses paths with Zoe Zimmer and finds himself drawn into her battle against one of the Big Nine. Maybe this is the key to his long-awaited breakthrough.

title: My Kidney for Your First Love?!(English-dubbed)
synopsis: In her previous life, Vivian sacrificed everything for love but died tragically because of the scumbag Gavin and homewrecker Claire. Reborn on her wedding day, when Gavin publicly humiliated her, Vivian exposed his evil intention to seize her family fortune in front of everyone and revealed her own identity as the head of the Cloud Group. Gavin was enraged, but the man Ian he had insulted turned out to be a big shot. Vivian and Ian joined forces to drive their enemies away and got together.

title: My Kidney for Your First Love?!(English-dubbed)
synopsis: In her previous life, Vivian sacrificed everything for love but died tragically because of the scumbag Gavin and homewrecker Claire. Reborn on her wedding day, when Gavin publicly humiliated her, Vivian exposed his evil intention to seize her family fortune in front of everyone and revealed her own identity as the head of the Cloud Group. Gavin was enraged, but the man Ian he had insulted turned out to be a big shot. Vivian and Ian joined forces to drive their enemies away and got together.

title: After the Fall
synopsis: Whitney Stone and Jonsen Grant's five-year romance shatters when Whitney uncovers Jonsen's secret IUI with his dying benefactor, Daisy Lynn, just before their wedding. Heartbroken, Whitney cancels the wedding and dives into her research, while Jonsen, seeking answers, discovers Whitney was his savior six years prior. As he attempts to win her back, Whitney finds new purpose and love in her work.

title: A Mother's Silent Love
synopsis: Maya has devoted her life to raising Matthew, an abandoned baby she loves as her own. On his wedding day, his biological mother, Lillian, returns to reclaim him and accuses Maya of stealing her son. Instead of believing Maya, Matthew leaves with Lillian. This is Maya's wake-up call. She finally decides to walk away. But when her daughter-in-law's life is in danger, she makes one final sacrifice as his mother.

title: After Being Reborn, I Got Married to My Ex-boyfriend’s Uncle (English-dubbed)
synopsis: In a past life, I wed my childhood sweetheart, Drake Elledge, only to find heartbreak as he remained tangled with his first love, resulting in a tragic end for me and our unborn child. Little did I know, his uncle had been silently in love with me for seven years. Now, with a second chance at life, I refuse to repeat the past. When my mother asks if I'll marry Drake, I say no and choose Jace, sparking a new journey fraught with Drake's relentless attempts to win me back...

title: After Being Reborn, I Got Married to My Ex-boyfriend’s Uncle (English-dubbed)
synopsis: In a past life, I wed my childhood sweetheart, Drake Elledge, only to find heartbreak as he remained tangled with his first love, resulting in a tragic end for me and our unborn child. Little did I know, his uncle had been silently in love with me for seven years. Now, with a second chance at life, I refuse to repeat the past. title: Love, Lost and Found(English-dubbed)
synopsis: For seven years, Summer and her childhood friend Shawn shared a bond brimming with unspoken affection. After a spontaneous, drunken kiss, Shawn, wary of intimacy, pushed Summer away with his erratic behavior. Disheartened, Summer becomes the object of affection for another childhood friend, Julian, despite Shawn's persistent interference. Just as her relationship with Julian deepens, he mysteriously disappears...

title: Genius Babies Saves the Day!
synopsis: In Genius Babies Saves the Day movie, in the final of the Global Super Brain Showdown, Team Ofror was on the brink of defeat. Just when all hope seemed lost, an unexpected hero emerged—8-year-old Leland Griffin. He solved impossible Rubik's cubes, detected microscopic differences in water, and assembled a star chart with pinpoint accuracy. Against all odds, he led his team to a stunning victory. Turned out, in his body was the soul of Harvey Bowers, the greatest scientist on earth!

title: The Heiress's Dilemma
synopsis:
In The Heiress's Dilemma movie, Lucille Scott, secret heiress of Brookston's wealthiest family, must live in poverty for 20 years to break a curse that ties her fate to money. Raised in a rundown home by quirky parents, she crosses paths with Bryan Hawkins, a powerful heir dodging an arranged marriage. He offers her a million to pretend to be his girlfriend. But fate takes over when her parents unknowingly pick him as her blind date.

Pretending to be a rich heiress, Lucille enters high society only to be humiliated at a charity gala. Just as things fall apart, a mysterious billionaire claims her as his daughter, flipping the tables on everyone.

From secret identities and fake relationships to sudden love, kidnappings, and outrageous family tests, Lucille and Bryan must navigate chaos, sacrifice, and a curse on the verge of breaking. When she turns 23, her true identity is revealed. And with Bryan giving up everything to be with her, Lucille finally claims love and power on her own terms.

title: ReelTalk EP 49-Red Carpet Ready with Meg
synopsis: Spend a day with Meg Bush as she gets red carpet ready for the International Short Drama Festival. Go behind the scenes of her glam process and catch the stunning dress reveal before she heads to the event. Stay tuned! You might spot some familiar faces along the way.

title: Pregnant by Contract
synopsis: Diagnosed as infertile, wealthy heir Adrian Graham is forced into a marriage of convenience with pregnant girl, Marina Shaw. What begins as a transactional union soon unravels amidst corporate schemes and hidden dangers. But when a shocking truth emerges—the baby she carries is his own—their world turns upside down. Now, they must navigate family secrets, deceit, and a love that defies all odds.

title: The Girl Who Healed Death
synopsis: Sugar was adopted by the Millers but got abused and regarded as a demon due to her supernatural abilities. Actually, she was the granddaughter of Lord Underworld. Her dad knew about Sugar's background and rushed to find the Millers. By then, Sugar had been sold to a research institute. Her dad rescued Sugar in time and brought her back home. Sugar cured her Grandma, helped Uncle Chase stand up, and resolved the crisis of Uncle Jasper. Finally, she smashed the scheme of Lord Julian and reunited with her Grandpa, Lord Underworld.

title: Pregnant by the Serpent King
synopsis: Accidentally transported into a book as a minor character doomed to die, Genny refuses to accept her fate. She's determined to change her story, but she's certainly not planning to give birth to snake babies for a Serpent King!

title: My Legendary Daddy
synopsis: Hector Kellow, head of the Hall of Mars, lived peacefully with Kira Laird after repelling invaders. Tragically, after their daughter Sophia's birth, Kira was taken by her family, leaving Hector to raise Sophia alone. Five years later, discovering Kira was forced to engage Ian Nelson, Hector attended Harriet Nelson's birthday party with Sophia. There, he revealed his identity, intimidated the guests, rescued Kira, and struck a blow to the Nelson family. Reunited, they returned to Kellow Village, where Hector repaid villagers with gold. However, a misunderstanding led to conflict with his father Jude, putting family ties at risk...

title: The Exiled Heir Returns
synopsis: Chester Wilson, the most gifted assassin from Villains Valley, crosses paths with Isabel Evans, who is being hunted by Black Dragon, and is forced to unleash his deadly skills. When he returns to his family, he finds his mother murdered, his grandmother kidnapped, and his inheritance stolen by his stepmother and half-brother. To reclaim his birthright, Chester must navigate a web of family treachery, criminal power plays, and his own vow of vengeance.

title: Christmas Mix up
synopsis: When Alejandro (Claudio de la Torre), a groom left at the altar, escapes to a remote estate to mend his broken heart, his life takes an unexpected turn when he meets Clara (Francis Rodríguez), the messy, sarcastic, and surprisingly vibrant caretaker. What begins as a chaotic clash turns into a Christmas entanglement filled with humor, jealousy, misunderstandings, and revelations that force them both to discover that love’s miracles happen where least expected.

title: Married to a Rogue Prince(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Marian Sutton, daughter of the Marquis, is ordered by the emperor to marry Prince Harlan. But when Harlan rescues his cousin Scarlett from drowning, Marian's grandmother insists on a dual marriage. Betrayed and poisoned by Scarlett and Harlan, Marian is given a second chance at life. Reborn on the day of the marriage decree, she boldly rejects Harlan and chooses the notorious Prince Julian, the capital's infamous playboy.

title: Married to a Rogue Prince(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Marian Sutton, daughter of the Marquis, is ordered by the emperor to marry Prince Harlan. But when Harlan rescues his cousin Scarlett from drowning, Marian's grandmother insists on a dual marriage. Betrayed and poisoned by Scarlett and Harlan, Marian is given a second chance at life. title: I Ditched Him for His Rival
synopsis: Esther Jennings discovers her fiancé, Channing, is cheating with her stepsister, Ember, and worse, she's pregnant. Heartbroken, Esther seeks revenge by marrying the ruthless Carl Shepherd, the infamous "Devil of Riverton." In exchange for his power, she agrees to be his wife, but they vow to keep things strictly business. As Esther fights back against her betrayers, the line between pretense and real feelings blurs, and love grows in the ashes of revenge.

title: A Mother’s Wait: Mom, Dad, I'm Back
synopsis: In A Mother’s Wait Mom Dad I'm Back movie, fifteen years ago, Elijah Morton was separated from his mother Sabrina Lester at a fair and adopted by General Hale Gibson. After Gibson became the King, he appointed Elijah Duke of South and ordered him to build a palace in his hometown while seeking his parents. Staying at Lord Gideon Quain's estate, Elijah repeatedly missed recognizing Sabrina, who worked there as a servant. When Sabrina's house was seized for palace construction, her nephew Wyatt Morton attempted to force her out. Elijah intervened, confirming their mother-son bond through a keepsake. Wyatt later kidnapped Elijah to curry favor with Gideon, who panicked upon discovering this and freed Elijah by revealing his status. Sabrina and her husband Alfred Morton sought help from Elijah's fiancée Camille Elwood. Camille's stepfamily framed her for theft, leading her father Larry Elwood to sentence her to marry Chester Quain. Elijah rescued Camille and punished the conspirators. At Sabrina's estranged father Paul Lester's 70th birthday, Sabrina presented Elijah's expensive wine in plain packaging. Her jealous sisters denounced it as fake, prompting Paul to disown her. Elijah arrived with officials bearing lavish gifts, exposing the family's hypocrisy. He departed with his parents as Paul regretted his cruelty.

title: My Bodyguard Is A Hidden Tycoon
synopsis: On the eve of her wedding, Vivian is shattered when she catches her fiancé cheating. Unexpectedly, she shares a passionate night with her bodyguard, who has secretly loved her for ten years. Together, they make a bold public statement by calling off the wedding. As their relationship begins to flourish, secrets about his identity surface.

title: Fated Bride: Uncle Became the Lover
synopsis: Anne has been chosen as Gavin's little bride since childhood. But on their engagement day, Gavin cheated on her with Grace. Anne was heartbroken and had a one-night stand with a man called Robert. She was forced to be Robert's secret lover for three years. However, she didn't know Robert was exactly Gavin's uncle, Arman. Anne thought she was saved by Gavin many years ago, but actually it was Arman who saved her. She and Arman finally got together and lived happily ever after...

title: Eyes of Fortune, He Sees Everything
synopsis: Alex, once a humiliated salesman, has his life turned around after saving CEO Evelyn. He gains the ability to see through jade, skyrocketing him to fame and fortune in the high-stakes world of antiques and gems. But his success draws the wrath of rival Logan. As Alex discovers his growing powers, he teams up with Evelyn to fight enemies and protect his family in a dangerous world where every move could make or break them.

title: Where the Light Enters
synopsis: Annie Grant, neglected by the Grant Family because of foster daughter Vivian Linwood, was betrayed by her fiancé Max Hunter before their wedding. Heartbroken, she broke off the engagement and chose teaching in the mountains, where she reunited with Marcus Chandler, found true love and the warmth of the Chandler Family, and embraced a new life.

title: The Ugly Consort's Comeback Plan(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Reborn as Molly, a noblewoman falsely accused of infidelity, she's poisoned by her husband's concubine. But when a modern-day scientist wakes up in Molly's body, everything changes. Armed with science and vengeance, Molly plans to take back control, divorcing the cold prince Yale and making everyone who betrayed her pay. With the Emperor and Empress on her side, she rises to power, leaving Yale and his concubine in ruin, no love, just victory.

title: The Heiress's PhD Boyfriend
synopsis: After the death of chip genius Professor Lewis, his son Sawyer goes into hiding and is saved by Vivian, the heiress of Jones Group. Twelve years later, as the head of the company, Vivian joins the race to advance chip technology. When their paths cross again, they team up to fight back against their enemies, protect the nation's future, and find love amidst the chaos.

title: 24 Hours to Save Her(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Howard was once the Undefeated Boxing King. However, during a crucial match, he was drugged by his opponent, leading to a devastating loss. In the violent aftermath, he tragically lost his beloved daughter. His wife left him, and he was expelled from the boxing association. He had to scrape by as a food delivery man. Then he met a single mom Nancy and her daughter Mia, and they got along well. Later, a rich man wanted Mia's kidney for his own daughter, but Howard saved Mia...

title: 24 Hours to Save Her(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Howard was once the Undefeated Boxing King. However, during a crucial match, he was drugged by his opponent, leading to a devastating loss. In the violent aftermath, he tragically lost his beloved daughter. His wife left him, and he was expelled from the boxing association. He had to scrape by as a food delivery man. Then he met a single mom Nancy and her daughter Mia, and they got along well. Later, a rich man wanted Mia's kidney for his own daughter, but Howard saved Mia...

title: Battlefield to Boudoir: She Rules Them All
synopsis: Claire, daughter of a military family, was invincible on the battlefield. After her death, she finds herself in the body of the wife of Sebastian, CEO of Fowler Corp. To secure her independence, Claire agrees to a one-year marriage contract with him, promising to play the role of his wife in exchange for a house and a job upon divorce. Throughout the year, Claire not only outmaneuvers those who threaten her but also charms Sebastian's siblings. Sebastian gradually becomes captivated by her and embarks on a journey to win her heart.

title: Mad Heiress Unleashed
synopsis: In her past life, Evelyn Sinclair was framed by her impostor "sister", locked away in an asylum, and met a tragic end. Reborn, Evelyn's motto is simple: she deals with problems with just action, no talk. When the impostor schemes against her, she retaliates. When her brother picks a fight, she has him arrested... But Lawson, the charming heir who proposed a purely transactional alliance, has become an unexpected complication. Now that her revenge is complete, why won't he leave her side?

title: Found a Billionaire Hubby on the Street
synopsis: Her fiance cheated on her, so Joanna broke up with him. However, on her way back, a man on the street suddenly grabbed her leg. And for saving him, she was rewarded with one million? Joanna said, "I'll take this heavenly fortune!" She thought she was just going to be a contract wife, accompanying Mr. Crazy Billionaire Edward to go crazy in the wealthy family, but she met true love!

title: Desire Under Cover
synopsis: FBI agent Jayda goes undercover at a strip club, only to be assaulted by the villain and rescued by a mysterious masked man. After a one-night stand, she wakes up to find only a letter and mask left behind by him. Later, she discovers that the mystery man is actually Nico, the elusive crime boss behind the club. As she gets closer to Nico, misunderstandings and kidnappings occur, and Jayda finds herself falling for him. Despite his deep involvement in crime, Nico begins to change because of his feelings for her. Torn between love and justice, Jayda must decide what path to take.

title: Underestimate Her at Your Peril
synopsis: Vivian Whitmore, a brilliant CEO with a perfect life, survives a car accident only to uncover a shocking betrayal: her fiancé is her stepfather's illegitimate son. He's plotting to steal everything from her and even plans to commit her to a mental hospital. Refusing to be defeated, Vivian hires a bodyguard and fights back, determined to reclaim what is rightfully hers.

title: Vengeance in the Veil
synopsis: The rich heiress Isabelle stole Natalie's fiance on her wedding. Natalie's father was too mad and fainted. Isabelle demanded that nobody go to treat Natalie's father. Natalie decided to take revenge. She went to seduce Isabelle's father Dominic. Dominic knew what Natalie was up to, but he still couldn't resist this young girl. He fell in love with her and married her. Natalie became Isabelle's stepmom and would take everything from Isabelle.

title: The Real Heiress Returns
synopsis: Reborn as the neglected true heiress of a powerful family, Supreme Seer Zenna Wynn is mocked, exploited, and set up to fail. When her aunt demands her blood and the fake heiress schemes to disgrace her, Zenna casually reveals her true power, ancient martial arts, lost medicine, and shadow empires, forcing the world’s elite to bow and leaving her family speechless.

title: From Orphan to CEO's Daughter
synopsis: The orphan Emma was abandoned by her foster parents. Then she met the dying Andrew. After Andrew adopted her, he became healthy again and earned more money, even his mom's disease was cured. Andrew found Emma was his lucky girl who could help him achieve great success in the business world. Andrew exposed his uncle's scheme and reclaimed his family fortune with Emma.

title: Power Never Felt So Sweet
synopsis: Julia, Mystic Grandmaster, failed her ascension and was reborn as a rich heiress sharing her name. Betrayed by her adoptive father and a scheming fake heiress, she turned their tricks against them. Forced to help restore her power, Noah, the Hale heir, started falling for Julia. Together, they navigated schemes, danger, and mutual love.

title: Blind to Love, Bound to You
synopsis: To save himself, Xander Quinn must find the one woman with dark energy—Sienna Jade—and make love to her, even if it costs her life. He deceives her into marriage and secretly pays for her grandmother’s treatment. Grateful, Sienna gives herself to him—unaware of the deadly price. Xander later falls for her and desperately searches for another cure. However, before he can save her, she discovers the truth. Heartbroken, she tries to escape, only for fate to seal her tragic end. Miraculously revived by her grandmother's pill, she wakes up blind. Seven years later, she returns with her daughter, unknowingly crossing paths with Xander. Oblivious to their identities, he torments them—until the truth shatters him. Determined to win her back, he conceals his identity. But when Sienna regains her sight, she finally sees the monster who once stole her life.

title: I Was His Secret. Now I’m His Regret.
synopsis: Holding onto Ethan's marriage promise, Cynthia was his secret lover for five years. But when pregnant Kelly returned, he dumped her. Cynthia joined Reese Group, cutting ties. Ethan's late regret failed to win her back. While he and Kelly faced retribution, Cynthia found true love with Jerome.

title: Dumping My Ex, Founding My Love
synopsis: Five years ago, Thora Snider gave up everything to marry Marc Neel, transforming him from a broke nobody into a powerful CEO. But on their fifth wedding anniversary, Marc "surprised" her with his pregnant mistress, Ella Frost, and forced her to step aside for their true love. Disillusioned, Thora vowed to take back everything she had given him...

title: Airing Their Dirty Laundry
synopsis: On his engagement day, Bentley catches his fiancée's mother Cynthia in bed with her childhood friend Derek York. Before he can expose them, he's killed in a staged accident. Reborn on that same fateful day, Bentley has a new weapon: a live broadcast. He secretly administers an aphrodisiac to the illicit couple, streaming their compromising moment to the entire guest list. However, Bentley's quest for vengeance delves even deeper. His investigation uncovers a sinister plot involving Derek and his father. Bentley seizes this chance to decisively eliminate Derek, leaving his fiancée's family in regret...

title: His Brother's Wife
synopsis: In a marriage marked by neglect, Regina is sidelined by her husband, Marlon. Three years in, Marlon is diagnosed with a terminal illness with only ten months to live. Suddenly, his mistress arrives with his only child, confident of securing her place. Just as she believes victory is hers, Regina returns with a surprise — an heir from a fateful night with Marlon's brother, Jared. As Regina prepares to reclaim her position as the lady of the Stanton family, the true father of her child opens her door up at night...

title: Phantom of His Heart
synopsis: At eighteen, May witnessed her childhood love Alvin take a bullet for her and vanish into the sea during a cruise ship abduction. To uncover the truth, she agrees to marry into the wealthy Grant family. On the eve of her wedding, she encounters a motorcycle mechanic with altered memories, Miles — who is, in fact, the presumed-dead heir of the Suttons, Alvin.

title: My Wife and Daughter Got Superpower
synopsis: Nine Dragons with a Coffin transported Luke Hayes to the Otherworld. By the time he came back, his wife had been cast aside by her family, and his daughter had suffered abuse. To protect them from future harm, Luke fed them dragon meat. Now both his wife and daught got power to protect themselves.

title: Touch My Daughter, Then Die
synopsis: Verity Hall, the formidable Queen of Ado City, left three years ago to develop a cure for her daughter Rowena's rare disease. Upon her return, she discovers her husband has conspired with the maid, Julia, and their illegitimate daughter, Sylvia, to take over her household, subjecting Rowena to daily abuse that leaves her mentally unstable. Heartbroken, Verity decides to reclaim her identity and attend a banquet to settle old scores and exact her revenge.

title: What?! You're in My Body!
synopsis: In a freak accident, undercover agent Lena Shane and gang leader Ryan Wayne switch bodies. She is forced to play the ruthless gangster in his body, while he secretly uses her body to go undercover. From hating each other's guts to cracking a case together, they uncover a drug conspiracy and the truth behind his father’s death. Meanwhile, a sweet romance develops between them.

title: Jerk Ex, You Missed a Real Heiress
synopsis: Nina, the low-key heiress of the Sky Group, devoted all her resources to supporting her poor boyfriend Steve. But after his return from studying abroad, he cheated on her with Mandy. Nina decided to focus on her career. Then she found there was a silent knight called Joey who had protected her for ten years, also a rich family's son. After exposing Steve's true colors and the fake heiress lie of Mandy, Nina also resolved her family business crisis. Nina said goodbye to the wrong person and chose Joey.

title: Blood Betrayed, Forever in Debt
synopsis:
After losing her parents in an accident, Anna, the only daughter of a renowned medical family, leaned on her brothers Eddie and Evan until an orphaned girl named Tina entered their lives.
Tina manipulated her way into the family, turning the brothers against Anna. Anna was cast out and dedicated herself in secret to completing her parents' cancer research.
12 years later, she returns as a brilliant scientist. Her brothers beg for forgiveness, but Anna has already made peace with the past.

title: Who Is the Bride's Husband?
synopsis: Natalie was forced to marry the Kingsley son in place of her sister. She didn't know the Cousin Adrian she met on her wedding night was actually her husband Victor, who was rumored to have disfigured his face. Victor hid his identity to test her. Their feelings gradually grew amidst interactions. Facing the calculations of the Kingsley family, old family grudges, and a kidnapping crisis, the disguised couple worked together to reveal the truth, and move from mutual testing to mutual love.

title: Crippled Prince's Love
synopsis: Reborn and pregnant, Julia Monroe hides two secrets. To survive, she makes a deal with crippled Prince Adrian: she'll fix his legs, he'll protect her “bastard” twins. But as they unite against a common enemy, a greater secret emerges—the man she's healing holds the key to their true parentage.

title: Tailor Wife & Her Protective Boss
synopsis: Reincarnated back to 1995, Wendy marries the aloof Charles Gould, heir to the Gould Garment Factory, to avoid a tragic fate orchestrated by her cousin Rachel. Unbeknownst to her, Charles has secretly loved her for years. Their relationship humorously transitions from a contractual agreement to a genuine commitment. As Wendy starts her own clothing business, Charles quietly supports her ambitions. Together, they navigate family conflicts and corporate rivalries, ultimately leading GGF to a successful IPO and crafting their own tale of romance and entrepreneurial success.

title: My Poor Husband is a Big Shot
synopsis: The man worked hard outside for many years, eventually escaping poverty and becoming a well-known tycoon.After achieving success and fame, he returns to the small town, hoping to hold a belated wedding ceremony for his wife. However, his wife's family believes he is a down-and-out loser. In order to force the poor woman to remarry a social elite, they insult, beat the hero, and even force him to divorce. Faced with such bullying, the wife remains calm and works together with his wife to resolve various crises. He ultimately reveals his true identity to everyone, reclaiming his dignity.

title: You're in for a Wake-Up Call, Betrayers!
synopsis: In her past life, she was a billionaire business queen, betrayed and poisoned by her husband, brother, and sister-in-law. Only in her final moments did she discover that the nephew she raised was actually her husband’s love child. Now, she's back at her 23rd birthday, ready for revenge. She kicks out the white lotus, freezes her brother's assets, and cancels her engagement to the scumbag fiancé. Cold, ruthless, and out for blood, she'll make every betrayer pay the price.

title: Before I Was Born, I Planned Revenge
synopsis: In her past life, Ellie was shamed as a bastard by her biased father and ultimately murdered by his beloved mistress. After death, she learns her world was a novel, and she was only a disposable character. Reborn in her mother's womb, Ellie plots from before birth. Using foresight and cunning, she wins the trust of the head of the Grant family, exposes a poisoning scheme, and drives her enemies out, securing justice and a future for herself and her mother.

title: The Prey's Counterattack
synopsis: When lawyer Elaine is accused of harboring her son who assaulted a neighbor, she must prove her only "son" is actually her dog, Cole. But the conspiracy deepens: fake DNA reports, a sudden pregnancy, and even her long-lost father return to torment her. Trapped in a web of lies and public shame, Elaine fights not just for her reputation, but to expose a ruthless scheme targeting single women.

title: Super Godfather: Ex-wife Begging Me to Get Remarried
synopsis: Vincent Rogers was framed by his wife Lauryn Torres on the charge of having an affair with his mother-in-law and was forced to leave with nothing. At his wit's end, he was unexpectedly recognized as Don Watson's grandson and inherited the Eye of Satan, becoming the heir of the Grand Group. With his ability to see through treasures and his business acumen, Vincent made a comeback, trampling on the Torres family, swallowing up the Evans Group, winning the heart of Sabina Strauss, and making a billion-dollar profit in the stone gambling field, thus foiling the Anti-Grand Group's conspiracy. As Don Watson's tests for him were gradually unlocked, Vincent eventually took over the Grand Group, exposed Lauryn's crimes, married his true love Sabina, and reached the peak of power.

title: Real vs. Fake Heiress
synopsis: Jane Lynch was sponsored by a rich billionaire, Mr. James. Because of a misunderstanding, Jane thought she was Mr. James's long-lost daughter. But it was not true. At the billionaire's house, she met his real daughter, Maya, whom he also sponsored. Jane kept bullying the true heiress Maya, and she caused many problems in Mr. James's company. Jane almost ruined Mr. James's company. Will this evil and mean girl get punished?

title: Final Game: Saving My Brother
synopsis: In Final Game Saving My Brother movie, after prison, Rowan Collins learns he has a twin brother—Vincent Collins, the legendary gambling king. To protect his brother's empire, Rowan must become him, stepping into a world of high-stakes deception. Betrayed by his past and hunted by rivals, he must outplay them all in a dangerous game of revenge—and fulfill his vow to end gambling for good.

title: My Uncle's Secret Obsession
synopsis: To save her mom, Sylvia Warren's engaged to Ethan Fletcher. Seeing no future, she sets her sights higher—on the true power in the Fletcher empire: his uncle, Sean Fletcher. Her plan is simple: seduce Sean, secure her freedom. But Sylvia doesn't know that she's the girl Sean has been searching for all along. Every "accidental" encounter was his design. Sylvia must discover if the man she targeted as her ladder out is her ultimate trap... or her only salvation.

title: Accidentally His Remedy
synopsis: To escape an arranged marriage to an elderly man, Vivian takes a job as a hotel cleaner. On her first day, she encounters Adrian, who has been drugged. Despite his unusual allergy to women, Adrian finds himself mysteriously unaffected by Vivian. After spending a night together, Vivian becomes pregnant and, at Adrian's mother's insistence, moves into his home. As they spend time together, love blossoms between them. With Adrian's support, Vivian confronts those who wronged her and returns to school to continue her education.

title: Fated Mate of the Nine-Tailed Fox
synopsis:
Rin, the sole heir of the White Nine-Tailed Fox clan, was kidnapped as a child by the Black Nine-Tailed Fox and raised in darkness.
On her 20th birthday, she plans to escape—once her fox powers finally awaken. But fate has a cruel twist in store: her destined mate is revealed to be Hyun Dong-joo, the cold and powerful leader of the Black Nine-Tailed Fox.
Rin and Hyun Dong-joo resent one another and reject the bond. But just when White Fox leader Baek Do-yoon steps forward and claims Rin as his fated partner, Hyun Dong-joo suddenly declares he will marry her instead.
Who will truly be Rin’s fated mate?

title: She Owns Me Tonight
synopsis: Framed by her fiancé Justin and stepsister Kelly, Vivian Lee becomes the nation's most hated woman. But little do they know—her delivery-girl life was just a disguise. Now she’s back, ready to reveal she's the true heiress of the Lees. From livestream takedowns and family showdowns, to training the timid Ryan Shaw into a formidable heir, Vivian plays a ruthless game of power and payback.

title: Scarlet Revenge: The Emperor's Love
synopsis: Clara David, the daughter of the premier royal purveyors, is driven by vengeance after her parents are slain by bandits wielding imperial guards' tokens. Believing the Emperor to be the culprit, she transforms into an enchanting courtesan and enters the palace. Unexpectedly, she finds herself drawn to a mysterious palace guard, unaware that he is the Emperor in disguise. But is the Emperor truly the culprit behind her parents' murder?

title: No Mercy in Her Second Life
synopsis: In her past life, Jennifer mourned a husband who was never dead. After he faked his death, stole his brother's identity, and conspired with his lover to kill Jennifer and her child, she is reborn before the tragedy. This time, she ends the cursed pregnancy herself and rejects a life of false widowhood, choosing instead to marry the powerful regent everyone fears.

title: I Loved Her, I Lost Her
synopsis: Zane asked to divorce Sherry because his first love Bella came back. But he didn't know his wife was a hidden heiress. Her real name is Lilian. After divorce, Sherry took back everything she gave to Zane. Without Sherry's secret support and help, Zane's company and business were hard to maintain. He regretted it, but his wife would never come back.

title: The Throne's Forbidden Love
synopsis: Jane Dunn, a general's daughter, and Charles Spencer, an unloved prince, were in love and promised to spend the rest of their lives together after Charles came back from battle. While Charles was away fighting, Jane was forced into marrying Charles' brother Dylan by the dying king. Back from battle to find his beloved now Empress, Charles was livid and made Jane his servant in exchange for not killing her and Dylan, as well as guarding Dylan's throne. While she was there, Lady Katelyn who fancied Charles came up with many plans to tear them apart and hurt Jane, but the plans were all thwarted by Charles. As Jane and Charles got closer together, Dylan got into a jealous rage and forced Jane to help him kill Charles. Thinking his plot was about to succeed, Dylan revealed the truth about framing Charles to become the crown prince and killing the late king. Just then Jane came back to save Charles. The pair resolved their bitter feelings in the past and Charles won the throne back from his brother.

title: Kneel, Your Majesty! The Exiled One Returns
synopsis: In Kneel Your Majesty  The Exiled One Returns movie: Neal Stone, the mastermind behind Dragon Hall, covertly transformed Patricia Fleming's small nation, Qruling, into a formidable force. Yet, under Edgar Meskill's sway, Patricia dismissed Neal as just a consort and exiled him. Enter Empress Lillian of Jofdon, who boldly confessed her love for Neal. In the end, Neal not only proved Patricia and her officials wrong but also found true happiness with Lillian...

title: Love That Saved Me
synopsis: Marina Sinclair is unloved by her family. Framed by her sister and thrown into jail, she's shamed by her father, cursed by her mother, and blamed by her brother.
