After cutting ties for good, she unexpectedly becomes the cherished obsession of Damien Yates, the untouchable "Golden Scion" of the city. Only then does she realize: Damien has always been the light in her darkest days — silently guarding, healing, and loving her. To him, she's always been exclusive.

title: ReelTalk EP 48-Flirting, First Kisses, and Fighting
synopsis: It’s back to school for the cast of Taming My Bullies! Meg Bush, Cameron Porras, and Travis Owens face off in a series of games in this High School Challenge episode to see who really rules the school. Plus, they spill stories about flirting on set, first kisses, and even a few fights!

title: Sister Pact, Love's Contract
synopsis: To save their orphanage, sisters Nora and Vivian Collins sign a contract to become the Johnson family's "professional daughters-in-law." Tough, martial arts expert Nora is assigned to tame the playboy heir, Colton. Meanwhile, Vivian is ordered to heal the reclusive, Graham. It's a business deal: fix the brothers, get the cash. But when their mission is nearly complete and the sisters prepare to leave, Colton and Graham realize that they've fallen for their wives.

title: A Street Scam Made Me a Martial Legend
synopsis: Barnett Grant, a delivery driver, buys a "fake" martial arts manual from an old beggar, only to awaken real, terrifying power. After accidentally injuring Chloe Reynolds, he marries into her family, a fallen martial clan under siege. When he casually masters the long-lost Chaos Tai Chi Art, everyone mistakes him for a hidden grandmaster. One fight after another, Barnett crushes elite rivals, revives the Reynolds family, and begins to realize he may be a once-in-a-century martial arts genius.

title: Perfume Revenge: Change a Husband
synopsis: Sylvia, born with an irresistible charm, seemed to have it all as a glamorous CEO wife, but her jealous cousin kills her. Reborn on her wedding day, Sylvia lets her cousin switch grooms and marries the short-lived William Zimmer instead. But William not only survives, he thrives, and the Zimmer family prospers like never before. Meanwhile, Sylvia's ex loses everything without her, and her cousin suffers a far worse fate than before.

title: The Forsaken's Revenge
synopsis: Ethan, young master of the Summers family, awakens a unique martial soul, only to be scorned as the weakest of its kind, facing constant humiliation. Unwilling to succumb to fate, Ethan sets out on a solitary journey, overcoming numerous trials and unlocking the true potential of his devouring martial soul.

title: Two Worlds Apart
synopsis: In a world divided by wealth and privilege, two baby girls are unknowingly switched at birth, each raised in the life intended for the other. On one side is Isabella, a spirited young woman who grows up with every luxury imaginable, unaware that her family’s vast fortune is not rightfully hers. Raised by her wealthy “father,” Mr. Donovan, and groomed to embody poise and elegance, Isabella is engaged to Adrian, a charming, ambitious man who seems to complete her picture-perfect life. On the other side is Elena, raised in poverty by her loving yet struggling “father,” Mr. Martinez. A grounded and hardworking young woman, Elena works as a janitor in Donovan Industries, the very company owned by her real family. Despite her modest circumstances, Elena carries an innate sense of sophistication and resilience that draws people to her.Their worlds collide when Elena crosses paths with Adrian, Isabella’s fiancé. A chance encounter sparks a connection between them, challenging Adrian’s loyalty and drawing him toward the quiet strength and authenticity that Elena possesses. As the secrets begin to unravel, Adrian’s feelings lead him to discover the truth behind Isabella and Elena’s past...

title: More Than Just His Sister
synopsis: Business mogul Eliza Reed returns home with plans to rescue her husband Julian's faltering company, only to discover his suspicious closeness with his secretary, Quinny. Julian insists Quinny is just like a sister to him, yet she possesses Eliza's personal belongings and her late mother's heirloom. Confronted with her husband's favoritism and betrayal, Eliza awakens to the truth and finally decides to divorce him.

title: Her Rejection, My Chance
synopsis: When the proud Evelyn rejects wealthy Adrian's charity, the desperate Natalie seizes the chance he offers: secure Evelyn's acceptance, and he'll fund her education. Natalie succeeds, but the price is becoming Adrian's kept woman—a substitute for the one who refused him. As she navigates a gilded cage of obligation, a startling shift begins: Adrian's fascination with the woman he couldn't have transforms into a longing for the one he took for granted. Now, Natalie holds a power she never sought—the key to his regret.

title: Little Princess Came Back Radiant
synopsis: Camille gained 120 pounds, saving her fiancé Astor, only to discover he faked his death to marry his sister-in-law Tina. After a stunning transformation, she returns with a powerful new ally: Charles Lester, the CEO who worships her. Together, they crash Astor's wedding, unveiling Camille's true identity as the hidden daughter of the "Godfather." Now, it's time for payback—and a billion-dollar "wedding gift" they'll never forget.

title: The Oath and the Orphan
synopsis: In a time of chaos, a single mistake bound two men in hatred. Victor, a ruthless assassin, stole his enemy's daughter and raised her as "Orphan". Douglas, an honorable inspector, took Victor's son and named him "Drifter". Raised on opposite sides of a bitter feud, destiny reunites them as adults—and Drifter falls helplessly in love with Orphan, the woman he was born to hunt. But as the truth unravels, they must choose: will the sins of their fathers destroy their future, or can their love rewrite a legacy of vengeance?

title: Loving You in the Wrong Body
synopsis: Architecture student Melany Ryder made a deal with the CEO, Noah Aiken, to save her ailing mother. While Noah appears to be a gentle, wheelchair-bound man, his soul actually belongs to Liam Aiken, his nephew from the future. In this life, he vows to protect her. As Melany begins to sense his secret love, the mistaken identities and emotional dilemmas confuse her. The truth, family conspiracies, hateful young Liam, can they deal with them all?

title: She Ruled the Wilderness
synopsis: In a post-apocalyptic world, Major Sevyn finds herself inhabiting the body of a notorious villainess who shares her name — one known for colluding with a scoundrel and tormenting her own children. Banished and facing scarce resources, Sevyn possesses a hidden space filled with abundant supplies. With her husband and children hating her, she decides reshape her reputation!

title: Schemes of the Heart: Mr. Hart's Game
synopsis: Framed and betrayed by her own family, Maya Lane loses everything. Given a second chance, she returns with a single goal: vengeance. Navigating the cutthroat worlds of high society and entertainment, she forms an unlikely alliance with media mogul, Liam Hart. Together, they will expose the lies of her Keira and scheming father Gordon, turning their gilded world upside down. Betrayal runs in the family, but so does her will to survive and conquer.

title: Kidnapped a Prince to Be My Husband
synopsis: Amidst her divorce from Quentin, Nora unexpectedly travels back in time, awakening in the body of a 300-pound woman who narrowly escapes a murder attempt. To survive, she transforms into a formidable bandit leader on a mountain, where she raises four children. With their clever help, she captures Quentin, who once again becomes her husband as they rule over the mountain stronghold.

title: ReelTalk EP1-Under the Mistletoe with Seth and Nicole
synopsis: Welcome to ReelTalk, a weekly ReelShort podcast hosted by Rachel Bencosme! Join us as we spill the tea with your favorite stars and dive into the raw, real conversations about life and ReelShort shows. With new episodes dropping every Friday, ReelTalk is sure to keep you hooked and coming back for more!

title: His Carefully Planned Sin
synopsis: After losing her mother as a child, Lillian is taken in by the powerful James family following her father's sudden death. A single night with Sam James, the family’s second son, seems like a mistake until she realizes it was carefully orchestrated. As his obsessive pursuit closes in, the truth behind her adoption and her buried past begins to unravel, leaving Lillian trapped between desire, deception, and a fate she never chose.

title: Blossom in Armor
synopsis:
In Blossom in Armor movie, Riley Hale joined the army in her father's place and saved the emperor from the enemies. As a reward, the emperor granted her the largest estate as a dowry and promised to fulfill any request with a jade token. Returning home, Riley shed her armor for a wedding dress and married Steve Barron. Five years later, Steve brought his confidante, Fiona Smith, to Riley, asking her to give up her position as his wife and give him the estate because Fiona wanted to hold her wedding there. Steve and his family pressured Riley to leave and even demanded she provide a dowry for Fiona. Humiliated, Riley resolutely went to the palace and requested a divorce with the jade token. She asked to return to the battlefield to defend the borders and the people. There, she met her true love. The Crown Prince fell for Riley at first sight, and together they subdued the turmoil in the north, earning Riley great military merit once more. The Crown Prince was determined to marry Riley, but faced many obstacles...
Episode List

title: ReelTalk EP 55-2025 Year in Review
synopsis: ReelTalk’s 2025 Year in Review highlights everything our vertical stars loved, learned, and lived for this year. This New Year’s special brings us together to relive the memorable moments of 2025 and set our intentions for 2026. Come celebrate and tune in!

title: Defying the World for Her Bodyguard
synopsis: Ether Gasper is the secret head of the HiddenOrder, a mysterious international organization. But to fulfill her grandfather's last wish, she comes back with her loyal bodyguard and marries into a business deal with Kray Shepherd. Yet on her wedding night, Kray is off playing the field. She confronts him, only to be threatened with Julius' life. This marriage is a contract, but her bodyguard is not. He's picked the wrong guy to hurt.

title: The Emperor's Antidote
synopsis: Faye Monroe, a genius healer obsessed with curing the incurable, discovers her ultimate challenge in Crown Prince Julian—the victim of a deadly poison. To study him, she infiltrates his palace as a maid. Julian, believing her a spy, subjects her to ruthless tests, only to find an unshakeable loyalty. They strike a dangerous bargain: she will cure his body; he will be her ultimate test subject. But as Faye delves deeper, she uncovers a secret that shatters Julian's world and plunges them both into the heart of a throne-threatening conspiracy...

title: The Lazy Immortal's Nightmare
synopsis: All Damon Hayes wanted was to stay hidden in his new cultivation world, quietly enduring his humble job as a night soil collector. That plan was shattered the day he awakened the Intelligent Cultivation System. Instead of a godly tool for ascension, it became his personal guide to hell—stealing from a Demonic Sect Elder, offending the Demonic Saintess, and painting a target on his back for every powerful being in the realm. Now, as a forbidden technique descends upon him and the Saintess sharpens her blade, Damon has just one question for the system: “Was keeping a low profile really that hard?!”

title: The Real Heiress in the Shadows
synopsis: Damien admired Renee. Used as a stand-in by Damien for three years, Sylvia didn't know she was Renee's long-lost sister. Renee got Sylvia back and started fighting for her, guiding Sylvia to success and true love.

title: A Recipe for Revenge
synopsis: Wynne Sloan had it all: a business empire and a decade-long marriage to Frank Quinn—until a "car accident" took her unborn child and her ability to have more. She soon uncovers Frank's affair with her own sister, Yvonne, and realizes the crash was no accident. From CEO to betrayed wife, Wynne masterminds a cold, calculated takedown. She strips Frank of his titles, fortune, and sanity, while sending Yvonne where she belongs: behind bars.

title: The Fallen Monarch's Rise
synopsis: Betrayed by the Empress Dowager, Emperor Robert was humiliated and captured by his enemies. Just as his maid Rose was about to be hurt, a modern soul entered his body. With a new system unlocking his power, Robert escaped, rescued his allies, and came back to his kingdom to reclaim his throne.

title: Return to Claim Her
synopsis: The billionaire Adrian died in an accidental fire. His wife Helen tried hard to keep his family fortune. Adrian's family didn't want a woman to take charge. Helen did not care about the gossip of relatives. But one day, Adrian's younger brother Nathan came back at his brother's funeral, holding Adrian's will in his hand. Nathan claimed that his brother had left everything to him and he was the true heir of the Vaughn family. But what surprised Helen even more was that Nathan looked exactly like Adrian... Is he really her husband's brother?

title: Loving You Was My Mistake
synopsis: For six years, Evelyn has stood by her husband Adrian, only to be betrayed when he forces her to sign a waiver and causes her parents' deaths. And it's all to protect his true love, Serena. Resolute in her quest for justice, Evelyn joins forces with Nathan, another victim of Adrian's schemes, to orchestrate a plan that leads to Serena confessing her crimes live and Adrian's company collapsing. As her ex-husband begs for forgiveness, Evelyn turns away with a new love, smiling, knowing that some loves are not worth waiting for.

title: Snatched a Feisty Heiress
synopsis: She quietly marries into a top family, only to be mocked as a trophy wife. On their wedding night, she's left alone, so she buys a city landmark. As her husband ignores her, she takes control when a family crisis hits and exposes a conspiracy. With a snap, she flips the boardroom and dominates the racetrack. When old secrets resurface, everyone realizes that she's not just a gold digger. She's the queen back for revenge.

title: Empress of Revenge
synopsis: The richest CEO Isabel found her husband Adrian cheated on her with a college student called Roxanne. And this ungrateful student's school fees were even sponsored by Isabel. Plus, Adrian had poisoned her for a long time, trying to steal her assets. Isabel set up a trap and ruined them in the end.

title: Spend and Conquer
synopsis: Fresh out of prison, Christian discovers his ex-wife stole his fortune, took a younger lover, and left him for dead. A mysterious rune awakens a "10x Cashback System." Every dollar he spends on women returns tenfold. From luxury gifts to public humiliation, Christian flips the script, crushes his enemies, wins the hearts of powerful women, and rises from discarded ex-con to untouchable king of excess.

title: My Plumber Boyfriend Is a Hidden Heir
synopsis: Evan appears to be a plumber who left school to support his ailing father, but in reality, his father is a wealthy tycoon. During a repair job, he meets Serena, a school beauty, and after learning she's been disowned by her family, he offers her shelter. Then, the two decide to pretend to be a couple to handle their respective issues. Meanwhile, Tyler, who has feelings for Serena, retaliates by targeting Evan and undermining Serena's family business. It's not until Evan's supposedly ill parents reveal themselves that Tyler and Serena's father realize their mistake. Ultimately, Evan and Serena achieve both love and career success.

title: Millionaire Mode
synopsis: Isabella Méndez cleans rooms at a luxury hotel in Miami, quietly dreaming of one day opening her own café. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she's mistaken for Mariana Echeverría—a glamorous heiress and influencer set to buy the hotel, remodel it, and fire the entire staff. Instead of telling the truth, Isabella slips into the fantasy and accepts a dinner invitation from Alejandro de la Vega, the hotel's owner and Mariana's future business partner. What begins as a harmless mix-up spirals into a whirlwind of secrets, romance, and high-stakes consequences. As the real Mariana closes in and the truth threatens to unravel, Isabella must choose between protecting her heart… or facing the fallout.

title: No More Nice Girl(English-dubbed)
synopsis: Thea, the Reed family's heiress, discovers her fiancé, Henry, has been letting his friend Lynn eavesdrop on their private moments. Henry accuses her of overreacting. After pressure from his parents, Thea gives him one last chance. But Henry, along with his friends, continues to humiliate her. When he learns Thea has secretly married the most influential man in the city and realizes he's just a pawn in the Grants' game, he's shattered.

title: ReelTalk EP3-Are New Year's Resolutions Still a Thing?
synopsis:
Meg and Jesse gets bubbly as they ring in the new year with Rachel Bencosme for a fun, reflective, and slightly competitive episode! The duo takes a trip down memory lane to revisit the biggest trends that made 2024 unforgettable. Did they hop on the latest TikTok lingo? Did they rock any of the Gen Z fashion fads? Find out as they play a hilarious round of End-of-Year Bingo, checking off all the trends they (or definitely didn’t) partake in!
But that’s not all. Meg and Jesse also spill their plans, goals, and resolutions for 2025. Grab a glass (or two) and tune in for a mix of laughs, insights, and maybe a few surprises along the way!

title: ReelTalk EP 58-Noah Fearnley Opens Up About Who He Really Is
synopsis: Noah Fearnley gets real as he opens up about his struggles as an actor and the things that matter most to him. Joined by his good friend and host, Sarah Moliski, the two relive hilarious memories and play a round of hot seat questions that prove they’re definitely not strangers. Expect honesty, laughs, and all things Noah in this heartwarming episode.

title: Sweet Mommy, Daddy Is Coming
synopsis: When Zoe was broke, a cute boy called Noah appeared and asked to hire her as his Mommy. Zoe lost some memories and had no idea this boy was actually her biological son! Apart from her son, Zoe also lost a daughter who was living a poor life. Will Zoe and her lover Liam get their daughter back?

title: Oops, You Fired the Wrong Woman
synopsis: Lena, a rich heiress, entered the Sutton Group as Eric's fiancée, with hiding her true identity. It was a childhood arranged marriage. Lena appeared to be addicted to gaming and neglecting her duties, but actually, she used business resources and connections of her family to clear all obstacles for Eric, helping his company go public, and elevating him to be a business tycoon. However, Eric was unaware of this. He blindly trusted his scheming assistant Sophie, and ignored Lena's care and kind reminders...

title: Pampered by My Ex-husband
synopsis: CEO Mr. Hall is hailed as the perfect husband until Cici returns with a child and blows up his spotless image. When he tries to win her back, she shuts him down cold: the child is hers, and he's the one she walked away from. Only after meeting two pint-sized versions of himself does he realize the truth. Chasing his ex? He'll have to get in line.

title: Seven Years as Your Stand-In
synopsis: Everyone assumes Winter is blindly devoted to Nicholas, enduring humiliation as his secretary. In truth, she stayed only to honor a dying promise to her late lover, protecting Nicholas for seven years. While Nicholas turns a blind eye to her suffering, Winter repeatedly risks her life for him. By the time he finally falls for her, she has already given up and walks away.

title: Five Little Secrets
synopsis: Five years ago, Nina gave birth to quintuplets, but two of them were taken away by someone who intended to marry rich Mr. Beaumont with bad intentions. And that evil woman secretly abused the two kids. Five years later, Nina returned with her three kids after undergoing plastic surgery to rescue her another two kids. However, the exchange of the two sets of twins went interesting, with the children being mistakenly switched. Eventually, the misunderstanding was resolved, and Nina returned to the wealthy family with her five kids.

title: My Husband, My Startup
synopsis: Flora time-traveled into a novel world and became a vicious fake heiress, also the villainess. Flora faced her husband's bankruptcy just after getting married into the wealthy family. Everyone was waiting to see Flora dump her husband and run away. However, Flora had the novel script. She chose to accompany him to make a comeback. The cold and aloof tycoon became the richest man. Flora panicked, "Mr. Tycoon, I only want your company's shares!"

title: Who's Playing Whom?
synopsis: Maya Nolan, once an abducted heiress, is now the world's top hacker and head of an assassin organization. But she's back for revenge. She infiltrates the Kane household under false pretenses, only to engage in cat and mouse game with her nemesis, the DarkNet Lord, Sebastian. In this crafted vendetta, who will be the ultimate mastermind?

title: Fated With My Fox CEO
synopsis: A thousand years ago, Evangeline sacrificed herself to protect Alexander, the Nine-Tailed Deity, from Archfiend in the celestial realm. Grieving, Alexander facilitated her reincarnation, vowing to reunite with her. In the present, college student Selena is rescued from a car accident by a mysterious Nine-Tailed Deity. Using a mystical coin, she discovers Alexander, now the CEO of Halo Corp. As Alexander searches for the reincarnated Evangeline, their lives become entangled, but altering mortal fate brings divine repercussions...

title: Daddy Is Not Who You Think
synopsis: Ethan, heir to a business empire and leader of Dragon Hall, rescues Sarah Sowle during a period of self-imposed exile in the city—an encounter that sparks a deep connection between them. Five years later, Sarah arrives with their daughter, Evie. Learning he has a child, Ethan is determined to make things right. Yet their path is fraught with hardship. But through Ethan's quiet but unwavering intervention, the trio overcome these threats to forge the peaceful family life they long for eventually.

title: After I Became the Emperor's Bully
synopsis: Rowan Ashford is reborn as the villain in a novel—a cross‑dressing, arrogant heir fated to be executed by the male lead, Adrian Collins. To survive, she must publicly humiliate him while secretly improving his affection for her. In a dangerous game of pretense and desire, can Rowan rewrite her fate and win the heart of the future king?

title: Marry The Wrong Bride
synopsis: Bianca Anderson has been contracted by her father to marry Angelo de Rossi, the heir to the Rossi multimillion company since she was just a child. But growing up to be an independent woman, she finds it off to marry a man she has never seen before. She tricks her twin sister, CAMILLA Anderson, into taking her place a few days before the wedding. On the wedding day, Bianca is shocked to see a very handsome man at the end of the aisle. Desperately, she asks Camilla to call off the pretense, but it's already too late. Her twin sister is already very attracted to Angelo. Bianca is so pained that she moves into the mansion with CAMILLA and Angelo under the guise of being uninterested in the marriage. She has one goal on her mind, to take back Angelo. A couple of weeks later, a popular blog surfaced with DNA test results claiming that CAMILLA had a child and abandoned him while she was a teenager. The evidence is damning and she is unable to defend herself. Angelo is disappointed and following an advice from his best friend, Leo, he seeks solace in Bianca’s arms. He gets close to her and finally, Bianca lures him to bed. Being a decent man, he fixes a date for their wedding. Not long after, Camilla finds out that it was her sister, Bianca, behind all the plotting after all. She is furious at her betrayal and goes all out for revenge, putting everyone on the edge. How far would she go in her quest for love and vengeance?

title: Tyrant, I'm From Modern Society
synopsis: Cultural relic restorer Luna was transported into a novel world and became a princess. Based on the original plot, her identity was exposed after only three days, and she was stabbed to death by the tyrant. To survive, she had no choice but to follow the original plot and deal with the tyrant Damian. Faced with repeated dead ends, Luna cleverly resolved the crises. Damian couldn't help but be attracted to her, and the two gradually developed feelings for each other. Luna healed his childhood trauma and warmed his lonely heart.

title: Dumped? She's Upgrading!
synopsis: After two years at war, Andrew Garrison returns—not to his wife Lesley, but to his sister-in-law Evelyn. Unbeknownst to the Garrison family, Lesley is no helpless wife: she's the student of a renowned healer. While Andrew and Evelyn indulge in their affair, Lesley quietly revives the "deceased" heir Edward and seizes control of the household. In a mansion filled with lies and betrayal, she turns from the scorned woman into the master player.

title: I'm Reclaiming What's Mine
synopsis: Clara, true heiress of the affluent Sinclair family, was switched at birth by a nanny and grew up in hardship in the countryside. Just as she was found by the Sinclairs, the false heiress Yasmin, desperate to hide her true origins, kills her own parents and frames Clara for the murder, resulting in a three-year prison sentence. Upon her release, Clara finds her family absent, celebrating Yasmin's birthday instead. Determined to reclaim her rightful place, Clara vows to expose Yasmin's deceit and rebuild her life, skillfully turning the tables to reclaim her ultimate destiny.

title: Marry Me, In the Name of No Mercy
synopsis: Amelia Sutton wakes up as the disposable character in the novel she read. Forced by her infertile husband, Carey Abbott, to bear a child to secure his title, Amelia makes a daring choice: she picks the future Emperor—the blind musician, Ansel Sinclair. Using her knowledge of the story, she turns from a pawn into the player, becoming the obsession of the man destined to be a tyrant.

title: The Ocean's Gaze
synopsis: Henry, a salvager in the dangerous Mynara Sea, is swept away by a storm and gains the legendary Trident of the Sea King, unlocking a supernatural power to see treasure locations. With his newfound abilities, he navigates the treacherous waters, forms alliances with loyal Milo and merchant heiress Sophia, and rises to become the wealthiest and most powerful King of the Sea, determined to conquer the world’s oceans.

title: All Clear at Last
synopsis: Seven years undercover to repay a mistaken debt, AI prodigy Olivia hides her power to uplift her mediocre husband, only to be betrayed when he moves his mistress and their love child home. This is the final nail in this marriage. She immediately divorces him and flash-marries her nemesis, leaving her ex in deep regret.

title: Hold Me Tight, Brother
synopsis: Mother's begging, stepfather's harassment, Lea had a toxic family. But her stepbrother, Audric, was like a hero, saving her from hell again and again. Since then, she has been leaning on him. However, everyone called her a dead weight to him. But little did she know, Audric loves her.

title: I Found My Husband's Secret
synopsis: Sarah Curren, an emergency room doctor, receives a call from her husband Harrison about a "canceled flight" during a surgery break, unaware he's actually at a hotel with her sister-in-law Mandy. Later, Harrison is hospitalized in a coma due to expired medication, revealing the truth to Sarah. Heartbroken, she also discovers her miscarriage was caused by Harrison and Mandy. Determined to reveal their betrayal, she exposes the scandal at Mandy's wedding to Harrison's brother...

title: ReelTalk EP 38-Backstage: Cooking My Way Back to Love
synopsis: Get ready for a fresh slice of Cooking My Way Back to Love! Host Laze stirs things up with Adam Daniel, taking us behind the scenes of this fiery new show. From the exciting BTS footage to Adam’s take on what makes the series special, you won’t want to miss it. Plus, keep your eyes peeled for another furry guest in this Backstage episode!

title: Reborn as His Deadly Temptation
synopsis: Betrayed and murdered in her past life after being used to bear the Crown Prince's heir, Erin is reborn with vengeance in her heart. Disguised as a palace maid, she infiltrates the Eastern Palace to destroy those who wronged her. As she carefully sets her trap, Crown Prince Spencer falls into an obsession she never intended. Keeping him just out of reach, Erin turns desire into a weapon, each step closer to him drawing her nearer to revenge.

title: ReelTalk EP 63-ReelHotline with Jesse
synopsis: Introducing the ReelHotline on ReelTalk! For the first time ever, fans can call their favorite vertical stars and ask the burning questions they’ve been dying to know. In this episode, Jesse picks up the phone and shares stories and secrets you’ve never heard before.

title: You Messed With the Wrong Sisters
synopsis: Nina sacrificed her freedom to help her sister Valerie escape an arranged marriage, only to be trapped in a brutal marriage with the Ashford family. Ten years later, Valerie controls a powerful underground empire, while Nina suffers abuse and infertility. When they reunite, the sisters team up for revenge. Nina exposes the Ashford family's crimes, rebuilds her career, and finds love with Brian. Together, they fight to take back their lives.

title: Second Chance: A Prince's Obsession
synopsis: Sophie unexpectedly time-traveled to ancient times, and she was to be buried! Then she kicked open the coffin, shocking everyone! Her property was being stolen? She found a man to use as a sperm donor to have a child, and then came back to seek justice! What? The man she randomly found was actually a prince? This is perfect! With the royal family's backing, she can also promote her profession! After all, she is best at... making women pregnant.

title: The Princess Who Walked Away
synopsis: Qianrin borders are under attack. Gretta Ely, heartbroken by Crown Prince Hades Maverick's intention to wed someone else, requests a diplomatic marriage decree. Hesitated, the emperor still appoints her as Princess of Qianrin. She will marry in seven days. Meanwhile, the crown prince, unaware of her decision, remains confident that his childhood sweetheart would never leave him.

title: ReelTalk EP 53-Happy Holidays, Hollywood
synopsis: Happy Holidays, Hollywood! The first annual ReelShort holiday shoot is here. Your favorite lead stars come together to reflect on their journeys in verticals, share dream collaborations, and spread festive cheer in this must-watch holiday special.

title: Heal Me, Annie
synopsis: Annie, a warm-hearted nurse from an orphanage, always faces life with optimism, lighting up the lives of everyone around her. But despite her kindness, she can't seem to reach Wade, a man hardened by his tough past in Cantana's slums. Silent and closed off, Wade believes he's destined for misery until Annie enters his life, bringing him from darkness into the light.

title: Seduced by My Proud Fiance
synopsis: On the day the Stone family's second daughter is to be married, the long-dead eldest daughter returns, now inhabited by Ellie, a thousand-year-old immortal. Sent to repay a love debt, Ellie is bound to Sebastian, a cold and powerful heir who resents her across lifetimes. As she restores the fallen Stone clan and earns his love, Ellie finally breaks her love trial only to give up immortality to save him.

title: Zero Sum
synopsis: Ethan paid an advance of 8,000 bucks for a reception fee to secure a 100 million order. But when he went to the finance department for reimbursement, he was informed only 1,000 bucks could be reimbursed according to the group's regulations. Feeling aggrieved, Ethan went to the chairman to seek justice, only to find that even his 100 million order had been snatched away. He was so mad and went to the client to split the meal expenses. At this point, his fate started changing...

title: The Lawyer in a Fool's Body
synopsis: Noah Collins, a modern judge's assistant, wakes up as the son of the Chief Justice in Astralon—with only 72 hours to live. To survive, he must rely on a mysterious "Codex System" and his "Eye of Judgment" to solve cases, uncover royal secrets, and outwit corrupt officials. With his enigmatic wife Grace Sinclair at his side, every trial becomes a desperate fight for time.

title: The Heiress's Mask: Love Betrayed
synopsis: Sophie, the daughter of the richest man, hid her identity and pretended to be an orphan. After two years of marriage, she fully supported her husband in starting his own business. When she went for a prenatal checkup, she bumped into her husband accompanying his childhood sweetheart and her son. The little boy actually called her husband "Dad". She decisively proposed a divorce. After the divorce, she returned to her family's company and met her ex-husband on a party. Her ex begged for mercy on his knees...

title: The Boy with Golden Eyes
synopsis: In his previous life, Keith attempted to assassinate his enemy to avenge his parents, but was instead killed by his subordinates, dying with regret. Upon opening his eyes, he finds himself reborn at the age of ten and unexpectedly awakens the 'Golden Eyes' — an ability to see through the essence, value, and truth of all things. Now, it's his chance for revenge.

title: The Princess of My Phobia
synopsis: Reborn with memories of her past life, Caroline sets her sights on the Crown Prince before fate can slip away again. She plans to take his bloodline, disappear, and raise the child alone. Six years later, she returns to the capital in search of her son, only to collide with the very man she abandoned. What she never expected was that the once-invincible Crown Prince had developed a fear of women… and has been searching for her ever since.

title: ReelTalk EP 34-Backstage: Pregnant by My Ex's Professor Dad
synopsis: We’re graduating today… to the set of the steamy series, Pregnant by My Ex’s Professor Dad, starring Jesse Morales and Tess Dinerstein! Join our host, Sarah Moliski, as she takes you behind the scenes to uncover the sizzling secrets of bringing Jesse and Tess’s characters to life. There’s drama, games with the crew, and wait for it, alpacas. Steamy scenes and furry friends? Count us in.

title: Playing Weak, Winning Big
synopsis: Abducted as a child, Vera wins her freedom on a stormy night and returns to her wealthy birth family. Faced with a scheming fake heiress and open favoritism, she hides her strength and plays the underdog, exposing lies, proving her intelligence, and steadily reclaiming her identity and inheritance in the modern city.

title: Husband and Kids Chose Her Over Me
synopsis: Housewife Sarah knew her husband Lucas was arrested for participating in prostitution. She hurriedly went there, but her husband even blamed her for being too slow. Because he didn't want his first love to get sunburnt. Sarah decided to divorce Lucas. But her two children, whom she had raised with deep love, sided with the mistress Grace. Sarah decided to go abroad and leave this family. After Sarah left, Grace revealed her true colors. The children began to miss their mom, but Sarah would never turn back.

title: Storybound? Now Let me Modify Your Fate
synopsis: Elizabeth time-travelled into a novel world as the Villainess and got a System. The System also gave her a Golden Finger, which allowed her to change the novel storyline. Every time she changed the plot, the fate of those roles in the novel world also changed. The original male lead Wyatt and female lead Ivy became unlucky. Elizabeth knew a guy Adrian who was reborn...

title: ReelTalk EP 61-Beachside Valentine's
synopsis: Take a romantic long walk on the beach in this ReelTalk Valentine’s Day special! Jesse Morales and Seth Edeen open up about their dating styles and it just might make you fall head over heels all over again.

title: Runaway Bride
synopsis: John's fiancée, Samantha, grows cold feet on the day they were supposed to get married and disappears. John collapses and is rushed to the hospital where he meets Lucy, a medical doctor who treats his wounds, and as they got to know each other outside the hospital, she nurtured his broken heart. Few months later, Samantha walks into John's apartment, bruised and battered. After being rushed to the clinic and receiving treatment, Lucy asks John who she was, John lies and says they're just friends. After Lucy leaves John to catch up with Samantha, she tells John she still wants to be his bride, but John is already engaged to Lucy. John seeks advice on his new problem with his best friend, Felix who began to grow feelings for Lucy ever since he was visiting John on his hospital bed. Would Felix play the role of a good friend? Is John going to take Samantha back?

title: Heartless Frost, Dr. Z's Awakening
synopsis: Dr. Rowan Lawson spent a decade crafting a miracle cure for Dawn Summers, only to watch her gift the triumph — and her heart — to another man. When her new lover deliberately destroyed the serum to force him out, and Dawn stood by in silent approval, Rowan's devotion finally froze over. He vanished from her world and returned as the medical world's most formidable and elusive legend: Dr. Z.

title: Poison in the Honey
synopsis: Betrayed by the very father who doted on her, Nora Graham discovers his affection was a cruel lie to elevate her half-sister. After his ultimate betrayal leads to her family's ruin, death grants her a second chance. Reborn with hardened resolve, Nora returns to the glittering, cutthroat world of the Graham mansion. No longer the naive heiress, she plays the part of the dutiful daughter while quietly dismantling the conspiracy from within.

title: Contract Wife Is a Drama Queen
synopsis: Adrian, unhappy with his family's arranged marriage plans, hires Chloe, a spirited pig butcher, to be his contract bride. Chloe accepts the role for financial gain, skillfully navigating challenges and adversaries. As they grow closer, hidden truths about Adrian's past and Chloe's true identity emerge. Amidst the revelations, they find themselves falling in love, their destinies intertwined by fate.

title: From NYC with Warehouse
synopsis: Adam Foster travels back from the future and becomes the son of a fallen official. He loses his family, title, and hope overnight. But fate throws him a lifeline—a cosmic glitch has bound him to a colossal warehouse at Yobor from his own time. Armed with modern resources, knowledge, and sheer audacity, Adam begins his impossible comeback. From turning trinkets into treasure to outsmarting the corrupt elite, he builds an empire where none should exist.

title: Dispel the Clouds
synopsis: In Dispel the Clouds movie, after decades away, Ingrid Berry returned home with her grandkids, answering her mother's birthday invitation with cautious hope. She dreamed of a heartfelt reunion—but instead walked straight into a nightmare. Her father and siblings humiliated her, and her dad even tried to sell her off for money. Luckily, her son and grandkids came to her rescue just in time. Ingrid finally realized these people weren't family but leeches. Without hesitation, she cut ties for good and left the past behind, starting a new life abroad with the only ones who ever truly loved her.

title: Trapped in Her Skin, Switched by Fate's Spin
synopsis: Orphan Erin Bourn, consumed by jealousy, uses a mysterious candy to swap bodies with the privileged Sep Pena. Erin seizes Sep's life, reveling in her family, love, and opportunities, while the real Sep is unjustly declared insane and confined to a mental institution. As the deceitful heiress becomes ensnared in her own lies, Sep, armed with the trust and aid of her loyal friend, orchestrates a daring fight to reclaim her identity.

title: The 500,000 Divorce
synopsis: David Bennett thought he had found happiness in his remarriage to Madeline. But when his ex-wife, Evelyn Hart, reappears, the façade of his new life begins to crumble. Dark secrets surface. As David's company teeters on the brink of collapse, Madeline prepares to dump him. In his darkest hour, only Evelyn steps forward, offering not just financial salvation but a chance at redemption.

title: ReelTalk EP 75-ReelTrip: Thailand
synopsis: Join Savannah Coffee and Chris Quartuccio as ReelTalk goes international for its first-ever ReelTrip to Thailand. From the vibrant streets and skyline of Bangkok to iconic landmarks like Wat Pho, these costars dive into Thailand’s culture through unforgettable food, shopping, sightseeing, and makeovers. Experience the flavors, fashion, and beauty of Thailand through their adventure abroad.

title: Not His Blood, But His Heart
synopsis: Framed by her boyfriend and sent to prison, Annette Switt is offered a way out: save a tycoon's life with her blood. She seizes the chance, only to return home and discover his betrayal. Heartbroken, she marries the powerful Alexander Fletcher in a swift, convenient arrangement. But when revenge turns to real connection, they join forces to take down those who wronged her—and find an unexpected family along the way.

title: The Wrath of the Queen of Hell
synopsis: Escaping an arranged marriage, the Master of the Jade Hall from the Underworld is reborn in the body of a princess betrayed and murdered by her fiancé. After a drugged night with the Regent Prince, Jade sheds her timid persona and takes the palace by storm. Instead of being the delicate flower the prince imagined, she wields a whip in one hand and a knife in the other, sending enemies fleeing. The prince may think she's meek, but even the ghosts in the palace are terrified of her wild side!

title: Her Research Report, Your Ultimate Regret
synopsis: Billionaire Gavin Sullivan and his secretary Louise make their biggest mistake when they bully a seemingly ordinary woman over a parking spot. Unbeknownst to them, Lana Harper is the brilliant, low-key scientist behind the epoch-making Hodon-I discovery. As they escalate their ridicule, Lana's formidable credentials begin to surface, setting the stage for a reckoning that will redefine power and prestige.

title: ReelTalk EP 71-Maria and Nate's First Date
synopsis: Maria Barseghian and Nate Flores from Once Upon a Breakup hit the streets of LA for the ultimate foodie date. Maria takes Nate through her go-to spots from trendy coffee shops to smash burger joints, ending with a little friendly competition at the arcade. Great food, real chemistry, and a day that gets a little more intimate with every stop.

title: Trending Scandal: Stepmom Stole My Man
synopsis: On the seventh day of her marriage, Alexis walks in on her husband and stepmother having an affair. Yet she's accused of cheating and pushed down the stairs. Given a second chance, Alexis has another plan. She swaps their birth control for powerful laxatives and seals their room with glue. Then, she triggers an online frenzy for a missing husband search. As the media and rescue teams swarm in, Alexis leads them to break into the marital suite.

title: ReelTalk EP 74-Gabrielle Brown: Surviving Betrayal and People Pleasing
synopsis: For Mental Health Awareness Month, Gabrielle Brown opens up about the unglamorous side of the industry and overcoming hardships. From setting boundaries to navigating healing after marriage, Gabrielle discusses growth, resilience, and protecting your peace. Tune in for a vulnerable discussion on mental health and advice for anyone navigating a difficult time.

title: ReelTalk EP 77-Love Whisper
synopsis:
Four breakout stars from ReelShort’s hit LGBTQ series come together for an intimate Pride Month special short video, sharing their most genuine crush confessions through cinematic monologues inspired by real emotions, memories, and love stories.
Set against dreamy summer nights, camcorder footage, and coastlines, Crush Confessions captures the quiet ache of longing, youth, and the moment every love song finally starts to make sense.

title: Appraiser's Ascension
synopsis: Mason, a small worker in an antique shop, broke a vase, saved a Divine Dragon, and unexpectedly received the magic power Divine Vision! From then on, counterfeits and fakes could no longer hide. He helped his beautiful boss Clara resolve the crisis, becoming the best appraiser. Big shots from the capital lined up to give money to him! Mason constantly rose and became famous...

title: Never Promise Forever
synopsis: To fulfill a thousand-year vow, the Goddess Selena created a magical puppet to withstand the cruelty of her reincarnated lover, Seth. When the puppet finally shatters, Seth is consumed by a gut-wrenching realization of the truth. Selena, however, has already found a soulmate in Christian, leaving the three of them trapped in a whirlpool of obsession and fate. After surviving life-or-death trials, Selena lets go of her fixation on the past. She then uncovers Christian's own heart-wrenching secret spanning cycles of reincarnation.

title: Did You Just Poison Me, Wife?
synopsis: Daniel transmigrates into the body of a degenerate gambler, only to wake up and realize his own wife has just poisoned him. Salvation arrives in the form of the "Daily Intelligence System", which grants him crucial foresight each day. Seizing this second chance, Daniel completely reforms, and leverages modern knowledge to introduce advanced firearms, single-handedly turning the tide of battle and earning a noble title. Yet, his greatest challenge comes not from war, but from a rift in time itself, threatening to separate him from the wife he has grown to cherish.

title: ReelTalk EP 59-Luke Spills His Workout Secrets
synopsis: Luke Charles Stafford invites us to the gym for an up-close look at his workout routine. Ever wondered the secrets to building an alpha body or how much training it takes to play the dreamy lead? Get ready to break a sweat and tune in for an episode that’ll have you moving!

title: My Boss Is the Lord of the Netherworld
synopsis: After serving 800 years in Hell, Alison is reborn into the wealthy Carter family—only to discover she's the discarded real heiress. Her mother is being poisoned, her identity stolen by an impostor son. Disguised as a maid's daughter, Alison returns with a mystical "Book of Karma" that delivers instant justice. Now, she must expose the lies, protect her mother, and reclaim her rightful legacy—one revenge at a time.

title: Famine & Fortune: My Silent Wife's Golden Touch
synopsis: The big shot Alan traveled back to the famine year and became a broke punk. He relied on his mute wife Nina and his sister-in-law Mary for survival. At the beginning, he faced multiple crises, including no food in the house, Nina and her sister being sold by their father, and thugs coming to collect debts. Later, he hunt in the mountains to support his family, earned money by selling herbs, and even cured Nina's muteness. He met Lily, the owner of a pharmacy, and got a deal on medicinal herbs. He even helped villagers to collect herbs and increase their income.

title: ReelTalk EP 73-Can Vertical Actors Sing a Justin Bieber Song?
synopsis: We’re hitting the road for festival season! Cole Gerdes and Mellisa Goodwin hop behind the wheel for a special carpool karaoke-style Finish the Lyrics challenge. Can they recognize the songs or will they completely flop under pressure?

title: My Mother-in-Law Wants My House
synopsis: Sydney, secretly the heiress of Lawrence Group, marries Jackson Johnson and buys a house with her own money. But three months into her pregnancy, her mother-in-law, Gloria, moves in, claiming Sydney's home for her son, Jordan. What begins as a battle over family greed and entitlement turns into a war for Sydney's dignity. Justice may be delayed, but it's never denied.

title: The Ascending Heir
synopsis: After being cast down from the immortal realm, Marcus Langley awakens in the body of a cowardly heir to a declining ancient martial clan. With his wife Claire Lynn—a rare Phoenix cultivation vessel—by his side, he must hide his true power, outsmart ruthless rivals, and restore his family's glory.

title: Love Crossed a Millennium
synopsis: After rescuing a mysterious woman from a rainy night, Alexander never expected she came from a thousand years ago—or that he’d fall for her. When Elena chooses to return to her era, he lets her go. But fate rewinds time, and now she has three days to change their story.

title: ReelTalk EP 52 -Backstage: American Sniper: The Last Round
synopsis: ReelTalk Backstage is back and reloaded for the action-packed new series American Sniper: The Last Round. Join Marc Herrmann, Jesse Morales, and Aaron Russell as they take you behind the scenes for explosive moments you won’t find anywhere else. Find out their super powers and maybe even some first impressions of each other!

title: The Prince Is My Kid's Dad?!
synopsis: Lyra, Marquis Hayden's eldest daughter, decides to raise her son alone. When her grandfather is critically ill, she returns home. Facing her stepmother and stepsister's schemes to marry her off to a sumgbag, she chooses to wed the prince! Unexpectedly, he's willing to accept her son as well! But why are the Emperor and Empress holding her son without her knowing?

title: The Wedding Crasher: Contract Love
synopsis: Hired to ruin a wedding, Nora Scott is offered a deal by the billionaire, Asher Parker: a one-year contractual marriage for a life-changing sum. Unknowingly, she's the spitting image of his fiancée, heiress Cathy Sinclair. This is no coincidence—it's part of a scheme by Cathy's stepsister, Nydia Sinclair, to steal the family fortune. Asher, who only wanted a convenient wife to thwart his family's plans, finds himself drawn to the enigmatic woman wearing his lover's face.

title: Grandpa 2.0: Invincible at Ten
synopsis: Ethan, the world champion of Go, met two gods on hills. They were playing chess. After taking over one round of the game for a god, 49 years had passed on Earth. They gifted him a Divine Peach, which turned him into a ten-year-old boy. Ethan returned home as a child, but was blocked by bodyguards, bullied by his grandson, and despised by his son-in-law. He solved the Exquisite Go Game to prove his identity and used the peach pit to wake up his wife. But there was another hidden story behind the family crisis.

title: ReelTalk EP 76-Backstage: Taming My Bullies 2
synopsis: Our iconic enemies-to-lovers is back and better than ever! Go behind the scenes of Taming My Bullies 2 and discover how Meg's signature look comes together. Cam also gives the inside scoop on filming some of the shirtless swimming scenes, while the director breaks down the inspiration behind key shots and what it really takes to bring this story to life.

title: ReelTalk EP 70-Bound by Honor: A Special Chapter Reading with Rhett Wellington
synopsis: Brace yourself, dark romance lovers. A special reading of a chapter from Bound by Honor, ReelShort’s hit adaptation of Cora Reilly’s book, is finally here. If you’re a fan of the book or the series, you won’t want to miss this intimate reading by Rhett Wellington, bringing Luca to life in a whole new way.

title: The Black thrones
synopsis:
John and Jack Blackthorne are the twin sons of a billionaire and the heirs to their father's empire. When the older Mr Blackthorne dies after a prolonged illness, the will he left behind isn't what his sons expected. In a bid to teach his boys a lesson, he edited his last will to include a stipulation of an arranged marriage for both of them. They twins are to try and win the hand of his caretaker's daughter, Evangeline Herrera. Her mother agreed to this because she sees her daughter as wasting away her youthful years and decides that a marriage to one of the Blackthorne sons will be good to uplift their family.
John Blackthorne falls in love with Evangeline on first sight, and when it seems to be mutual, he feels like he has won already. But his brother Jack also lusts after Eva and wants to have her all to himself even though his feelings aren't as pure as that of his brother. He is cunning enough to gain the favour of her mother, and he promises her all the expensive things if she can convince her daughter to choose him.
Will her mother's pressure push Eva over to Jack's side? Or will the warm love she feels for John be able to fight and win in just six months?

title: ReelTalk EP 60-Spend a Day with Me on Set
synopsis: Ever wondered what it’s like to spend a day on set with a vertical actor? Savannah Coffee and Blake Lewis take us behind the scenes of their morning routines, sharing their favorite Laifen products that help them get ready for a long day on set. Get the inside scoop on all the glam in this week’s episode of ReelTalk.

title: ReelTalk EP 50-Happy Reelsgiving!
synopsis: We’re giving thanks with the dynamic duo, Sarah Moliski and Aaron Oberst! Join them as they catch up over a delicious Thanksgiving dinner, share what they’re grateful for, and reminisce about their time working together on Her Double, His Trouble. They even unwrap some special gifts from Laifen. Tune in. You might just win 100 coins to watch even more on the ReelShort app!

title: ReelTalk EP 67-Backstage: Pucked in the Friend Zone
synopsis: Seth Edeen returns to the ice in this exciting episode of ReelTalk Backstage. Follow along as he takes us inside his new show Pucked in the Friend Zone, showing how he prepares for game day and what it really takes to suit up for hockey. His co-stars also dish on why hockey players are so irresistible and share behind the scenes tea from set. Catch all the action now!

title: ReelTalk EP 44-Jesse's Tennis Bootcamp
synopsis: Jesse Morales is taking our vertical stars to the court! Watch as he schools them on the basics of tennis, puts them through a series of warm ups, and challenges them to a thrilling 2v2 match. In the end, Fulop Budavari, Madeleine Rocha-Barnette, and Savannah Coffee face off for a special prize. Who will come out on top?

title: ReelTalk EP 39 - Mystery and Sensuality in Italy
synopsis: We’re thrilled to welcome Nicole Mattox back to the show, alongside first-time guest Eric Guilmette, as they sit down with host Sarah Moliski to talk about their new series Dungeons of Ecstasy. Together, they unwrap this mysterious vertical thriller that’s captivating fans. Shot at a stunning location in Italy, the show not only delivers thrills but also reveals an exciting, more sensual side of Nicole.

title: ReelTalk EP 64-Waterboy Duo Reveal Who’s Most Likely To
synopsis: Sky Kawai and Declan Clifford from Waterboy get candid as they play a round of “Who’s Most Likely To?” From revealing who’s the better kisser to debating who rocks booty shorts best, they drop behind the secrets from the set of ReelShort’s hit LGBTQ series. Tune in for laughs, playful roasting, and insider stories you didn’t see on screen.

title: ReelTalk EP2-Let’s get reel personal
synopsis: Ever wondered what your favorite ReelShort stars are like when the cameras are off? In this episode, Rachel Bencosme gets REEL personal with Seth Edeen and Nicole Mattox. Tune in as they give us the inside scoop on fans, dating, pet peeves, and the red flags they just can’t ignore. Buckle up for some candid confessions. You’ll never look at them the same way again!

title: I Have a System,  She Has My Heart
synopsis: A quirky "Confession System" grants Alfred Carter rewards for professing love—but gives him only three chances to win the heart of his boss, Serena Harris. If she doesn't truly fall for him, he's dead. After a bold first move, Alfred doubles down with audacious flair, unexpectedly catching Serena's eye. But just as sparks fly, Chester Renwick targets her life force. Now Alfred must protect the woman he's trying to love—or they'll both lose everything.

title: ReelTalk EP 42-Chris and Cayla Went on a Date!
synopsis: Now introducing, ReelTalk Dates! Join The Quarterback Next Door’s Chris Quartuccio and Cayla Brady as they race through a shopping challenge, share a bite together, unwind with a romantic picnic, and top it all off with a swan boat ride, all in true Los Angeles style.

title: ReelTalk EP 69-ReelHotline with Sarah
synopsis: Step into the confessional. Sister Sarah is here to hear your secrets and offer her blessing. In this episode of ReelHotline, fans call in with their voicemail confessions, sharing their most guilty, messy, and surprising truths. Nothing is off limits and some of these sins might be a little juicier than expected. Will Sarah grant forgiveness or call them out?

title: ReelTalk EP 47-We Mess Up Too...
synopsis: Get ready for an episode full of laughs! This week, we’re reliving the funniest moments and best bloopers from ReelTalk. Which one’s your favorite?

title: ReelTalk EP 43-We Recreated Iconic ReelShort Looks!
synopsis: Our fashionistas are back! In this episode, host Sarah Moliski teams up with stars Sarah Noelle and Maria Barseghian to tackle a style challenge inspired by some of our favorite ReelShort scenarios. With SHEIN’s different styles, they’ll put together outfits for every situation. On-screen or off. Who will slay the looks and who will improvise? Tune in to find out!

title: ReelTalk EP 72-Vertical Drama Love Unfiltered
synopsis: Two major forces in verticals finally collide. Jen Cooper of Vertical Drama Love joins Nicole Mattox for an intimate conversation on the state of verticals. From where the industry is headed to what audiences are really craving, nothing is off-limits. It’s an unfiltered deep dive into the conversations creators, actors, and fans have been waiting for.

title: The Bear Hid My Husband's Secret
synopsis: Billionaire Stella discovers her son has hidden his mistress inside a giant teddy bear while plotting to strip his sick wife of everything and seize the family fortune. To protect her daughter-in-law, Stella pretends ignorance and strikes back in silence, punishing the mistress and her own son in a ruthless game of mansion warfare, until she and Luna spring the final trap.

title: Twist of time
synopsis: Ethan Arturo receives an unexpected guest, Kyle Crisanto, on the day of his father’s burial. He ends up in a bar after his mother confirms that Kyle is his step-brother. When Kyle joins him at the bar, he notices that Ethan is attracted to a certain waitress, Nathalie Andrés. Kyle urges him to talk to her, but when Ethan does so, Nathalie humiliates him. To save his crumbling pride, Ethan strikes a bet with Kyle: he'd get Nathalie in his bed before the week runs out.But things soon take a different turn.In the course of the bet, Ethan and Nathalie fall in love with each other. Well, until she finds out about the bet by an anonymous tip and calls off the relationship.A few weeks goes by and she still can’t let go of her feelings for Ethan. She’s advised by her best friend Kristine Malic, to have some sort of closure so she’d be able to move on. Nathalie heeds her advise and asks for one last night with Ethan...

title: ReelTalk EP 45-Blind Taste Test Challenge
synopsis:
Can you tell the difference between Dominos and Pizza Hut? We put Jeff Lawless, Mariah Moss, and Eric Guilmette to the test! Watch our stars do the Blind Taste Test Challenge and see if they can guess some of our favorite snacks. From spicy noodles to sour candy, they race with their senses to come out on top! 
The products and brands featured in this episode are used for entertainment and reference only. All trademarks and product names belong to their respective owners.

title: ReelTalk EP 54-Behind the Scenes of Happy Holidays, Hollywood
synopsis: Go behind the scenes of ReelShort’s holiday shoot as your favorite lead stars glam up in hair and makeup, snack on treats between takes, and strike a pose. Your favorite lead stars reunite for a festive moment unlike anything you’ve seen before.

title: ReelTalk EP 56-Workout Routines and Getting Punched?!
synopsis: We’re starting off our first episode of the new year with James Marchioni from Bastard King of the Cage! He gets real about training for the role and accidentally getting injured on set during a stunt scene. Sarah and James also talk about the key to achieving your fitness goals this year and what to be grateful for. Tune in for an episode that will inspire you to start the year strong!

title: ReelTalk EP28-Backstage: How to Kiss a Vampire
synopsis: Sink your teeth into this dangerously addictive inside look at Seth Eden and Nicole Mattox’s new show, How to Kiss a Vampire. For the first time ever, we’re getting an intimate glimpse into their life on set and everything in between. From Seth’s morning routines to Nicole’s workouts and a few daring stunts shared between on-screen lovers, this is more than just a love story. Follow along this reunion told through video diaries. Get ready to fall for the ReelShort stars you already adore, all over again.

title: ReelTalk EP 66-Secrets and Soulmates: The Reunion
synopsis: At the Secrets and Soulmates reunion, the cast comes back together to unpack everything that happened after leaving the mansion, from wrap party makeouts to unexpected breakups. Join host Zachary Reality as he navigates difficult conversations, rising tensions, and shocking revelations. Did Toni actually have a girlfriend? What happened between Brynn and Jace? And why didn’t Julie and Cru work out? Find out in this heated episode of ReelTalk.

title: ReelTalk EP 46-Halloween Special: A Ghost on Set!
synopsis: For this special Halloween episode, a tarot card reading with Nicole Mattox and Kirby Ellwood takes a spooky turn! Listen in on their scary stories, dating life, and what the future holds for them. Will they survive a haunting on set? Tune in to find out!

title: ReelTalk EP 57-The Next ReelStar Reunion
synopsis: The Next ReelStar Reunion is bringing the contestants together to catch up with Samantha Drews. They reveal what really went down on set, discuss behind the scenes drama, and share funny memories. The contestants also tell you why they deserve your vote. Who are you rooting for? Let us know in the comments!

title: ReelTalk EP21-Backstage: Wings of Fire The Dragon Slayer is My Ex-Lover
synopsis: Go behind the scenes of Wings of Fire: The Dragon Slayer Is My Ex-Lover and see how the epic fantasy romance comes to life! Join stars Seth Edeen and Nicole Mattox as they step into the roles of Tristan and Freya. From slaying dragons with cutting-edge VFX to rocking custom fantasy armor, glam hair, and dramatic makeup, this exclusive look reveals the magic behind this story.

title: ReelTalk EP9- The Reel Happily Ever After
synopsis: In this enchanting episode, join Richard and Jessica Sharrah as they take us on a heartwarming journey through their fairy tale romance. From the moment Richard swept Jessica off her feet on a motorcycle to their happily ever after, their story is nothing short of magical. Our host, Sarah Moliski, puts their love to the test with a whimsical challenge, and even invites their children for a game of 'Who is Most Likely To.' Be sure to stay tuned until the end for a surprise that will add an extra touch of magic to their family story!

title: I'm Obsessed With My Boss Part I
synopsis: Lucilia is an average woman who lives a very mundane life, but she has a guilty pleasure, she is in love with her boss, Ricardo. Lucilia's boyfriend, Jeremy, becomes suspicious of her. One day he goes through her phone and finds hundreds of Ricardo's personal pictures and unsent love letters for him. Things get heated up. Her and Ricardo start having an affair under Jeremy's nose...

title: ReelTalk EP15-Backstage: ReelTalk is a Prank!
synopsis:
We're getting mischievous on ReelTalk Backstage for April Fools’ day! Join host Sarah Moliski as she visits Jesse Morales and Samantha Drews on set for a special episode filled with pranks. Sarah might even fool Jesse with some shocking pregnancy news. But whose baby is it?
ReelTalk Backstage is your all-access pass to vertical productions. Go behind the scenes with your favorite stars as they take you on set and share unforgettable moments. title: ReelTalk EP7- The Villain Era
synopsis: Get ready for a devilishly fun episode as your favorite villain, Sarah Moliski, joins host Rachel Bencosme for a deep dive into the thrilling world of playing the bad guy. From guilty pleasures to the craft behind playing iconic villains, they explore it all. They also play a playful round of Would You Rather with moments from The Virgin's Bucket List. Get ready for laughs and absolute chaos.

title: ReelTalk EP 68-Richard & Miah Play Spin the Bottle
synopsis: We’re reuniting the stars of Wrong! and How to Break a DILF for an episode that will keep you spinning. Richard Trotter and Miah Green take on a playful game of Spin the Bottle with a Truth or Dare twist. From first kisses to first impressions, they reveal what they're really like off-camera, who’s got the best word on beat skills, and maybe even show off a little pole dancing.

title: ReelTalk EP14-Backstage: Good with Her Hands
synopsis:
In this special edition episode of ReelTalk Backstage, Rebecca Stoughton takes us behind the scenes of her latest show, Good with Her Hands. Join Rebecca as she glides on the ice, giving us a firsthand look at romance, hockey, and second chances.
ReelTalk Backstage is your all-access pass to vertical productions. Go behind the scenes with your favorite stars as they take you on set and share unforgettable moments. title: ReelTalk EP 33-Modern Elegance, Redefined
synopsis: We go deep in this episode with the badass queen we all know and love, Eli Jane. She takes us through the highs and lows of her journey, sharing how every experience, even the tough ones, helped shape who she is today. No regrets, just realness. Grab some tissues and get ready because she’s also answering fan questions you’ve all been dying to know!

title: ReelTalk EP 32-Getting Dumped & Calling Fans
synopsis: In this episode, we reunite two familiar faces from the ReelShort universe: Kiki Frags and Samantha Drews. The duo reminisces about their first time meeting and share some  stories from set. Plus, Kiki surprises a fan with a video call so get ready for some laugh out loud moments as he answers their burning questions. Stick around as Kiki reacts to How to Dump a Hockey Star and drops some juicy insights you won’t want to miss!

title: Bridal Betrayal: Poison and Trap
synopsis: Victor, the iron-blooded ship king, held immense power in his hands. When he reached his fifties, he considered retirement, intending to marry the young and beautiful Jessica. He not only planned a grand wedding, but also wanna transfer his company worth 80 million to his fiancee. However, Jessica had an affair with her childhood sweetheart Frank. She tried to poison Victor to death, intending to seize his property after marriage. But Victor had already known their scheme. He set up a big trap for Jessica...

title: ReelTalk EP 65-How Well Do Kasey and Vanessa Know Each Other?
synopsis: Kasey Esser and Vanessa von Schwarz from Your Husband Is Mine are back on our screens for some fun and games. Watch the couple put their relationship to the test as they see how well they really know each other. From non-negotiables to pet peeves, they’re revealing it all! You might just learn a few things about them you didn’t know before.

title: ReelTalk EP16-Pajama Party Confessions
synopsis: Sarah Moliski calls up her girls, Rebecca Stoughton and Tess Dinerstein, for a wild and unfiltered night of gossip, embarrassing stories, and lots of laughs. The trio drops some juicy details about everything from the art of being a weird girl to playing a daring game of 2 Truths and a Lie. From sharing their most cringe-worthy moments to prank-calling someone unsuspecting, this pajama party has it all.

title: ReelTalk EP18-Money, Guns, and a Merry Christmas: The Reunion
synopsis: Following the success of Money, Guns, and a Merry Christmas, Anna Stadler and Drew Ater reunite over drinks for a candid, celebratory sit-down. In this exclusive close-up interview, the duo revisits the action, the chemistry, and the moments that made it all unforgettable. Expect heartfelt gratitude, behind the scenes stories, and a few never-before-heard secrets along the way.

title: ReelTalk EP 62-Dating App Confessions
synopsis: #CrocsPartner We’re keeping the romance alive! Savannah and Micheal from our new show Charmed to Meet You spill all about dating apps and what their Jibbitz charms might be signaling to potential matches. Plus, don’t miss the juicy tea on their ideal types and who they’d write a love letter to using Jibbitz charms!

title: Bad Son-in-Law, Go to Jail
synopsis: Eleanor bought a big villa for her daughter-in-law Diana. One day, she excitedly brought her old best friend Marian, who is also Diana's mother, to visit the villa. But they were stopped outside by a strange woman. Who was she? Before the two old friends could figure it out, the woman pointed at Eleanor's nose and scolded her as a thief...

title: ReelTalk EP4-The Reel Magic and High Notes
synopsis: In this must-see episode, Meg Bush and Jesse Morales tell us all about their new show 'Baby Trapped by the Billionaire', including their reactions to never-before-seen footage! From sizzling steamy scenes to revealing what it's really like to film those intimate moments together, they go all-in on the drama. But that's not all—brace yourself for jaw-dropping revelations as they showcase some impressive hidden talents that you definitely didn’t see coming. Laugh, cheer, and maybe even fan yourself as they pull back the curtain on their real lives.

title: ReelTalk EP12-Saxophones & Serenades
synopsis: In this episode, host Sarah Moliski continues her conversation with the talented actor and musician Luke Charles Stafford. Luke opens up about his journey as an artist, sharing the intricacies of his creative process and what fuels his passion for music. He also gives us a special treat! In a captivating, impromptu performance, he takes his saxophone and serenades Sarah with his soulful sound. Tune in for a soulful conversation about Luke’s musical side!

title: ReelTalk EP 40-Contract Lovers & Heartbreak
synopsis: The stars of Miss You After Goodbye are back and bringing the laughs on this episode of ReelTalk! Haley Lohrli talks all about her bold new role while Ben and Josh spill about their own unforgettable characters. Just when you think it can’t get any better, the trio face off in an improv game and a lightning round of ReelFast questions. Chaos, giggles, and roasts guaranteed!

title: Duty or desire
synopsis:
Rose Barclay is the mistress of a man, named Jon Jackson and acts as the unseen family caretaker. Although Jon’s real-life wife, Lily Jackson, has no idea that Rose is both a call girl and the breadwinner; she keeps Jon and the high-consumption camp running smoothly. When Lily uncovers the shocking truth, she confronts Jon, only to hear his rationalization: Rose’s involvement has however made it difficult to disconnect herself with their lifestyle.
Problems escalate when Rose meets Ted Georges an entrepreneur, billionaire, who wishes to find love. Intrigued by his stability and genuine affection, Rose starts to build a new life for herself, one where she wouldn’t be a ghost in someone else’s marriage. When Rose steps back from the Jacksons, Jon and Lily begin to gradually lose the world they’ve become accustom to...

title: ReelTalk EP 31-Backstage: The Deaf Heiress's Secret
synopsis: Get your backstage stage pass the The Deaf Heiress’s Secret! This is a story packed with deception, dark schemes, and shocking betrayals. But off-camera, it’s a whole different vibe. Join Sarah Moliski as she uncovers the real fun on set, including exclusive interviews with Adam Daniel and Samantha Drews you won’t see anywhere else.

title: ReelTalk EP5-How Hard Is Letting Go?
synopsis:
In this episode, we sit down with actress, Haley Lohrli, for an intimate conversation about her journey in the world of acting, her personal life, and the transformative self-love journey she’s been on. From navigating the ups and downs of her career to embracing life changes, Haley opens up about what it truly means to live authentically.
We also challenge Haley to guess which iconic women—past and present—said some of the most memorable quotes and lyrics that have shaped culture. It’s a blend of insight, laughter, and celebration of women who inspire us all.
Tune in for a heartfelt episode that will leave you feeling empowered, motivated, and ready to embrace your own personal journey of growth and self-love!

title: ReelTalk EP6-Could Self-Love Be Self Defense?
synopsis: Join host Rachel Bencosme and the fabulous Haley Lohrli for a spirited episode of girl talk and espresso martinis! These two ladies discuss the importance of having a solid support system and the magic of vulnerability. As they mix up their favorite cocktails, they share heartfelt moments and the key ingredients to building your own village. Whether you’re sipping at home or just need a dose of friendship, tune in for a bubbly conversation that celebrates the power of connection, one espresso martini at a time. Cheers to friendship, laughter, and a little liquid courage!

title: ReelTalk EP19-Backstage: Behind Bars
synopsis:
This week, we’re going behind bars with ReelShort sensation Marc Herrmann, star of the explosive new series Undercover Prison King. Marc takes us inside the walls of this gritty and thrilling ride. Danger lurks in every shadow, plots shift like smoke, and the next jaw-dropping stunt is always just around the corner.
