From intense rehearsals to candid conversations, each episode gives you a front-row seat to the action. Get ready to see your favorite shows like never before.

title: ReelTalk EP 29-BroTalk Part 1
synopsis: Get ready to kick it with the guys of ReelShort in this hilarious ReelTalk spin-off! Richard Sharrah, Aaron Oberst, and Jeff Lawless are heating up the summer with an epic BroTalk hangout. From juicy fan questions to never-before-heard stories, nothing is off limits!

title: ReelTalk EP 51-Flashback Friday
synopsis: Who doesn’t love a little nostalgia? Watch as our vertical stars relive their favorite ReelTalk moments with ReelTalk OG Rachel Bencosme. Luke Charles Stafford, Richard Sharrah, Autumn Noel, and Haley Lohrli get heartfelt, hilarious, and everything in between.

title: ReelTalk EP22-Mommy, I'm on a Podcast
synopsis: This week, we’re rolling out the red carpet for the tiny stars of ReelShort, April Korovichenko from Mommy Don’t Cry Daddy Is Sorry, and Maxwell Maydaniuk, the ultimate matchmaker in Mommy I Got You a Date. But they didn't come alone! Their superstar moms are in the studio too for a feel-good episode about Hollywood and home life. We talk about what it’s really like raising rising stars, the BTS fun of child actor, and playing some hilarious games that may or may not reveal who’s the star in the family.

title: ReelTalk EP11-From Memory Lane to Fast Lanes
synopsis: Strap in for a wild ride with the one and only Luke Charles Stafford! In this episode, Luke takes us on an unforgettable journey from the heart of the Midwest to the bright lights of Hollywood. Get ready to hear stories he’s never shared before, as he opens up about his personal experiences and the road less traveled. We also switch gears with a fun and unpredictable game, testing Luke’s knowledge of his ReelShort shows.

title: ReelTalk EP10- Turning Dreams Into Reality
synopsis: Richard takes us on his journey of discovering his "why" and how he channels that magic with some inspiring main character energy. Plus, learn why you should never squash someone's dream! Stick around for some lightning-fast, out-of-this-world quickfire questions from a galaxy far, far away!

title: ReelTalk EP 37 -Confessions of a Casting Director
synopsis: Ever wonder who’s responsible for bringing your favorite stars to the big screen? Our incredible Casting Directors pull back the curtain on the world of casting. They share what they look for in fresh talent, their wildest audition stories, and advice on how to thrive as an actor.

title: ReelTalk EP25-The Art of Intimacy
synopsis: Ever wondered what really goes on behind the scenes of those steamy on-screen moments? Especially in the world of vertical dramas? Renowned intimacy coordinator Olivia Ku joins ReelShort star Tess Dinerstein, known for her bold performances in Surrender to My Professor and How to Tame a Silver Fox, for a candid conversation about the art and logistics of choreographing intimacy. Tess opens up about what empowers her in these daring roles, how she protects her boundaries, and what it takes to bring your favorite romance stories to life. All with safety, trust, and consent.

title: ReelTalk EP 35-Surrender to My Reel Vertical Impact
synopsis: ReelShort invites all visionary creators to showcase their storytelling brilliance in the most anticipated short drama contest of the year. Whether it's romance, suspense, a ReelShort fan adaptation, or something entirely original - turn your talent into impact! Our very own Sarah Moliski and Luke Charles Stafford show you how to reimagine iconic ReelShort series with your own unique creative lens. Follow along, grab your wig, and enter the contest today!

title: ReelTalk EP 36-Love Bombing: The Reunion
synopsis: We’re bringing back the cast of ReelShort’s first unscripted hit, Love Bombing. The singles (and not-so-singles) reunite to spill the tea, revisit the drama, and relive the jaw-dropping moments that made this dating rollercoaster unforgettable.

title: ReelTalk EP8- From Hinge to Unhinged
synopsis: We’re swiping right on Sarah today as she returns for another round of hot seat questions with your host, Rachel Bencosme! In this episode, we yap about the wild world of dating apps and of course, those horror stories that are way too good to keep to ourselves. Sarah also spills the tea while multitasking as she whips up a delicious smoothie, so tune in for the perfect blend of relationship wisdom and fruity goodness.

title: ReelTalk Encore-Luke Charles Stafford-Just A Little (Live)
synopsis: ReelTalk Encore rips the script and calls your favorite ReelShort stars back to the spotlight. Watch intimate performances and hidden talents in a whole new light.

title: ReelTalk EP23-New Show, Same Spark
synopsis: OG ReelShort stars Autumn Noel and Kasey Esser are back and better than ever! The duo reunites on screen in this episode, rekindling their chemistry. Watch them react to their latest show, Hillbilly Girlie Marries a Billionaire, and spill all the behind the scenes tea about working together again. Trust us, you won’t want to miss this one!

title: ReelTalk EP27-Beauty, Brains, and Girl Math
synopsis: Ever wonder what really goes on inside a girl’s head? Is it girl math? Delusion? Pure genius? This is the episode for you. We’re reuniting Never Underestimate Girl Math stars Kaikane and Caledonia to spill the behind-the-scenes tea, dive into the importance of representation, and play a game to decide once and for all: is it girl math… or just straight-up delulu?

title: ReelTalk EP13-Queen Bee Meets Queen Bee
synopsis:
Get ready for a buzzworthy return as the queen bee herself, Daniela Couso, joins the latest episode of ReelTalk with Sarah Moliski! These two legendary villains dish on the reality of bringing their characters to life and the fun side of it all. Daniela also spills the tea on surviving the chaos of high school drama, how she conquered it, and made her way to the Hollywood spotlight! She even dives into fan comments. Some sweet, some downright crazy!
This episode also packs a bonus clip with another villain you love, Michael Vaccaro! Tune in for a candid convo about the power of representation for mature actors and why they absolutely deserve to take the lead in those swoon-worthy romance stories too.

title: ReelTalk EP 41-Street Interview at Santa Monica Pier
synopsis: ReelTalk is hitting the streets with hot seat questions! Host Sarah Moliski and vertical star Jeff Lawless take over the Santa Monica Pier, racing to interview as many people as possible while convincing them to download the ReelShort app. From asking if you would date your professor to whether it’s a red flag to discover your boyfriend’s a werewolf, nothing is off limits. Tune in for an episode packed with laughs, competition, and fun in the sun!

title: ReelTalk EP 30-BroTalk Part 2
synopsis: The party’s not over. It’s just getting hotter with BroTalk! Richard Sharrah, Aaron Oberst, and Jeff Lawless are back with more flexing, grilling, and a competitive game of pool. Oh, and did someone say surprise ape cameo? Tune in to see what kind of mischief the bros are stirring up this summer!

title: ReelTalk EP17-Hear Me Out…He Is Kind of Hot?
synopsis: The chaotic pajama party continues! Listen in for a sweet surprise as the trio spills the tea on their crushes, showmances, and the cringiest things they’ve done in the name of love. Things really heat up when they jump on the Hear Me Out trend so prepare yourselves for some hot takes.

title: ReelTalk EP24-Surviving Bullying & Navigating Mental Health
synopsis: To wrap up Mental Health Awareness Month, Autumn Noel gets real with her bestie Amanda Liguori in a heartfelt conversation. For the first time, Autumn opens up about her experience with bullying, online negativity, and the path she’s taken to heal. From finding strength in songwriting to standing up for herself, she shares how she’s turned her struggles into growth. This is Autumn like you’ve never seen her before. Only on ReelTalk!

title: ReelTalk EP26-The Adjuster Meets The Original Influencer
synopsis: "The Adjuster" star Evan Brown sits down with none other than Perez Hilton, making his first-ever appearance on ReelTalk. Together, they reveal a bold new era of storytelling with the first fictionalized show depicting true crime. Watch them react live to the trailer and exclusive scenes, and uncover juicy behind the scenes secrets from set that you won’t find anywhere else.
